Name: Kotak Securities
Description:
At Kotak Securities, we foster talent and nurture an environment that values, supports, and inspires every individual. Recognized as a Great Place to Work, we are committed to transparency, ethical conduct, and a strong work ethic within a stable and well-established financial services landscape.

We believe professional growth is key to success. Our internal training and mentorship programs equip employees with the skills needed to excel in dynamic financial markets. By nurturing talent from within, we create clear pathways for career advancement and leadership development.

Innovation is at the heart of our success. Kotak Securities leverages cutting-edge technology and digital tools to enhance service delivery, ensuring our team remains at the forefront of industry advancements. This focus on innovation drives operational excellence while offering employees opportunities to pioneer new solutions in the financial sector.

Our inclusive culture is a cornerstone of our organization. We celebrate diverse perspectives, fostering an environment where every voice is heard and valued. By championing equity and diversity, we empower employees to contribute meaningfully to our collective success.

We also recognize the importance of work-life balance. Through flexible work arrangements and wellness programs, we ensure employees thrive both professionally and personally.

Beyond business, we are dedicated to making a positive impact. Our Corporate Social Responsibility initiatives focus on financial literacy, education, and livelihood programs, empowering underserved communities through capacity building and skill development.

At Kotak Securities, you’re not just part of a team—you’re a valued member of a family united by shared values, a passion for progress, and a commitment to excellence in financial services.

Disclaimer: https://www.kotaksecurities.com/disclaimer/

Name: BSEIndia
Description:
BSE is Asia's First Exchange and World's Fastest Exchange with the Speed of 6 Microseconds.
Bombay Stock Exchange Limited is the oldest stock exchange in Asia, established in 1875. It is the first stock exchange in the country to obtain permanent recognition in 1956 from the Government of India under the Securities Contracts (Regulation) Act, 1956. It is widely recognized by its index, SENSEX.
The Exchange is professionally managed under the overall direction of the Board of Directors. The Exchange has a nation-wide reach with a presence in 417 cities and towns of India.

Name: No-Company
Description: Norwegian Company (NO Company) invests in a diversified portfolio of quoted and unquoted securities of companies, which are engaged in various businesses with a history of strong operating and financial performance.

Name: Colombo Stock Exchange
Description:
The Colombo Stock Exchange (CSE) operates the only stock market in Sri Lanka and is responsible for providing a transparent and regulated environment where companies and investors can come together. CSE is a company that is limited by guarantee. It is licensed by the Securities and Exchange Commission of Sri Lanka (SEC) and is a mutual exchange consisting of 15 Members and 16 Trading Members. All Members and Trading Members are licensed by the SEC to operate as Stockbrokers. 

The CSE has its Head Office in the World Trade Centre, Colombo 1 and branches in Matara, Kandy, Kurunegala, Negombo, Jaffna, Anuradhapura, Ratnapura and Ambalantota.

The CSE is a member of the World Federation of Exchanges (WFE) and a founding member of the South Asian Federation of Exchanges (SAFE). We are also A Great Place to Work Certified.

For more information, please visit: www.cse.lk

Name: CIBC Capital Markets
Description:
Transform what's possible with industry-leading solutions tailored to you. 

At CIBC Capital Markets, we partner with corporations, governments and institutional clients in key financial centres around the world to develop customized solutions that enable our clients to access capital, expand their operations and actively invest.

Disclaimer: All activity on this LinkedIn account is subject to monitoring, including posts, shares, comments, reactions, and private messages.

Name: Saudi Tadawul Group
Description: Founded in 2021 and headquartered in Riyadh, the Saudi Tadawul Group is a holding company with a portfolio of four integrated subsidiaries: the Saudi Exchange, one of the largest 10 stock exchanges in the world by market capitalization, the Securities Clearing Center Company (Muqassa), the Securities Depository Center Company (Edaa), and Wamid, an innovative applied technology services business. Saudi Tadawul Group was established as part of a continuous development program focused on enhancing the capital market and its infrastructure, attracting foreign investments, and diversifying the Saudi economy. The Group reinforces Saudi Arabia’s position as an attractive global investment destination and the gateway to the MENA region.

Name: Pakistan Stock Exchange - PSX
Description:
The official LinkedIn page of Pakistan Stock Exchange Limited.

The Pakistan Stock Exchange was established on September 18, 1947, incorporated in 1949 as the Karachi Stock Exchange, limited by Guarantee. In October 1970, a second stock exchange was established in Lahore to meet the stock trading needs of the provincial metropolis.

Name: SEBI
Description:
Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI), is a statutory regulatory body established by an Act of
Parliament, to protect the interests of investors in securities market, to promote the development of and to regulate the securities market in India.

Name: First Derivative
Description:
First Derivative is driven by people, data, and technology, unlocking the value of insight, hindsight, and foresight to drive organizations forward. Counting many of the world's leading investment banks as clients, we help our clients navigate the data-driven, digital revolution that is transforming the financial services sector. Our global teams span across 15 offices serving clients across EMEA, North America and APAC. 
 
As an EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) company, a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services, we deliver advanced financial services solutions by empowering operational insights, driving innovation, and enabling more effective risk management in an increasingly data-centric world. Together with EPAM, we combine deep industry expertise with cutting-edge technology to help clients stay ahead in a rapidly evolving financial landscape, offering comprehensive solutions that drive business transformation and sustainable growth.

Name: Ventura
Description:
Ventura is an omnichannel trading and investments platform with a network of branches, sub-brokers and Digital Channels. Incorporated in 1994, Ventura is a Mumbai, India-based SEBI-registered financial service provider and a member of NSE, BSE, MCX, NCDEX, NSDL, and CDSL.

Ventura offers online stock trading, commodity trading, currency derivatives trading, mutual funds and demat accounts. The company also provides portfolio management services and customised investment planning support. 

The Ventura app empowers its customers with seamless and efficient online trading access.

Name: Futures First
Description:
Futures First is part of the Hertshten Group, it's holding company, which has a fast-growing business that continues to raise the international benchmarks for excellence across the finance industry. 

 Futures First benefits from the significant international experience of the Hertshten Group in derivatives markets across global financial exchanges. 
 
Its principal assets are its people, recruited from the best universities. The entrepreneurial nature of our activity demands the commitment of dynamic and talented people who can compete at the highest level to meet the demands of these intense markets. 

In Futures First, we value quick-witted analysis, independent judgment, strong number skills, intellectual curiosity, honesty, and a proven track record of commitment, hard work and success.

Name: EXANTE
Description:
Global prime brokerage solutions backed by proprietary technology and dedicated service.

Over a decade ago, we set out to create a secure, regulated, full-service trading environment, giving clients the flexibility they needed for custom business setups. 

Today, our proprietary platform enables our institutional and individual investors to diversify their investments across multiple asset classes. Through a single multi-currency account, our clients trade more than 1.4 million financial instruments, including stocks, ETFs, bonds, futures, and options, across 50+ markets.

Our technology is only part of the story. Driven by passion, ownership, integrity, and a commitment to change, our team of 750+ professionals continue to deliver next-generation trading solutions, powering up our clients in the age of AI and winning awards including ‘Most Innovative Multi-Asset Trading Platform’ and FT Diversity’s ‘Product or Service of the Year’ Award in 2024.

As a financial company, we know our investment priorities, and our best investment has always been in our people. We’re growing 70% year-on-year and hiring globally, if you’re ready to invest in your own future then join the team: https://careers.exante.eu/

Entities using the EXANTE brand are not licensed, approved, registered or in any other way authorised or regulated by the Monetary Authority of Singapore.

Name: Nordic Capital
Description:
Nordic Capital is a leading international private equity investor and subsector specialist dedicated to building stronger, more sustainable businesses through operational improvement and transformative long-term growth in partnership with management teams. 

With over 35 years of experience, a global reach, and the local presence of dedicated sector investment advisory teams in Sweden, UK, Germany, Denmark, Norway, Finland and the US, Nordic Capital brings deep expertise across its core investment sectors: Healthcare, Technology & Payments, Financial Services and Services & Industrial Tech.

Leveraging tailored playbooks, a dedicated operations advisory team and a global network of industrial and functional experts, Nordic Capital seeks to help companies to scale, innovate and become sustainable leaders. 

Nordic Capital currently manages around EUR 34 billion in assets and since its founding in 1989, has invested approximately EUR 30 billion in more than 150 middle-market companies in Northern Europe and North America. The committed capital is principally provided by global institutional investors such as pension funds.

Name: Akuna Capital
Description:
Akuna Capital is an innovative trading firm with a strong focus on cutting-edge technology, data driven decisions and automation. Our core competency is providing liquidity as an options market-maker – meaning we provide competitive quotes that we are willing to both buy and sell. To do this successfully we design and implement our own low latency technologies, trading strategies and mathematical models.

Our Founding Partners first conceptualized Akuna in their hometown of Sydney. They opened the firm’s first office in 2011 in the heart of the derivatives industry and the options capital of the world – Chicago. Today, Akuna is proud to operate from additional offices in Sydney, Shanghai, and London.

We are the leading options market-maker to successfully enter the industry in recent years with sustainable growth. By providing more liquidity to the markets through rapid innovation, we have the advantage of youth in remaining nimble and agile in an ever-changing competitive landscape.

Akuna has no clients or external investors, we trade only with the company’s capital. We have dozens of employee-shareholders and this number continues to grow.

We are really proud of what we have accomplished since inception, but even more excited for all that lies ahead of us. We are still building, accessing new markets, trading new products, and creating new strategies, giving you the opportunity to be involved in shaping the future of Akuna. Indeed, the great majority of Akuna’s growth profile is ahead of us.

Visit Us: A 360 Virtual Reality Experience: https://vr.akunacapital.com

Name: Nordea Markets, Corporates & Institutions
Description:
Nordea Large Corporates & Institutions (LC&I) is the international markets operation of Nordea - the leading bank in the Nordics and one of the biggest in Europe. At LC&I we take pride in being the ideal financial markets partner, and as such provide you with a wide range of highly competitive products within fixed income, currencies, equities, debt capital markets and corporate finance and much more. 

If you want swift, secure and easy access to market and trading facilities, we are proud to offer and deliver it to you  around the clock. We have a strong local presence in the Nordics and international distribution capacity in the regions where we operate, and will also service you through our advanced digital channels. On top of it all, we also offer exceptional advisory services and unique economic research and analysis. Right here and everywhere, you can join our experts – get insight to the financial markets and explore your opportunities.

At Nordea Markets, we not only say we have passion for customers – we live by it. Everything we do, we do with our customers in mind, to ensure you get the optimal solutions and the best products and services that you need to prosper. 

** We value your opinions and welcome your comments and questions on our posts here on LinkedIn. Please note that we reply mainly during business hours, Monday-Friday. Please keep a polite, professional and constructive tone. We remove comments containing crude language and derogatory views of our staff and other people who comment on our posts. We do not allow content that is unrelated to the subject, and we remove discriminatory and racist comments as well as spam and advertising.

Name: Arif Habib Limited
Description:
Arif Habib Limited (AHL) is engaged in providing brokerage and corporate finance services to a large number of institutional, corporate, high networth individuals and retail clients. It is a listed company with 75% ownership by Arif Habib Securities Ltd, the holding company of one of the premier financial services groups in Pakistan.

Arif Habib Group commenced brokerage services in 1970. Our brokerage services are provided by a team of professional brokers with 13 years of average individual experience and 80 years of collective experience. We remain eager to provide realistic trading recommendations, efficient order execution, significant capacity to execute large orders, competititve pricing, and in-depth research reports to our valued clients.

Name: Bloomfield Investment Corporation
Description:
As a response to the needs of financial markets and banks in Africa, Bloomfield Investment proposes a rating system for borrower and bond certificate issuer credit risks. Bloomfield Investment's rating system shows the insolvency risk of companies, banks, public institutions or countries raising funds on the market or from banks. This enables to grade borrowers based on their credit risk, which is essential for the determination of interest margins – or risk premium – applied by lenders, whether these are banks or bond market investors. Therefore, 
Bloomfield Investment's approach meets the needs of both bond market investors and financial institutions.

Bloomfield Investment different interventions
- Credit Rating
- Financial research and market intelligence
- In house training and seminars
- Publication of research

Name: Ethiopian Capital Market Authority
Description:
The Capital Market Authority (CMA) is one of the key institutions established by Article 3(1) of the Proclamation as an autonomous Federal Government Regulatory Authority with its own juridical personality, accountable to the Prime Minister of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia.

The 6 major priority areas of the project team are:
1. Capital Market Authority Formation
2. Regulatory Framework Development
3. Capacity Development and Investor Education
4. Long-Term Capital Market Development Roadmap
5. Enabling Environment: Review of Institutional Investor Regulation, Macro-Financial, and Tax Policies. 
6. Setting up the Exchange: Supporting the Ethiopian Securities Exchange (ESX ) Project Team.

Name: Suno
Description:
Por aqui, a gente acredita em crescimento — o seu, o nosso e o do Brasil.

Queremos estar entre as melhores empresas de investimentos do país e, para isso, estamos em plena expansão.

A Suno nasceu em 2017 com um objetivo claro: TRANSFORMAR O BRASIL

A gente começou democratizando o acesso à informação financeira, mostrando que investir não é privilégio de poucos — é ferramenta de transformação. Hoje, evoluímos para ser um ecossistema completo de soluções financeiras, com diversas frentes que se conectam para entregar o que há de melhor em investimento: Suno Research, Suno Consultoria, Suno Asset, Eleven Financial Research, Ecossistema de Mídias e Novos Negócios.

 Nosso propósito:
SER O ALIADO DO INVESTIDOR PARA TRANSFORMAR O BRASIL

 Nossa missão:
LEVAR AS MELHORES SOLUÇÕES FINANCEIRAS PARA NOSSOS CLIENTES, COM CLAREZA E TRANSPARÊNCIA.

 Nossa cultura
A Suno é feita de gente inconformada, curiosa, colaborativa, proativa e com vontade fora do comum, que acreditam no mercado financeiro e no poder de transformar — com excelência, atitude de dono e propósito. Crescemos rápido, mas nunca perdemos nossa essência: acreditamos que dá pra fazer diferente. Pensamos grande, mudamos muito e mudamos rápido e mantemos um ambiente que valoriza a autonomia, a resiliência, o desenvolvimento, sede de conhecimento e a entrega com qualidade.

Aqui, cultura não é discurso: é prática. Está nas decisões, nas entregas, nas conversas e nas pequenas atitudes de cada um do time.

Nossos valores são o que nos guiam e sustentam o jeito Suno de fazer as coisas:
1. Excelência sem Desculpas
2. Investimos no Sucesso do Cliente
3. Somos Inovadores e Ousados
4. Temos Visão Expansionista
5. Temos Visão de Dono

Somos uma empresa profundamente conectada com tecnologia. Usamos Inteligência Artificial para ir além — ganhar agilidade, inteligência e precisão nas entregas. 

Great Place to Work (GPTW) há 5 anos consecutivos, reconhecimento que vem de dentro - das pessoas que constroem a Suno.

Name: Comisión Nacional de Valores
Description:
La Comisión Nacional de Valores es un organismo autárquico del Estado Nacional que regula el Mercado de Capitales argentino, garantizando la eficaz asignación del ahorro hacia la inversión.

Nuestros valores  son:
-Transparencia de los mercados
-Protección a los inversores
-Eficiencia y correcta formación de precios

Name: Aimia Inc
Description:
Aimia Inc. (TSX: AIM) is a diversified company focused on unlocking the growth potential of its two global businesses, Bozzetto, a sustainable specialty chemicals company, and Cortland International, a rope and netting solutions company. Headquartered in Toronto, Aimia's priorities include monetizing its non-core investments, returning capital to its shareholders, and efficiently utilizing its loss carry-forwards to create shareholder value. 

For more information about Aimia, visit www.aimia.com.

Name: Altor Equity Partners
Description:
We are certain that our passion for partnerships creates real value. Value that lasts. Value we can look back on with founders and management, agreeing that together we made a positive difference. We have been around since 2003 when our first fund was established. We are currently focusing on five sectors; Business Services, Consumer, Financial Services, Industrial and Technology.

Name: BODIVA-BOLSA DE DÍVIDA E VALORES DE ANGOLA - Sociedade Aberta
Description:
The Angolan Securities Exchange provides trading and settlement services of both equities and debt instrument in the Angolan regulated market. 

BODIVA is one of the fastest-growing exchanges in Sub-Saharan Africa. Founded in 2014, BODIVA offers a world class trading facility for local and international investors looking to gain exposure to Angola and Africa’s economic growth.

BODIVA is playing a vital role in the growth of Angola's economy by encouraging savings and investment, as well as helping local and international companies access cost-effective capital. BODIVA operates under the jurisdiction of the Capital Markets Commission of Angola.

Name: Egyptian Exchange - EGX
Description:
EGX Vision: To be a World-Class, Egypt-based Exchange: the Premier Capital Market in the Middle East & North Africa Region that best serves its stakeholders.
EGX Mission: The mission of EGX is to operate and develop a high quality market for the benefits of its Egyptian and international clients.
EGX will serve and empower its customers by providing top notch market technology, innovative products, fair, transparent and efficient market.
رؤية البورصة المستقبلية

Name: Simest SpA
Description:
Simest is a financial institution for the development and promotion of Italian enterprises abroad. Simest was set up as a limited company in 1990.
Simest can acquire up to 49% of the equity capital of foreign firms in countries outside the European Union, whether wholly-owned by Italian companies or set up as joint ventures with local partners. Simest provides start-up and growth capital financing as well as participating in buyouts. Geographically it invests in non-EU countries, focussing on BRIC, Americas and Middle-East. Simest also provides Italian companies seeking to internationalize their businesses with technical assistance and advisory services.
Simest is a member of the European Development Finance Institutions (EDFI) and the Italian Venture Capital and Private Equity Association (AIFI).

Name: Autorité Marocaine du Marché des Capitaux (AMMC)
Capital Markets Authority- Kenya
Description:
The Capital Markets Authority (CMA) was set up in 1989 as a statutory agency under the Capital Markets Act Cap 485A. It is charged with the prime responsibility of both regulating and developing an orderly, fair and efficient capital markets in Kenya with the view to promoting market integrity and investor confidence.

The regulatory functions of the Authority as provided by the Act and the regulations include; Licensing and supervising all the capital market intermediaries; Ensuring compliance with the legal and regulatory framework by all market participants; Regulating public offers of securities, such as equities and bonds & the issuance of other capital market products such as collective investment schemes; Promoting market development through research on new products and services; Reviewing the legal framework to respond to market dynamics; Promoting investor education and public awareness; and Protecting investors’ interest.

Name: Rashed Abdul Rahman Al Rashed & Sons Group - RAR
Description:
Rashed Abdul Rahman AlRashed & Sons Group is a dynamic, leading conglomerate in Saudi Arabia.  For more than five decades the group has been instrumental in the development of the Saudi Arabian infrastructure.  Today it continues to contribute to the growth and prosperity of the Saudi Arabian nation.

Large scale investments are made in developing land and property through our Real Estate Sector and many business partnerships are initiated with global companies via our Investment Sector.

The group operates in seven Business Areas, namely Building Materials, Cement & Bulk Materials, Finishing Materials, Contracting,  Industrial Products, Automotive Products, and Food Products.

The group prides itself not only in delivering products and services of the highest quality and standards, but also ensures the utmost integrity with everyone that we deal with.

Name: ICMA - International Capital Market Association
Description: ICMA is the trade association for the international capital market with over 610 member firms from 70 jurisdictions globally, including issuers, banks, asset managers, central banks, infrastructure providers and law firms. It performs a crucial central role in the market by providing industry-driven standards and recommendations for issuance, trading and settlement in international fixed income and related instruments. ICMA liaises closely with regulatory and governmental authorities, both at the national and supranational level, to help to ensure that financial regulation promotes the efficiency and cost effectiveness of the capital market. ICMA prioritises three core fixed income market areas – primary; secondary; repo and collateral; with cross-cutting themes of sustainable finance and fintech & digitalisation.

Name: Sermaye Piyasası Lisanslama Sicil ve Eğitim Kuruluşu A.Ş.
Description:
Sermaye Piyasası Lisanslama Sicil ve Eğitim Kuruluşu (SPL), Sermaye Piyasası Kurulu (Kurul) tarafından sermaye piyasası kurumlarında ve halka açık ortaklıklarda çalışanlara lisans verme, lisans sahibi kişilerin sicilini tutma ve lisanslarla ilgili eğitim programları düzenlemekle yetkilendirilmiş ve 2011 yılında faaliyetlerine başlamıştır.

Ortakları arasında Türkiye Sermaye Piyasaları Birliği (TSPB), Borsa İstanbul, Merkezi Kayıt Kuruluşu, İstanbul Takas ve Saklama Bankası ile Türkiye Değerleme Uzmanları Birliği (TDUB) yer almaktadır.

Halka açık ortaklıklarda, yatırım kuruluşlarında, kolektif yatırım kuruluşlarında, derecelendirme kuruluşlarında, gayrimenkul değerleme şirketlerinde ve Sermaye Piyasası Kanunu’nda yer alan diğer kurumlarda çalışanlardan belirli unvan veya niteliklere sahip olanlar, Kurul düzenlemeleri ile zorunlu tutulması halinde, “Sermaye Piyasasında Faaliyette Bulunanlar İçin Lisanslama ve Sicil Tutmaya İlişkin Esaslar Hakkında Tebliğ (VII-128.7)”de sayılan lisanslardan bir veya birkaçına sahip olmak zorundadırlar. Lisanslama Sınavları, Kurulun verdiği yetkiye istinaden SPL tarafından düzenlenmekte ve kağıt ortamda ya da elektronik ortamda (e-LS) gerçekleştirilmektedir.

Lisanslama, sınav ve sicil faaliyetleri yanında SPL; lisans sahibi kişiler için zorunlu olan ve web tabanlı sunulan yenileme eğitimleri, sermaye piyasalarında aktif görevde bulunan veya bu alanlara ilgi duyan kişilere yönelik olarak sınıf tabanlı sunulan mesleki gelişim eğitimleri, Borsaya kote şirketler açısından alınması zorunlu olan ve yine web tabanlı olarak Merkezi Kayıt Kuruluşu A.Ş. ile ortak sunulan Elektronik Genel Kurul Sistemi Eğitimleri ile yine sınıf tabanlı sunulan Gayrimenkul / Konut Değerleme Lisansı sahiplerine yönelik Değerleme Uzmanlığı Mesleki Uygulamalı Eğitim Programları düzenlemektedir.

Name: Lehman Brothers
Description: Lehman Brothers Holdings Inc. (Pink Sheets: LEHMQ, former NYSE ticker symbol LEH) (pronounced /ˈliːmən/) was a global financial-services firm which, until declaring bankruptcy in 2008, participated in business in investment banking, equity and fixed-income sales, research and trading, investment management, private equity, and private banking. It was a primary dealer in the U.S. Treasury securities market. Its primary subsidiaries included Lehman Brothers Inc., Neuberger Berman Inc., Aurora Loan Services, Inc., SIB Mortgage Corporation, Lehman Brothers Bank, FSB, Eagle Energy Partners, and the Crossroads Group. The firm's worldwide headquarters were in New York City, with regional headquarters in London and Tokyo, as well as offices located throughout the world.

Name: CDSL - Central Depository Services India Ltd
Description:
Central Depository Services Limited (“CDSL”) was found in 1999 to fulfil one goal: Convenient, Dependable and secured depository services. Over two decades later, everything we have done – the values we have built on, dematerialisation of various asset classes, e-services – have all been in support of that singular goal, at an affordable cost.

We are a Market Infrastructure Institution (MII) and a crucial part of the Capital market structure, providing services to all Market participants - Exchanges, Clearing Corporations, Depository Participants (DPs), Issuers and Investors.

A Depository is a facilitator for holding of securities in the dematerialised form and an enabler for securities transactions.

Name: Stockbit
Description:
Stockbit is the leading social platform that redesigned information sharing for stock investors and traders in Indonesia. Engineered and designed by traders for traders. Our vision is to make stock investment simple for individual investors. Name: Ethiopian Securities Exchange (ESX)
Description:
The Ethiopian Securities Exchange (ESX) is the first and sole organized securities exchange in Ethiopia. ESX is recognized as a self-regulatory organization (SRO) under the Capital Market's Proclamation, to be licensed by the ECMA. As a pioneer securities exchange and market organizer, ESX aims to play a critical role in the development and growth of the Ethiopian capital market.

Mission 
- To become a leading and innovative national and regional marketplace that contributes to the economic development of Ethiopia by promoting savings and the efficient aggregation of capital for long-term investment.
- To provide a modern, reliable, transparent, and efficient environment for securities trading in Ethiopia, through adaptation of modern exchange business operations, skill, technology, and trust.

Name: LankaBangla Securities PLC.
Description:
LankaBangla Securities PLC. stands as Bangladesh’s leading and most trusted stock brokerage, distinguished by its commitment to innovation, integrity, and performance within the capital market. We empower a diverse clientele, including individuals, institutions, and foreign investors, by providing cutting-edge digital solutions, research-driven insights, and client-centric services designed to facilitate the achievement of their financial aspirations.

Pioneering Excellence and Service

Established in 1997, LankaBangla Securities has built a profound legacy of trust, consistently demonstrating market leadership by being ranked the top broker for 16 years on both the Dhaka Stock Exchange (DSE) and Chittagong Stock Exchange (CSE). Our comprehensive suite of investment services ensures complete market access and sophisticated portfolio management. These offerings include streamlined online BO Account opening, real-time trading capabilities on both exchanges, advanced margin trading, facilitation of Mutual Fund investments, access to G-Sec Bonds, and customized research advisory.
Our award-winning proprietary digital ecosystem comprising iBroker, TradeXpress, and the LankaBangla Financial Portal, redefines market engagement. These platforms guarantee seamless access, real-time data integration, and complete client control over every investment transaction, bridging the gap between complexity and convenience.

Robust Infrastructure and Strategic Insight

The strength of LankaBangla Securities is underpinned by its robust operational foundation, notably its ISO 9001:2015 certification and a strategic nationwide presence encompassing 47 branches and digital booths. This robust infrastructure, coupled with our expert team of professionals, ensures operational excellence and a deep, responsive understanding of investors’ evolving requirements.

Name: Climate Disclosure Standards Board
Description: On 31st January 2022, the Climate Disclosure Standards Board (CDSB) was consolidated into the IFRS Foundation to support the work of the newly established International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB). While this site and its resources remain relevant for preparers looking to improve sustainability disclosure until such time as the ISSB issues its IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standards on such topics, no further work or guidance will be produced or published by CDSB. For further information please visit the IFRS website.

Name: Central Depository Company of Pakistan Limited
Description:
Central Depository Company is the infrastructure backbone and the Ultimate Custodian of the Pakistan Capital Market. Established as a securities depository, CDC is the sole entity handling the electronic (paperless) settlement of transactions carried out at the Pakistan Stock Exchange. 

We are regulated by SECP and have offices in Karachi, Lahore and Islamabad. CDC is ISO/IEC 27001:2013 certified for Information Security Management and ISO/IEC 22301:2012 certified for its Business Continuity Management Program. It is also an Approved Employer by ACCA, ICAP, ICAEW and CIMA.

CDC is a member of Asia-Pacific Central Securities Depository Group (ACG), which is an international organization facilitating the exchange of information, promoting mutual assistance among member securities depositories and clearing organizations in the Asia Pacific region. 

Primarily, CDC’s function was to operate the Central Depository System (CDS) for all financial instruments traded in Pakistan Capital Market. However, with the ever growing need for efficient and technology driven mechanisms in other markets and industries, we have diversified our business beyond the traditional depository domain. Our services portfolio now includes Trustee and Custodial Services and Share Registrar Services.

Name: TOKERO Crypto Exchange

Within a few hours after account creation and paperwork upload, the client deposits money via bank transfer and can make his first trades. Simple and fast.

Name: AFME (Association for Financial Markets in Europe)
Description:
The Association for Financial Markets in Europe (AFME) is the voice of the leading banks in Europe’s financial markets, providing expertise across a broad range of regulatory and capital markets issues. We represent over 150 leading global and European banks and other significant market players. Our members play a vital role in Europe’s financial ecosystem, underwriting around 90% of European corporate and sovereign debt, and 85% of European listed equity capital issuances. Importantly, AFME members are market makers, providing liquidity, which is essential for ensuring financial markets can function efficiently. We also represent law firms and other associate members which advise market participants and support AFME’s legal and regulatory initiatives. 
 
Follow us here on LinkedIn to stay informed about our work shaping Europe’s capital markets.
 
Stay up to date with us on X (formerly Twitter): https://x.com/AFME_EU

The Company has also been privileged to serve on the Council of The Nigerian Stock Exchange where it made valuable and substantial contributions.

Essentially, our operational philosophy is founded on the need to render efficient and quality services that will not only ensure that we guarantee our clients maximum satisfaction, but also achieve and sustain a mutually beneficial and enduring relationship with them.

Name: Bentley Investment Group
Description: The Bentley Investment Group (BIG) is a student organization that is responsible for managing a portion of Bentley University's endowment. The fund originated in 1997, with an original allocation of $250K and has grown to more than $2.5M AUM under the group's financial decisions. Today BIG is one of the largest Student Managed Investment Funds (SMIF) in the nation by membership size with over 1,600 registered members on Campus Groups and more than 60 analysts and portfolio managers. The group’s goals are to achieve capital appreciation of the portfolio, while providing an educational experience to members. BIG seeks to run as a long-only equity fund focusing on investment exposure to intermediate and large capitalization companies allocated across seven industries. Using an active fundamental investment approach, BIG adds value to the investment process by making weighted decisions in sectors and individual securities.

- Financial services, Providing a virtual currency service of the Estonian Financial Intelligence Unit

Name: Invest Ahead

Name: TOV Corretora
Description:
A TOV foi fundada em 1994 e tem como objetivo oferecer o mais completo serviço de intermediação e assessoria nas áreas de Câmbio, Mercado de Capitais, Seguros e Viagens.

Veja como a TOV Corretora se desenvolveu nos últimos 20 anos.

1994
É criada a TOV Corretora com o objetivo de oferecer o mais completo serviço de assessoria nas áreas de câmbio, comércio exterior e operações especiais financeiras a ele ligadas.

2000
Já reconhecida no mercado como uma das maiores corretoras de câmbio do país, programou estratégias para operar em outras áreas do mercado de capitais, e após as aprovações necessárias, alterou sua razão social para TOV Corretora de Câmbio, Títulos e Valores Mobiliários Ltda.

2001
Aprovada pelo Conselho de Administração da Bolsa de Valores de São Paulo, inicia suas atividades como Corretora Membro de atuação regional.*

2002
Torna-se Corretora Membro BOVESPA de âmbito nacional.

2008
Fortalece suas operações de negociações eletrônicas por meio de implantação de seu Home Broker, com foco em operações de varejo. Com tecnologia e inovação, consegue oferecer o menor preço de mercado por ordem executada. 

2009
Obtém grande sucesso com o crescimento de seu Home Broker e inicia suas atividades como Agente de Compensação e Corretora de Mercadorias no segmento BM&F.

2010
Grande investimento em sua área de tecnologia, com a finalidade de aprimorar a qualidade do serviço, dando início à oferta de operações do segmento de Câmbio Turismo.

2011
Ano de grande expansão do Câmbio Turismo com a oferta de cartões em moedas estrangeiras e abertura de novas lojas TOV em nível nacional.

2012
A marca TOV foi expandida para o exterior, com a criação da empresa TOV Capital Markets*, brokerdealer sediado em Miami e aprovado pela FINRA.

2013
Começa a operar a TOV Viagens*, uma agência focada no bom atendimento e agilidade.

2014
A TOV comemora 20 anos de atuação no mercado.

Name: RSJ
Description:
RSJ operates on global exchanges in London, Chicago, New York, Frankfurt, and Tokyo. The company specializes in algorithmic trading, where both decision-making and trade execution are automated. 

Market making serves as RSJ's core trading strategy. This enables other participants to trade efficiently without actively seeking counterparties.

Headquartered in Prague, RSJ manages its global operations with a team of top experts who design, program, develop, and monitor advanced trading models. To maximize efficiency, RSJ leverages cutting-edge technological infrastructure, including colocated servers directly on exchanges.

Name: Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission (BSEC)
Description: The Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission (BSEC) was established on 8th June, 1993 as the regulator of the country’s capital market under the provision of Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission Act 1993. Name: Grupa KDPW
Description:
Krajowy Depozyt Papierów Wartościowych tworzy grupę kapitałową oferującą wysoko specjalistyczne usługi dla sektora finansowego, związane z depozytem zdematerializowanych instrumentów finansowych, rejestracją instrumentów finansowych, rozliczeniami i rozrachunkiem transakcji na wielu rynkach, realizacją świadczeń na rzecz posiadaczy papierów wartościowych, gromadzeniem i przechowywaniem danych. 

Grupę tworzą: Krajowy Depozyt Papierów Wartościowych (KDPW), pełniący rolę centralnego depozytu papierów wartościowych (CSD) oraz izba rozliczeniowa KDPW_CCP. 

Główne działania Grupy są zorientowane na rozwój organiczny i budowanie w oparciu o innowacyjne rozwiązania technologiczne, zintegrowanego portfela usług post-transakcyjnych oraz usług dodanych, tworzących kompleksową ofertę dla uczestników polskiego rynku finansowego. 

Krajowy Depozyt Papierów Wartościowych jest odpowiedzialny za prowadzenie rozrachunku transakcji zawieranych na rynku regulowanym oraz ASO (alternatywne systemy obrotu), jak również prowadzenie centralnego depozytu papierów wartościowych. Ponadto KDPW realizuje szereg usług dla emitentów, jak pośredniczenie w wypłacie dywidendy dla akcjonariuszy, asymilację, zamianę, konwersję i podział akcji, realizację prawa poboru. W ramach Krajowego Depozytu  funkcjonuje Repozytorium Transakcji – KDPWTR o raz Agencja Numerująca nadająca kody ISIN, FISN, CFI oraz LEI.

KDPW_CCP pełni funkcje izby rozliczeniowej w oparciu o funkcję centralnego kontrpartnera, której zadaniem jest rozliczanie transakcji na rynku regulowanym oraz w alternatywnym systemie obrotu, a także prowadzenie systemu zabezpieczenia płynności rozliczeń. Izba KDPW_CCP posiada europejską autoryzację dla rozliczeń w PLN oraz EUR i prowadzi rozliczenia transakcji z zastosowaniem szeregu mechanizmów pozwalających na systemowe obniżenie ryzyka niewywiązania się stron ze zobowiązań wynikających z zawartych transakcji.

Currently, the Company has a total of 10 branches spread across West Bengal and one branch in Mumbai, Maharashtra. The Company also serves its clients through Business Associates mostly in West Bengal.

The bouquet of products and services includes Retail & Institutional Equities, Derivatives, Commodities, Currency, Bonds, Fixed Deposits, DEMAT & repository as well as distribution of mutual funds, etc. It offers technology driven value-added services to its clients viz. PSIP, Margin Financing, NCDs etc. The Company also provides mobile application PSMART which facilitates share trading and Mr. PIP which can be used for Mutual Fund distribution and has enabled facility of Digital Account Opening- a paperless onboarding facility of new clients.
PSL has launched easily accessible ‘One India One Telephone Number: 033 68135000

To drive trust, profitable growth, and pride of belonging, for delivering sustainable stakeholder value.

Name: Silvercross S.A. Casa de Valores
Description:
SILVERCROSS S.A. Casa de Valores SCCV es una compañía que busca brindar a sus clientes diversas oportunidades de inversión  y financiamiento en el mercado de valores ecuatoriano.

Para lograr ofrecer un servicio de calidad hemos venido trabajando arduamente día a día desde el año 1993 en donde fuimos fundados bajo la denominación Multivalores BG, siendo empresa subsidiaria del GRUPO FINANCIERO BANCO DE GUAYAQUIL S.A.En marzo de 2012, cambiamos nuestra  denominación a SILVERCROSS S.A. Casa de Valores SCCV.

En Abril del 2012 dando  cumplimiento a las disposiciones de la resolución de la Junta Bancaria y de la Ley de Control del Poder de Mercado, el Banco de Guayaquil procedió a realizar  la venta de la compañía a un equipo de funcionarios que formaban parte de la Casa de Valores.

Autorizada y regulada por la Superintendencia de Compañías, Valores y Seguros, SILVERCROSS S.A. Casa de Valores SCCV trabaja en el marco de la Ley del Mercado de Valores ecuatoriano y es miembro activo de las Bolsas de Valores de Guayaquil y Quito.

Name: UFMG Finance Club
Description:
O UFMG Finance Club é a Liga de Mercado Financeiro da UFMG. 

A nossa proposta é potencializar ao máximo o capital de carreira dos membros, desenvolvendo o seu conhecimento técnico e proporcionando uma experiência de mercado financeiro mais próxima possível do mercado de trabalho.

Desdobramos tudo isso através de reuniões semanais com estudos dirigidos de tópicos relacionados ao mercado financeiro, como hedge funding, investment banking, asset e private wealth management, entre muitas outras vertentes deste vasto espectro financeiro.

Além das reuniões semanais, coordenamos diversos eventos e palestras relacionados ao tema, sempre buscando trazer profissionais reconhecidos de instituições financeiras relevantes e de grandes players do mercado para compartilharem conosco o seu cotidiano e as suas experiências, além de viabilizar parcerias com essas instituições, por meio de visitas programadas e direcionamento de processos seletivos.

Também estabelecemos parcerias com instituições de ensino responsáveis pela realização de cursos que envolvam habilidades importantes para atuar no mercado financeiro, como por exemplo o domínio de Excel, VBA, valuation, dentre outras skills necessárias para ingressar no mercado financeiro.

Por fim, tutoramos e aceleramos o processo de obtenção de certificações financeiras (CEA, CFA...) por parte dos membros, facilitando a obtenção destas e encurtando a curva de aprendizado e de crescimento do indivíduo interessado em construir uma carreira de sucesso no mercado financeiro.

Archr provides superior execution through the vast, pooled experience of the team alongside the very best trading technology. Our network, flow and technical analysis identifies market trends and positioning intelligence.

This translates into relevant market commentary and bespoke high-conviction trade ideas.

Timely and accurate.

Name: NH Korindo Sekuritas Indonesia

In 2008, we established NH Korindo Sekuritas Indonesia as a joint venture company with Korindo group in Indonesia. Since then, we are contributing to the development of the Indonesian capital market through providing optimal services and dedication to our clients as a financial platform.

NHFG is establishing a global network and expanding its business area to the United States, Europe, China, and Southeast Asia.

NH Investment & Securities (NHIS), our parent company, is Korea’s top securities company and has shown the best competitiveness in all areas of investment bank such as Corporate finance, Wealth Management, PBS, Trading, Research and so on. As of 2020, we have continued to grow as a leading securities company in Indonesia, building business lineup of stock brokerage, bond brokerage, corporate finance, and research. We will never stop harnessing ourselves to become a comprehensive financial service platform for client’s success and prosperity.

Name: Worthwhile Capital Partners
Description: Worthwhile Capital Partners is an independent placement agent focusing on capital raising for investment strategies that meet strict sustainability and return targets. We support fundraising across sectors such as natural climate solutions, climate change mitigation and the sustainable use of water and marine sources. Our team has a diverse background of experiences across strategic asset allocation, risk management, portfolio construction and strategy implementation. At our core, we believe in the transformational power that connecting long-term capital with sustainable investment opportunities can bring to every aspect of our planet, society and economy. To us, our work is our mission.

Name: DSE
Description:
Delhi Stock Exchange is located in the heartland of the Indian economy and surrounded by the most promising states of India which are predominated by large number of Small and Medium Enterprises. Delhi Stock Exchange, one of the oldest stock exchanges in the country was born in the same year India got independence i.e. 1947. Since then it has played a key role in the development of the economy, facilitating investments in different sectors, new services and thereby creating Equity cult in India.

DSE has long cherished history of market integrity, expert domain and market knowledge and has been in the limelight for more than five decade of its existence. Despite competitive challenges, the Delhi Stock Exchange has continued to grow and has played an active part in country’s economy.

With the structural changes happening in the Indian capital market, all the regional Stock Exchanges including DSE had to face a turbulent period. The lofty vision of the board, the ever enthusiastic members and never say die sprit of DSE staff, converted this challenge into an opportunity and paved way to a successful demutualization process.

DSE is now poised to revive its trading operations and would be in focus with the commitment to serve the nation with its Online Trading Platform equipped with the latest technology and expert market domains

Name: NCPA Capital
Description:
NCPA is a privately owned investment powerhouse, dedicated to using our own capital to fuel growth and innovation. Our journey began with modest, self-earned funds, which we meticulously invested to transform NCPA Capital into the dynamic entity it is today. Over the years, we have founded our own companies and strategically supported exceptional entrepreneurs, ensuring their businesses reach their full potential. By providing not just financial backing but also guidance and resources, we have helped shape numerous successful companies. 

We are NCPA Capital and we build the companies of tomorrow.

Name: Securis Investment Partners LLP
Description:
We are happy to announce that Securis Investment Partners and Twelve Capital join forces! As we merge our expertise and resources, we are creating one of the largest independent insurance and Insurance-Linked Securities (ILS) investment managers globally.

To stay updated on market insights, firm updates, and thought leadership, we invite you to follow our new official page: Twelve Securis.

Founded in 2005, Securis Investment Partners LLP is one of the leading Insurance Linked Securities (ILS) managers globally. Securis' overall goal is to deliver capital appreciation, low volatility and low correlation to traditional asset classes by investing in both Life and Non-life ILS, including catastrophe bonds and private transactions. Basing its operations in the heart of London’s insurance district it benefits from being in close proximity to the insurance broking and underwriting communities and their service providers. With offices in Bermuda, Tokyo and Geneva the firm is ideally placed to access the broadest range of investment opportunities and gather intelligence relating to sector developments. The Firm is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority and manages assets through commingled funds (AIF and UCITS format) and dedicated mandates on behalf of a wide range of investors.

Name: Decisive Dividend Corporation
Description:
Decisive Dividend is an acquisition-oriented company, focused on opportunities in manufacturing. 

Our purpose is to be the sought-out choice for exiting legacy-minded business owners, while supporting the long-term success of the business acquired. Through that, we create sustainable and growing shareholder returns.

What We Do

Buy - We use a disciplined acquisition strategy to identify profitable, well-established, high quality manufacturing companies. We look for a sustainable competitive advantage, steady cash flows, growth potential and established, strong leadership with enterprise values up to $25 million.

Build -  We support the long-term success of the businesses acquired, with resources to help them achieve their potential. We recognize that those running the business know it better than we do.

Hold -    We support the long-term success of the businesses acquired, with resources to help them achieve their potential. We recognize that those running the business know it better than we do.

Why Decisive Dividend

Vendors -  Exit opportunity. Continuation of business legacy. Opportunity to cash out. Participate in future Decisive Dividend growth.

Employees - Business as usual. Opportunity for equity ownership (ESPP). Capital to grow the business. Stability of long-term ownership.    

Shareholders -  Dividend strategy. Growing diversified portfolio of companies. Strong deal flow. Organic growth of existing companies. Synergistic opportunities with existing companies and future acquisitions. 

For more information, visit www.decisivedividend.com

Name: Value Base - ווליו בייס
Description:
Value Base provides a wide range of financial advisory services for private and public companies through a dedicated team of professionals with a vast experience in the financial sector and capital markets. 
The firm was founded in 2013 by Mr. Victor Shamrich and Mr. Ido Neuberger, two veterans of the Israeli Capital Market, after merging their previously-owned investment house of Dash-Apex with Meitav Dash to be the 2nd largest Israeli Investment House in Israel.

Value Base operates in the following segments:
M&A Advisory Services 
Advising private and public companies in the buy and sell side, involving in local and cross border transactions like mergers, acquisitions, take private transactions, MBOs etc.
Underwriting Services 
Providing underwriting and distribution services for private and public companies, including debt and equity fundraisings on the Israeli capital markets, private debt raising from local institutions etc.
Value Base is the 3rd largest underwriting and distribution services firm in Israel (in terms of number of transaction led in the first 9 months of 2017).

Representation of Global Asset Managers (GAR Capital)
Providing essential assistance to global fund managers seeking to raise money in the Israeli institutional market. The company currently provides promotion and fundraising services within the Hebrew speaking market for a group of global funds managers with total assets under management of more than $2.5 trillion. Since its foundation, GAR Capital has been instrumental in the successful penetration and promotion of some of the world’s largest asset managers into the Israeli Capital Market. 

Alternative Investment
Establishing  and managing alternative investments vehicles including a public Spanish REIT Fund, a Litigation financing Fund and Hedge Fund.

Equity Research
Providing  analyst coverage for public Israeli firms and business environments, as well as financial services including valuations, strategic financial planning, debt restructuring etc.

We are currently onboarding creditworthy suppliers and buyers with a focus on healthcare, infrastructure, and supply chain-heavy sectors.

agora was founded to bring the worlds of technology, regulation and capital markets together for the benefit of financial market participants.

With the agora platform, issuers, investment banks, custodians, CSDs, exchanges, investors, service providers and agents will be able to come together to create, trade and settle bonds.

Our network is a construction that grows every day, with relevant contacts worldwide, expanding the possibilities of matches for businesses within the network. Only the most qualified, visionary entrepreneurs, and influential businesses are accepted.

One of the main pains solved by the matchmaking system is the limitation of networking. Many rely solely on their own networking, which can be restrictive and limited. With German Business, you will expand your connections and no longer have this limitation.

In our matchmaking methodology at German Business, we prioritize quality over quantity. Unlike the traditional leads system, the access provided by matchmaking focuses on quality and relevance. By increasing the probability of generating business through relevant accesses, we stand out in the market as a unique and effective option to boost business growth.

Supporting ambitious strategies, our mission is to generate value through relevant accesses, unlocking the connection process in a simple and fluid manner. Our vision is to create an exclusive network where businesses benefiting from our matchmaking system stand out in the market.

Name: Amplegest
Description:
Créée en 2007, Amplegest est une société de gestion entrepreneuriale française, dont l’activité repose sur 2 métiers : Gestion Privée, Gestion d’actifs. Nos équipes de professionnels sont reconnus sur les marchés financiers et mettent en commun des compétences complémentaires. Amplegest se démarque par sa gamme étendue de produits financiers, comprenant la gestion actions avec 7 fonds, la gestion global macro avec 3 fonds. En complément, nous commercialisons la gamme des fonds obligataires value d'Octo AM. Cette collaboration stratégique nous permet de proposer à nos clients une gamme complète de solutions gérées par une équipe expérimentée et privilégiant une approche value. 

Engagée envers la responsabilité sociale et environnementale, Amplegest intègre des critères environnementaux, sociaux et de gouvernance (ESG) dans ses stratégies d'investissement. Cette approche reflète l'engagement de la société envers la durabilité et son désir de contribuer positivement à la société. Depuis plus de 10 ans, Amplegest manifeste un engagement fort en faveur d'une finance empreinte d'humanité. Depuis 2011 Amplegest consacre 1% de son chiffre d'affaires à des dons salariés et au mécénat financier. Chaque collaborateur consacre 1% de son temps de travail à des chantiers solidaires. En 2017, Amplegest a évolué vers le mécénat de compétences en allouant 1% du temps de travail annuel des collaborateurs. Ces trois piliers - don financier, don de temps en équipe et mécénat de compétences - témoignent de l'évolution continue et profonde de l'engagement philanthropique d'Amplegest, reflétant son désir de donner du sens à son travail, de se sentir utile, et surtout, de partager. 

Amplegest fait partie du Groupe Cyrus un acteur majeur du conseil en gestion privée, gestion de fortune et family office.

Name: Dhaka Stock Exchange PLC.
Description:

Dhaka Stock Exchange PLC. was established on 28 April 1954 as East Pakistan Stock Exchange Association Ltd. and its official trading started in 1956. Before having its name as Dhaka Stock Exchange PLC. on May 13, 1964, it was renamed as East Pakistan Stock Exchange PLC. on June 23, 1962. After the War of Independence resuming the transactions on August 16, 1976. Introducing the automated trading system on August 10, 1998. On January 24, 2004, converted shares into electronic form by the Central Depository System.
 
X-streamINET the matching engine and FlexTP the Order Management System (OMS) were developed and installed by Nasdaq and Flextrade respectively, the world-famous trading engine and OMS provider on December 11, 2014 for accommodating 2000 orders and 1000 transactions per second without any interruption.

DSE obtained the Membership of World Federation of Exchanges (WFE) on June 06, 2017, which uplifted the image of DSE. 

In compliance with the Exchanges Demutualization Act, 2013, Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) executed between Dhaka Stock Exchange PLC. (DSE) and the consortium of Shenzhen Stock Exchange (SZSE) and Shanghai Stock Exchange (SSE), the Strategic Investors of DSE on May 14, 2018. DSE Shares were transferred to the Strategic Investors on September 04, 2018. ISO 9001: 2008 was awarded to DSE by SGS Limited, an ISO certification body, on October 30, 2016. Also, SGS upgraded the standard to 9001:2015 for successful completion and proper maintenance of ISO 9001:2008

Since 2008, CrispIdea has been a leading provider of equity, sector research, and investment advisory, empowering businesses like private equity houses, hedge funds, corporates, and institutions to make informed decisions and achieve financial success. Based in Bangalore, India, we provide a combination of boutique environment with a global reach, catering to nearly 2,500 clients across the world.

We differentiate ourselves by offering early coverage of specialized and highly disruptive companies. Our sector analyst who specializes in their own verticals, leverage our trademarked methodology combining fundamental and technical analysis to deliver provocative insights on companies and trends shaping the market.

Our focus on addressing investors’ challenges and offering comprehensive solutions has earned us a strong 4-star rating based on recommendations and coverage in Refinitiv, FactSet, and S&P Global. Our Refinitiv and FactSet scorecards are promising, and our recommendations are often considered for consensus rating.

Name: Dansk Ejerkapital
Description:
Dansk Ejerkapital investerer i ejerledere i mindre og mellemstore danske virksomheder og bidrager med kapital og erfaring til vækst, generationsskifte og udvikling. Vi er en dedikeret minoritetsinvestor med fokus på værdiskabelse frem for kortsigtet afkast.

Siden 1994 – i mange år under navnet Industri Udvikling – har vi samarbejdet med ambitiøse ejerledere og investeret i over 160 virksomheder. Vi investerer i virksomheder med en omsætning mellem 75 og 500 mio. kr. og en skalérbar forretningsmodel.

Vi ønsker aldrig at have majoritet. Som minoritetsinvestor er vores rolle at støtte ejerlederen – ikke at styre forretningen. Vi skaber derimod værdi gennem aktiv sparring og stærk driftsforståelse.

Vores investeringer retter sig mod:
- Ejer- og generationsskifte (helt eller delvist, herunder MBO/MBI)
- Vækstinitiativer – både organisk og via opkøb
- Delkapitalisering for at frigøre midler til ejeren

Vi arbejder tæt sammen med ledelsen og prioriterer en uformel, tillidsbaseret og fleksibel samarbejdsform. Vores beslutningsveje er korte, og vi tilgår alle relationer med pragmatisme og respekt for virksomhedens kultur.

Vi er drevet af en ambition om at være den foretrukne kapitalpartner for ejerledere, der vil løfte deres virksomhed til næste niveau og fortsat bevare kontrollen.

  - Difundir y fomentar la implementación de buenas prácticas de gobierno corporativo.  
  - Generar un espacio organizado, permanente y pro activo de diálogo e interacción entre los agentes participantes en el mercado, incluyendo los organismos reguladores y supervisores.  
  - Contribuir al fortalecimiento institucional de los agentes participantes en el mercado de capitales. 

Misión:
Promover el crecimiento sostenido del mercado de capitales en el Perú impulsando su competitividad, asegurando la generación de valor y velando por la implementación de buenas prácticas. 

Visión:
Ser el gremio de mayor influencia, representatividad y efectividad en el mercado de capitales en el país.

Name: SLW Corretora de Valores e Câmbio
Description:
A SLW atua há mais de 45 anos no mercado financeiro. Em todo esse período, enfrentou as turbulências e instabilidades das economias brasileira e mundial, com competência, seriedade e um firme compromisso com resultados.

Nossos clientes apresentam os mais variados perfis, dos mais conservadores aos mais agressivos. Todos recebem um atendimento consultivo, próximo e diferenciado. Ao depositarem confiança em nosso trabalho, ganham segurança, agilidade, transparência e rentabilidade.

Quando se trata de investimento e rentabilidade, quesitos como confiabilidade e segurança são fundamentais.

Tradição e Solidez
Ao completar 45 anos, a SLW reafirma sua capacidade de superar as crises e obstáculos do mercado, mantendo-se em uma trajetória de crescimento.

Transparência
A SLW valoriza uma relação de confiança por meio de ferramentas que permitem total clareza em sua forma de trabalhar.

Atendimento
Tendo iniciado suas atividades como consultoria, a SLW mantém esta essência, que permeia seus trabalhos até hoje.

Modernidade
Com investimentos em tecnologia de ponta, a SLW disponibiliza a seus clientes e colaboradores modernas ferramentas utilizadas no mercado financeiro.

Participants in our organization include state and local government issuers, not-for-profit issuers, investment bankers, attorneys, financial advisors, rating agency analysts, bond insurers, and trust officers among others. The organization is governed by a 18-member Board of Directors.

Name: IR Professionals in Africa
Description:
The Global Reporting Initiative is a great standards-driven framework for this sort of corporate reporting. 

Reading the GRI G4 Reporting Guidelines, one is struck by several principles that GRI uses to define the content and reporting quality (from p. 18 of the Reporting Principles). Let’s take a look:

Comparability

This principle refers to the need to select and report information consistently so that stakeholders can analyze changes in the organization’s performance over time (comparing it to itself) and in comparison to other organizations.

Accurate

This principle refers to the need for the reported information to be accurate and detailed.

Timely

This one requires the organization to report regularly so that ‘information is available in time’.

Clear

The information presented in a report should be accessible and understandable.

Reliable

The information gathered in a report should be readily subject to examination and verification.

As a specialist in companies' visibility solutions in corporate communications, I was flabbergasted that "visibility" is not stated as a standard. 

It should be. 

Listed companies starting their sustainability and ESG reporting should not take these principles for granted. They are an excellent basis for implementing online investor relations communications initiatives or, indeed, SDG-driven strategy corporate communications initiatives.

Upon seeing these principles so crisply documented by the GRI, I realized that they should not be taken for granted. Generating corporate communications that adhere to these principles can be an onerous task. Visibility is the cherry on the cake - why go through the effort to prepare sustainability content and not ensure that it's seen and digested by stakeholders and investors?

Name: Windfall Capital

Windfall is a quantitative trading and investment firm specializing in digital assets. We develop algorithmic trading strategies using advanced mathematical and statistical techniques and trade on global crypto exchanges like Binance, OKX, and Deribit.

We leverage advanced research and cutting-edge infrastructure to create robust trading strategies and deliver exceptional returns. As one of the fastest-growing asset management firms in the digital assets space, we aim to become the largest in the world soon.

What sets Windfall apart from other quant trading firms is our fast-paced, startup-like culture. We encourage collaboration, rapid idea implementation, a flat hierarchy, and full ownership of work for our traders and researchers.

We offer market-competitive compensation and perks, including medical insurance, remote work options, team outings, and regular offsites.

Our approach to developing trading strategies is rooted in math fundamentals, and we promote young talent based solely on capability, regardless of designation or hierarchy.

We are always hiring exceptional individuals. If you believe you fit this description, please consider working with us and drop us a message.

Name: PinSec.Ai
Description:
PinSec.Ai is a technology-driven Quantitative Multi-Asset Investment Management Firm trading the financial markets. Our thesis, AI detects unique opportunities. Our self-learning AI algorithms find hidden, complex relationships in data of all types to make automatic trading decisions without the human factor.

We also believe that investing is a data science problem. This is why our approach blends the best of quantitative finance, AI and fundamental analysis—what we call a ‘Quantamental’ approach to the markets.

We use advanced quantitative models powered by machine learning algorithms to:

→ Analyze vast amounts of market data
→ Identify patterns
→ Generate trading signals across multiple asset classes.

Our expertise spans global financial markets, where we manage risk and drive returns in an increasingly complex and fast-paced environment.

What sets us apart?

→ Advanced Technology: Our state-of-the-art technology infrastructure allows us to process massive datasets in real time, execute trades with precision, and ensure robust risk management.

→ Quantitative Expertise: Our team of highly skilled mathematicians, quantitative researchers, and market experts combine technical rigor with market knowledge to generate alpha.

→ Risk Management: We employ sophisticated techniques to manage and mitigate risk, ensuring capital preservation.

At PinSec.Ai, we’re leading the future of finance—unlocking value and delivering superior returns for our investors. Join us as we continue to pioneer the intersection of AI, technology and quantitative finance.

Name: Indonesia Capital Market Student Studies (ICMSS)
Description:
Indonesia Capital Market Student Studies (ICMSS) is the biggest and the oldest international capital market event held by students in Indonesia, with the aim to become an international capital market learning centre for students around the globe. We are here to educate the public, especially students about capital market, stimulate people to invest in capital market and generate students as potential young investors, in order to develop capital market in their respective countries. We achieve our vision through our three agendas: Equity Research Conference, Capital Market Seminar, and Investment Training.

Our Equity Research Conference is an annual forum for students around the globe to discuss and present valuations of selected companies in their respective country. We select the best 24 teams (72 international delegates) based on their equity research report to present their presentation in front of judges and delegates. The top six teams will then proceed to the Grand Final Round to present their Final Equity Research Presentation.

Our Capital Market Seminar has been held for over a decade with more than 400 participants every year. Each session discusses capital market issues thoroughly and are presented by capital market experts and practitioners. 

Our Investment Training focuses on giving practical knowledge and fundamental basics of investing, trading, and the capital market as a whole. The sessions are directed by capital market experts with exclusively 200 participants.

Name: African Securities Exchanges Association
Description:

ASEA supports members in the establishment of Stock Exchanges and the development of financial instruments. Together with enhancing member exchanges’ joint programs, the association aims to harmonize standards for market principals in the region.

Name: Essex
Description:
Essex  is the preeminent commercial mortgage banking firm in the Rocky Mountain Region, specializing in commercial real estate debt and equity placement.  For over 35 years, Essex has helped its clients navigate the capital markets efficiently to identify the best capital source and structure to meet their needs.
As a loan correspondent for 25+ life insurance companies, including several exclusive relationships, Essex has access to non-recourse, low-interest rate capital that our competitors are unable to provide. While founded as a life insurance company correspondent, Essex has also cultivated long-term relationships with a wide variety of capital sources over the past three decades, including CMBS conduit lenders, debt and equity funds, national and regional banks, government agencies, credit tenant lease financiers, and other private capital sources. The depth of Essex’s lender menu allows us to deliver clients with custom-tailored financing solutions for each investment strategy. Since 2014, Essex has arranged over $5.6 billion in commercial real estate debt.
From our office Denver, Essex also services a 900 loan portfolio for over 50 institutional lenders that totals over $6.0 billion of secured capital.  We provide full cashiering services for 30 life insurance companies and select CMBS conduit lenders, allowing us to provide full, hands-on customer service through the life of a loan.  Our loan servicing includes collecting monthly payments, coordinating review and payment of taxes and insurance, conducting annual inspections and financial reviews, completing lease approvals and loan modifications, and administering leasing capital reserves.
Years of market knowledge, long-tenured lender relationships, real time experience, and innovative thinking allow Essex to deliver clients the optimal capital markets solutions they deserve.

The primary goal of the Centre is to create a large quantity of quality entrepreneurs in Africa. Towards this objective, it aims to seed a new ethos, wherein people will understand and encourage entrepreneurship as a preferred career option. Such enterprises will not only create rapid growth resulting into wealth generation for self and society, but also contribute to employment generation in Africa.

As part of our platform, companies may participate in the iCFO Capital Global Investment Conference, where vetted presenters showcase their business to an audience of business leaders, investment professionals, and ecosystem partners. These events provide industry exposure and educational insight into today’s private-capital landscape.

Our team also guides clients in understanding capital options — including equity, structured financing, venture/growth debt, and other non-dilutive strategies — by helping them evaluate what may be appropriate for their stage and objectives. We do not provide investment advice or broker-dealer services; instead, we focus on helping entrepreneurs prepare for productive and compliant conversations with potential funding sources.

Name: Verifort Capital
Description:

Das Unternehmen bietet mit seinem Team umfassende Kompetenz im Asset-, Property- und Construction-Management und bei der Entwicklung von Bestandsimmobilien. Es stellt diese Kompetenz institutionellen und semiprofessionellen Investoren sowie Bestandshaltern und -entwicklern als Dienstleistung zur Verfügung. Durch die regionalen Standorte in Berlin, Düsseldorf, Frankfurt (Oder), Hamburg, Monheim (am Rhein), Offenbach und dem Hauptsitz in Tübingen kennen die Teams vor Ort die einzelnen Fondsobjekte und die jeweiligen Märkte sehr genau – und können sich schnell und effizient um die ganze Wertschöpfungskette der Immobilien kümmern.

Diese Value-Add-Expertise macht Verifort Capital über unternehmenseigene Fonds auch Privatanlegern zugänglich. Mit seinen AIFs investiert das Unternehmen hauptsächlich in Gewerbeobjekte an B- und C-Standorten mit Wertsteigerungspotenzial, die es restrukturiert und mit einem Fokus auf energetische Sanierung optimiert, um sie anschließend gewinnbringend wieder auf den Markt zu bringen. Ergänzend dazu investiert Verifort Capital mit seinen Sozialimmobilien-Fonds langfristig in Pflege- und Betreuungseinrichtungen, mit dem Schwerpunkt auf Bestandshaltung und laufende Erträge.

Verifort Capital ist außerdem einer der ersten Asset- und Property-Manager in Deutschland, der nach DIN ISO 9001:2015 zertifiziert ist.

Name: The PRS REIT plc
Description:
The Investment Adviser (Sigma PRS Management Limited) is a wholly owned subsidiary of Sigma Capital Group plc (“Sigma”), one of the leading providers of private rented family homes in England. 

The housing market is facing challenges on many fronts as recognised by the recent government white paper. Key amongst these are the twin issues of supply and cost, both creating a considerable barrier to entry for families and first time buyers alike, with the average deposit now payable by first time buyers representing 62%* of their annual salary. The private rented sector, which is the natural alternative for many of these would be buyers, is predominantly comprised of private, small scale ownerships providing stock of varying quality. The PRS REIT plc is creating a portfolio of newly constructed, professionally managed housing in popular, convenient locations at rents suitable for singles, couples and families.

The Company aims to provide investors with an attractive level of income together with the prospect of income and capital growth through investment in a portfolio of newly constructed private rented properties comprising mainly family homes, to be let on Assured Shorthold Tenancies to qualifying tenants. The properties will be located across multiple sites in key cities and towns across England with a focus on the main conurbations, and largest employment centres, outside of London. The locations closely follow the main road and rail infrastructure, including the proposed HS2 and HS3 rail network.

*Source: DCLG

The company averages approximately 2,000 closed financing transactions annually.

Marcus & Millichap revolutionized the real estate brokerage industry. The firm was designed to go far beyond simply facilitating real estate transactions. It was developed as an entire system dedicated to maximizing value for real estate investors.

In 1971, founders George Marcus and William Millichap launched a new real estate investment business model based on a unique method of matching each property with the largest pool of pre-qualified investors. This simple premise, coupled with an unfailing drive to measure success by client satisfaction, enabled the company to emerge as the industry’s pre-eminent real estate investment services firm.

The founders’ vision has been realized by a commitment to specialization, the willingness to foster a culture of information sharing and the foresight to pioneer real estate technology. Today, Marcus & Millichap is the industry’s largest firm specializing in real estate investment sales, financing, loan sales as well as a leading source of research and advisory services.

Name: Wharton Private Equity & Venture Capital Alumni Association
Description:
Wharton Private Equity & Venture Capital Alumni Association (WPEVCAA) is an exclusive and growing network of alumni who are leaders in private equity and venture capital investing around the globe.  Founded in 1998, WPEVCAA represents the interests of those 4,000 Wharton and UPenn alumni.  Our mission is to provide members with unique opportunities to exchange ideas and knowledge in a peer-only setting, to learn from industry experts and leading researchers, to enhance Wharton’s standing in the private investor community, and to support the constructive engagement of alumni members with the school.

Sie hält Beteiligungen an großen österreichischen Industrieunternehmen sowie Minderheitsanteile an Technologie-Wachstumsunternehmen (Scale-ups) mit Industriefokus. Die B&C unterstützt die Unternehmen bei ihrem Ziel der Werterhaltung und Wertsteigerung. Dabei sieht die B&C Nachhaltigkeit als wesentlichen Faktor für die Weiterentwicklung ihres Beteiligungsportfolios sowie zur Lösung wichtiger ökologischer und gesellschaftlicher Herausforderungen.

Die B&C Privatstiftung fördert den Wirtschafts- und Unternehmensstandort Österreich durch zahlreiche Projekte und Initiativen, die zur Stärkung des Wirtschaftsstandortes Österreich beitragen.
