Name: The Cape Town Stock Exchange
Description:
We’re aimed at growth companies looking to build up both the South African and broader African economies. We’re also only one of two exchanges in the country with a licence to list both equity and debt. We’re proudly located in Cape Town because it’s a global city that, much like our business, is all about growth, technological development, and innovation.

At the CTSE we’re focused on giving a diverse range of companies access to capital and investors. So, whether yours is a decades-old family business that wanted to expand or a dynamic start-up in need of liquidity, we’re the stock exchange for you. Whether you’re based in Centurion, Cornubia, Constantia or, even Cairo, we want you to think of listing on the CTSE as the next step in your success. 

We understand that ordinarily the fee structures and governance requirements of a traditional stock exchange have prevented many SMEs and mid-cap businesses from considering a market listening as an avenue for raising capital. Plus, those big, lumbering institutions of old can be really intimidating and impersonal. We are focused on saving you in time, cost, risk and complexity. 

And, we want all South Africans to think differently about capital raising on stock exchanges. This is why we’ve changed up the system to make them more inclusive. 

The Cape Town Stock Exchange was originally launched as 4AX in 2016, and formally commenced operations on 1 March 2017. We relaunched to become The Cape Town Stock Exchange in September 2021. 

Our head office is in Cape Town but we have a presence in Johannesburg and work with businesses all over Southern Africa. All group entities are 58.38% black-owned, qualify as Exempted Micro Enterprises and are Level 2 B-BBEE Contributors with 125% B-BBEE procurement recognition.

Description:
Supergrads is a bespoke recruitment firm that provides clients in the Trading, Commodity, Energy, and Utility Industries with exceptional, well-educated STEM candidates from juniors up to CxO level. Supergrads’ mission is to deliver best-in-class recruitment. In today’s modern world, clients face obscure challenges when looking for the ideal candidate. Supergrads overcomes these challenges by delivering the best and nothing but the best in the candidate selection for clients. 

Supergrads was founded in 2021 by Rogier Elsenburg. As a former derivatives trader, he started in Executive Search and Recruitment for Huxley in 2003, earning his stripes in the European Banking & Financial Markets space and progressing to the SThree Benelux & France board. He was responsible for the opening and growth of the Huxley Frankfurt & Paris offices whilst simultaneously founding and managing the local Amsterdam Banking and Financial Markets teams.

His expertise in various, international recruitment domains is visible in the over 550 successful placements of Software Engineers, Quants, Traders, Risk Managers, and other STEM-educated professionals into the Commodity, Energy, Utilities, and Trading Industry under his supervision.
In his 20 years of experience, he accomplished many Search, and Interim assignments alongside multiple executive-level placements and has been managing a group of 250+ Interim IT & Finance professionals. As the successes show, Elsenburg has an extensive network in the Global Financial hubs and is able to deliver five legged sheep.

After leaving the SThree group, he successfully co-founded LIFT International, a specialist FinTech, Banking Technology, and Quantitative Finance staffing solutions firm, in October 2017. After four successful years, LIFT International was acquired in March 2021, allowing him to start a new project he feels deeply passionate about: Supergrads.

Name: Duart Mull
Description:
Headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, Duart Mull is an investor with a unique approach and a clear vision for building business success. We put capital to work by mobilizing our own funds or teaming with strategic co-investors to partner with private businesses, giving entrepreneurs and founders access to the capital and management expertise they need to drive dynamic growth. 

We’re driven by an entrepreneurial spirit – with heritage born from generations of business creators and innovators – that inspires and fuels all that we do. We’re endlessly creative, exploring opportunities in growing businesses that no one else sees, while earning trust and confidence to forge powerful partnerships. 

We’re detail oriented, immersing ourselves in each operation, working shoulder-to-shoulder with owners and operators who have tremendous sweat equity (and real equity) in the companies they’ve built.

We’ve been there. We understand that business involves risks, and great business people have to constantly push limits, challenge conventions, and dream big. Sometimes, they even make mistakes But the best of the breed turn each lesson learned into a new opportunity for transformation.

We have little patience for the kinds of “standard operating procedures” or management styles that impede growth. Instead, we believe that adaptability, best practices, and hard-earned experience, paired with our capital,are the best springboards for real transformation. 

We make the connections and tap the capital resources needed to fuel change, helping organizations evolve and define a lasting legacy of success.

Our passion is the thrill of solving, streamlining, strategizing, and, above all, fueling success for all of our partners.

Let’s put our capital, expertise, connections, and passion to work.

Name: Crowdfunding Professional Association

CDEV brings a commercial discipline to the evaluation, management, and divestiture of assets as well as other initiatives it executes in partnership with the Government of Canada and provides a unique and valuable perspective with deep financial expertise to the country’s most complex and diverse commercial transactions. 

----

La Corporation de développement des investissements du Canada (CDEV) est une société d’État fédérale autonome qui est devenue l’entité de choix pour les opérations financières critiques nécessaires pour aider le gouvernement fédéral à atteindre ses objectifs et à maximiser la valeur de ses actifs d’entreprise. La CDEV apporte une discipline commerciale au processus d’évaluation, de gestion et de dessaisissement d’actifs, ainsi qu’à d’autres initiatives qu’elle met en œuvre en partenariat avec le gouvernement du Canada et fournit une perspective unique et précieuse, doublée d’une expertise financière approfondie concernant les intérêts commerciaux les plus complexes et les plus diversifiés du pays.

Name: Bangladesh Institute of Capital Market
Description:
Bangladesh Institute of Capital Market (BICM) is the national institution for imparting capital market education, training, and conduct international standard research and publications in the relevant fields. The Institute is an entity of the Financial Institutions Division, Ministry of Finance, Government of the People's Republic of Bangladesh. BICM is an affiliated institute of the University of Dhaka and offers the first and only specialized master's program on applied finance and capital market.

BICM is located at the heart of Capital City Dhaka in the vicinity of Financial District of Motijheel, and adjacent to the Metro Rail Station, Bangladesh Secretariat Stoppage.

BICM aims to equip the stakeholders of the nation’s capital market with updated knowledge about the capital market through a number of delivery outlets viz. Investor’s Education Program, training on specialized topics like Technical Analysis, Equity Valuation, Portfolio Management, Securities Laws, Commodities Trading, Financial Derivatives, Mutual Funds, etc., a one-year Post-Graduate Diploma in Capital Market (PGDCM), and the 2-year Master of Applied Finance and Capital Market (MAFCM), which is one of its kind.

BICM has a dedicated pool of qualified faculty members, some with terminal degrees from reputed institutes abroad. The institute has a rich library with 12,000+ original titles on finance, accounting, economics, business law, mathematics, statistics, IT etc.

BICM engages in academic as well as policy research to impact the growth and trigger policy directions towards the development of the nation’s capital market. The Journal of Financial Markets and Governance (JFMG) is a double-blind peer-reviewed journal published half-yearly by the institute. The monthly ‘Financial Market Review’ focuses on the current economic trends, the financial market, and insights into contemporary issues.

BICM strives to become a regional center of excellence for capital market education, and research.

Founding Members: the Bucharest Stock Exchange, ALRO, Franklin Templeton Management – Suc. Bucharest, Electromagnetica, Hidroelectrica, Nuclearelectrica, TeraPlast, Transelectrica, Daniela Șerban, Cosmin Răduță and Tony Romani.  

The community has tripled in the first 3 years since its creation, currently bringing together almost 40 companies. 

Associate Members: Electrica, OMV Petrom, Antibiotice, Purcari, Idea Bank, BRK Financial Group, Banca Transilvania, Transgaz, MedLife, Romcarbon, Farmaceutica REMEDIA, Autonom, IMPACT Developer & Contractor, One United Properties, Transport Trade Services, Patria Bank, Connections Consult, BRD – Groupe Société Générale, Rompetrol, Agista, Mecanică Fină and AQUILA. 

Affiliate Members: Innova Project Consulting, ENVISIA, RTPR, Mazars, Marsh Insurance – Reasurance Broker and Dentons. 

New members - listed or to be listed companies, as well as IR specialists - are invited to join ARIR.  

The activity of the Association follows 5 key strategic directions having the following objectives: 

1.	Communication - Strengthening links with investor and analyst communities 

2.	Regulations - Monitoring the legislative framework and supporting members’ opinions 

3.	Recognition - Promoting companies that implement best practices 

4.	Presentation - Improvement of companies’ presentation 

5.	Build Capital Markets - Grow a professional community for listed and to-be listed companies.

Name: PT Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia (PEFINDO)
Description:
PT Pemeringkat Efek Indonesia or "PEFINDO" was established in Jakarta on December 21, 1993, through the initiative of BAPEPAM (the Capital Market's Supervisory Board), and Bank Indonesia (The Central Bank). On August 13, 1994, PEFINDO obtained its operating license (No. 39/PM-PI/1994) from BAPEPAM and remains one of the supporting institutions of the Indonesian Capital Market.

PEFINDO's main function is to provide objective, independent and credible ratings on the credit risk of corporate and debt securities through rating activities.

Apart from rating activities, PEFINDO continues to produce & publicize credit information relating to the debt capital markets. These publication products cover credit opinion on major companies that have issued bonds and its underlying sectors.

PEFINDO is a private limited liability company, and as of December 2015 owned by 86 domestic institutional shareholders, comprising of major pension funds, banks, insurers, Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) and securities companies.

To enhance the rating methodology & criteria as well as rating process, PEFINDO obtained ISO 9001:2015 certification for Corporate and Debt Instrument Rating Process and Publication. PEFINDO also actively participate in the Asian Credit Rating Agencies Association (ACRAA) since 2008.

PEFINDO established  a subsidiary company, PT PEFINDO Biro Kredit that operate the business as a Private Credit Bureau (PCB), an entity that collects and processes credit data and other relevant data to generate credit information.

Name: FirmFunding
Description:
Créée en 2016, FirmFunding est la 1ère plateforme digitale spécialisée dans le matching entre investisseurs professionnels (sociétés de gestion et family office) et Conseils haut de bilan, dans le cadre de placements privés (obligataires ou mix capital/obligataire) pour des PME/ETI. 

Elle offre une place de marché digitale qui accélère la rencontre entre ces Conseils haut de bilan (banques d’affaires, experts comptables, fonds de PE) mandatés pour rechercher des financements entre 1M€ et 15M€, et les investisseurs professionnels. 

FirmFunding permet ainsi aux PME d’utiliser le financement obligataire, en relais ou en complément de l’equity, dans leurs projets de croissance, transmission et financements d’actifs. 

FirmFunding est une place de marché institutionnelle qui offre :
-	un sourcing qualifié des dossiers de financements aux investisseurs professionnels enregistrés sur sa plateforme (sociétés de gestion et family offices)  
-	un accès “instantané” pour les Conseils à l’ensemble des investisseurs susceptibles d’être intéressés par le dossier de financement de leur client PME/ETI

Les projets d’investissements doivent comporter un volet de dette privée : obligataire sec, obligataire convertible, mix equity/dette obligataire.

FirmFunding, c’est aujourd’hui :
-	200 investisseurs sont enregistrés sur la plateforme dont 80 sociétés de gestion (108 comptes au total de chargés d’investissements).
-	100 Conseils haut de bilan enregistrés sur la plateforme, situés à Paris et en régions 
-	140m€ de financements ont été mis en ligne ces 12 derniers mois.
-	le ticket moyen de financement est de 5M€.

Our systems are designed to meet the demands of a rapidly evolving financial ecosystem while ensuring regulatory compliance under the EU DLT Pilot Regime.

Our solutions include:

Axiology Custody & Settlement

Secure custody and real-time settlement of digital securities – on-chain and fully compliant. Our DLT-native infrastructure eliminates post-trade delays, unlocks instant settlement, and bridges legacy and digital systems seamlessly.

Axiology Mini-Bonds for Crowdfunding

A fixed-income issuance tool for crowdfunding platforms and SMEs. Register tokenised mini-bonds, manage them efficiently, and deliver digital securities accounts for each investor from day one.

Axiology Broker

A neobrokerage solution for EMIs and other market participants. Enable tokenised investment services through your own interface — with integrated onboarding and regulatory compliance, no investment firm licence required.

Axiology Exchange

A regulated secondary market for tokenised fixed-income instruments. Connect institutional participants and broker networks in a transparent, liquid trading environment tailored for digital assets.

•	Search Investment Listings:  Search for investments using your criteria, including by industry, asset class, primary objectives, investor type or enter key words to find listings which may be of interest.

•	Attend Events:  Join likeminded investors at physical and virtual events and discover more about investment opportunities, the leaders behind them and gain market insights.

Register and experience what IM can offer you by visiting www.investmentmarkets.com.au.  Alternatively, you can contact us by email info@investmentmarkets.com.au or telephone +61 7 3220 3428.

Name: Australian Securitisation Forum
Description:
The ASF was formed in 1989 to promote the development of securitisation in Australia. It is the peak industry body representing participants in the securitisation market which include major banks, smaller Authorised Deposit-taking Institutions, non-bank issuers, fixed income investors and service providers to the sector. The ASF’s role in Australia mirrors that of the Structured Finance Industry Group and the Association for Financial Markets in Europe.

The ASF performs a pivotal role in promoting and representing the industry to government, regulators, the public, investors and others who have an interest or potential interest both in Australia and overseas, regarding the benefits of securitisation in Australia and aspects of the securitisation industry. 

The ASF offers a unique opportunity for its members to participate meaningfully, with a diverse range of professional colleagues and peers, in shaping the future of securitisation and enhancing its role as a vital sector of Australia’s capital markets.

Description:
Established in 1999, Market Wizards is a Dutch proprietary trading firm engaging in daytrading, market making, high-frequency trading and electronic execution. Market Wizards does not employ traders. Traders who fit into our team and profile are invited to become a partner in a partnership by means of a joint venture. In the partnership contract it is agreed that Market Wizards takes care of all trading facilities and organizational aspects, leaving the trader free to fully focus on trading. The partnership is flexible and can always be cut short. In practice, this form of collaboration results in an efficient and constructive relationship whereby among others, the traders can chart the company’s course. Our flat and informal corporate structure aids in this process.

Name: The Gulf Capital Market Association (GCMA)
Description:
The Gulf Capital Market Association (GCMA) is the premier financial industry association dedicated to strengthening the Gulf region's capital market.

Founded in 2010, GCMA harnesses the expertise and energy of its members to strengthen the capital markets needed to support economic growth and transformation of the Gulf region.

Member firms are industry-leading issuers, asset managers, banks, investors, ratings agencies, legal advisors and market infrastructure providers. We work with governments, central banks and regulators to strengthen markets.

GCMA’s committees, chapters and working  groups gather market leaders around key issues in Islamic Finance, Fintech, Public Debt, Regulation, Infrastructure Finance, Investor Relations, Structured Finance and Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) investing.

GCMA sets market practices, facilitates communication with the global investment community and raises awareness of capital markets.

We provide platforms for targeted discussions and host prominent speakers, creating opportunities for members to gain market intelligence and build critical relationships.

GCMA coordinates with global and regional financial institutions including the International Monetary Fund (IMF), World Bank Group (WBG), Islamic Development Bank (IsDB), Arab Monetary Fund (AMF) and the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD).

For further information: http://www.gulfcapitalmarket.org

Name: Profesionales de Bolsa
Description:
Historia
La compañía se fundó el 9 de Octubre de 1987, realizó su primera operación bursátil el 9 de Diciembre del mismo año. Durante los siguientes 3 años, la compañía concentró sus esfuerzos en una estrategia de penetración en el mercado que se tradujo en un crecimiento de sus activos los cuales ya alcanzaban $240.001.067, obtuvo comisiones por $30.841.448 promedio mensual y ocupó el segundo lugar entre las comisionistas . Ante los buenos resultados obtenidos por la sociedad, entendiendo el papel que empezaba a jugar dentro del mercado de valores , y fiel a su visión de convertirse en la primera compañía comisionista de Bolsa del país, la asamblea de la compañía aprobó la creación de la sucursal en la ciudad de Medellín e ingresó a la bolsa de esa ciudad en Abril de 1990, tras la búsqueda del mejoramiento continuo, en 1995 se iniciaron operaciones a través de los sistemas de SEBRA y DECEVAL, lo cual le permitió a la compañía responder a las necesidades de un mercado de capitales en evolución, brindando seguridad y agilidad a las operaciones, factores fundamentales para el desarrollo de sus actividades. En este año también se autorizó a la compañía para realizar operaciones por cuenta propia, permitiéndole así dar un gran paso en su propósito de contribuir con el desarrollo del mercado público de valores, imprimiendo liquidez y estabilidad así como servicios integrales de alta calidad.
Continua en www.profesionalesdebolsa.com

Description:
Iris Capital Investment is an independent provider of capital to publicly-listed companies. 

We bring tailor-made solutions to corporates that require dedicated equity-linked and equity financing  to meet their investment and development needs. We partner with managers and shareholders to provide the most efficient and flexible financing solutions over the long run. We master equity capital markets and extract the best of them to the benefit of the companies we invest in.

Iris Capital Investment relies on business analysis, credit profiling and trading technologies to offer the best tailor-made solutions.  We unlock value from equity capital markets to help our corporate partners achieve their financial goals and secure their funding requirements.

1. Business analysis and credit profiling
We believe in developing specific analysis tools that enable us to have an edge in understanding the business and credit profile of our issuers. We analyse multiple factors with discipline and focus and employ a wide range of approaches. 

2.Trading technologies
Over the last 10 years, we have developed market leading trading tools and algorithms to ensure that we capture the best of equity capital markets while minimising market impact. We have developed a global trading platform that can access all main stock exchanges in Europe, North America and Asia. Our trading platform  is based on decades of arbitrage and trading experience all over the globe and ensures world-class market execution

3. Tailor-made and flexible solutions
Each financing solution we provide is unique and based on in-depth dialogue with management and shareholders. We strive to deliver optimal and made-to-measure structures that meets issuers’ needs over the long term. Flexibility is a key component to our approach.

Name: FHLBanks Office of Finance
Description:
Located in Reston, Virginia, a suburb of Washington, D.C., the Office of Finance (OF) is operated on behalf of the 11 regional FHLBanks. Its primary function is to issue and service all debt securities for the FHLBanks, while obtaining the most cost-effective terms possible given current market conditions. Related activities include the compilation and publication of the combined financial statements, analysis and joint development of new funding opportunities, and educational outreach to inform investors and other interested parties about FHLBank debt products. These efforts can include investor road shows, sales conferences, adopting dealer/FHLBank recommendations, preparing brochures and educational materials, and enhancing the Office of Finance website.

The OF also provides the FHLBanks with credit and general capital market information/data, and manages the relationship with the credit rating agencies. In addition, the OF administers two tax-exempt government corporations, the Financing Corporation (FICO) and the Resolution Funding Corporation (REFCORP).

Name: The Securities and Exchange Commission of Sri Lanka
Description:
The establishment and constitution of the Securities and Exchange Commission of Sri Lanka was initially provided for by the Securities and Exchange Commission Act No. 36 of 1987 (as amended by Act No. 26 of 1991 and Act No. 18 of 2003). The Act has now been repealed and replaced by the Securities and Exchange Commission Act No. 19 of 2021. The vision of the SEC is “to become the benchmark regulator in South Asia for effective, efficient, and proactive capital market regulation”. The mission of the SEC is “to promote, develop and maintain a capital market that is fair, efficient, orderly and transparent”. 
The main objective and purpose of the Act is to establish the Securities and Exchange Commission of Sri Lanka; to create, maintain, and regulate a fair, orderly, efficient, and transparent securities market. While; protecting the interests of local and foreign investors; and ensuring the maintenance of high professional standards in the provision of services in relation to securities markets.

Billionaire Family Office: The only family office exclusively focused on $1B+ families and their co-investment, investment consulting, and formalization needs.

Family Office CIO Services: Leveraging our networks and expertise, we are currently helping a family with ~$1B in net worth hire a Chief Investment Officer (CIO). In addition to helping family offices in that capacity, we also have a short list of several highly experienced CIOs and independent CIO consulting firms that we can help you identify and engage when appropriate.

Co-Investment Deal Flow & Direct Investment Advisory: Many families, especially those with $300M to $1B+, have come to us for help in managing their direct investments. They have also come to us for assistance in accessing other families that may have proprietary deal flow or an interest in co-investing as well.

Investment Committee & Advisory Board Member Services: Whether you are starting your family office, passing the baton to the next generation, or just wanting to formalize things a bit more, we can help round out your investment committee and advisory board through direct participation. We can also help recruit additional members to the committee or board. Learn More…

Family Office Formation & Virtual Family Office Management: We can help you start a single family office or virtual family office that is custom-built to fit your needs and investment focus. We know the top attorneys and advisors to help get this done quickly and effectively. If you have a family office that is scattered in pieces between your foundation, CPA, estate planner, etc. you may want to consider formalizing your family office operations more and creating a centralized system to ensure that your goals are met and to guarantee that your advisors are speaking often and communicating well with each other. 

Learn more at http://BillionaireFamilyOffice.com or by calling (212) 729-5067.

Name: Rocktrade
Description:
Fundada em 2018, a Rocktrade é uma casa de análise independente focada em ajudar você na construção de patrimônio de forma consistente.

Com resultados comprovados por milhares de assinantes, somos referência em estratégias de investimentos no mercado de ações brasileiro e nossa missão é descomplicar a bolsa de valores através de relatórios simples e objetivos.

Mais do que fornecer recomendações de ações, nós guiamos nossos assinantes na formação e multiplicação do seu patrimônio, acelerando seu processo de conquista da liberdade financeira.

A Rocktrade se orgulha de impactar positivamente a vida de dezenas de milhares de brasileiros que buscam antecipar seus objetivos financeiros. Dizendo exatamente o que fazer: O que comprar, quando comprar, quanto dinheiro investir e quando é a hora exata de vender.

Faz parte do nosso valor transformar a Bolsa de Valores em um ambiente acessível a todos que querem maximizar seus sonhos.


Conheça nossas estratégias.

总资产增长38倍，2014年证券行业总资产增长率排名第3
净资产增长48倍，2015年上半年证券行业排名32位
净资本增长67倍; 注册资本增长25倍; 营业收入增长14倍; 净利润增长25倍

以证券为核心的跨界金融服务专家：

未来将依托现有业务板块深化创新，进行大金融领域产业链全面布局。

Name: NASD OTC Securities Exchange
Description:
NASD Plc is the promoter of an Alternative Trading Network that seeks to ease secondary market trading of all non-quoted securities in the West African region, thereby stimulating growth through more efficient capital raising processes.

NASD brings together Issuers, individual and institutional investors, accredited dealers, stockbrokers, banks, central clearing systems, private equity and venture capital firms and depositories with a view to increasing liquidity in the non-quoted segment of the long term funding market.

Through its Enterprise Portal (NASDeP), NASD eases the capital raising process for high growth companies. It encourages growth enterprises to release structured information about their performance operations and requirements to a select audience of venture capital, private equity and other accredited investors who are seeking investment opportunities.

Name: 兴业证券股份有限公司
Description:
兴业证券股份有限公司是中国证监会核准的全国性、综合类、创新型证券公司，成立于1991年10月29日。2010年10月，在上海证券交易所首次公开发行股票并上市（601377.SH）。公司注册地为福建省福州市，主要股东有福建省财政厅、福建省投资开发集团有限责任公司、上海申新（集团）有限公司、中国证券金融股份有限公司等。

兴业证券主要经营证券经纪、承销与保荐、投资咨询、证券自营、财务顾问、融资融券、基金与金融产品代销、基金托管、期货介绍等业务。在全国31个省、市、区共设有235个分支机构，其中分公司92家、证券营业部143家，控股兴证全球基金管理有限公司、兴证国际金融集团有限公司、兴证期货有限公司、兴证风险管理有限公司；全资拥有兴证证券资产管理有限公司、兴证创新资本管理有限公司、兴证投资管理有限公司；经营海峡股权交易中心（福建）有限公司；参股南方基金管理有限公司、中证信用增进股份有限公司、中证机构间报价系统股份有限公司、证通股份有限公司；设立兴业证券慈善基金会，专门从事慈善公益与扶贫活动。兴证国际金融集团有限公司于2019年1月在香港联交所主板上市（6058.HK），是兴业证券集团国际化和全球化发展的平台。

截止到2020年6月末，集团总资产近1700亿元，净资产超过380亿元，境内外员工近8400人，公司综合实力和核心业务位居行业前列，已发展成为涵盖证券、基金、期货、资产管理、股权投资、另类投资、风险管理、境外业务等专业领域的证券金融控股集团。

兴业证券自成立以来，始终坚持依法经营、稳健经营、文明经营。在中国特色社会主义进入新时代的新形势下，兴业证券提出了“建设一流证券金融集团”的战略目标，正朝着专业化、集团化、国际化方向奋力迈进。明确提出要把公司建设成为具有一流的资本实力，一流的风险管理能力，一流的竞争能力和盈利能力，一流的人才和优秀企业文化、科学的机制体制以及较强国际竞争力的一流证券金融集团。

Name: Intermoney Asset Backed Finance
Description:
Con más de 20 años de trayectoria, desde el grupo CIMD Intermoney hemos desarrollado capacidades sólidas y versátiles que nos permiten abordar un amplio abanico de operaciones en el ámbito de la financiación estructurada basada en activos.
 
A través de la coordinación entre Intermoney Titulización e Intermoney Capital Advisory, ofrecemos un servicio integral a empresas y entidades financieras: desde el asesoramiento y estructuración hasta la colocación y administración del vehículo. 
 
Desde el área de Intermoney Asset Backed Finance se pretende abordar no sólo el tradicional mercado de ABS (asset backed securities) cuyo exponente más claro es la titulización, sino otros mercados como son el de cédulas y bonos garantizados (covered bonds) así como el de cualquier otra financiación estructurada, especialmente si esta puede diseñarse con activos de respaldo: operaciones de warehousing de activos financieros, project finance, direct lending, entre otras.
 
Además contamos con capacidades avanzadas en servicios de agencia(de pagos, calculo, cash managing, listing, reporting...) y actuamos como asesor registrado en MARF, acompañando a nuestros clientes en todo el proceso de acceso a los mercados de capitales.

Name: HFP Capital Markets LLC
Description:
HFP Capital Markets LLC, headquartered in Manhattan, is a full service, boutique investment bank serving the needs of corporate, institutional and wealth management clients. HFP offers all the services typically found in a bulge bracket firm, but in a smaller, more accessible package for its clients. 

HFP’s range of services includes Investment Banking, Corporate Advisory, Institutional Sales & Trading, and Wealth Management. Whereas most banks operate these departments independent of one another, HFP takes a more team-oriented approach. All four of these divisions work together on a daily basis to provide its clients with a full suite of value added services. Our goal is to become the preeminent boutique investment bank catering to public and private companies alike.

Name: Alkemi Network
Description:
Alkemi Network is bridging CeFi to DeFi, building a decentralized liquidity network with a suite of tools and products that serve as onramps for everyone to participate in DeFi. 

The flagship protocol, Alkemi Earn (Earn) currently facilitates institution-grade borrowing and lending within a compliant environment via a primary ‘permissioned’ liquidity pool of digital assets (ETH, wBTC and stablecoins). Earn will also offer access to a secondary, ‘permissionless’ liquidity pool of digital assets at the network’s Token Generation Event, as part of Alkemi's mission to enable everyone to join the decentralized financial ecosystem.

Name: CAVALI
Description:
CAVALI es el Registro Central de Valores y Liquidaciones, una sociedad anónima encargada de la creación, mantenimiento y desarrollo de la infraestructura del mercado de valores nacional. 
Para ello, tiene los siguientes roles en el mercado:
- Institución de Compensación y Liquidación de valores (ICLV). CAVALI se encarga del registro, transferencia, custodia, compensación y liquidación de valores para las operaciones realizadas en la Bolsa de Valores de Lima (renta variable y renta fija corporativa) y Datos Técnicos S.A. (renta fija pública). Asimismo, inscribe las transferencias realizadas sobre los valores registrados en su registro contable.
 - Entidad Administradora del Sistema de Liquidación de Valores. CAVALI tiene la responsabilidad de administrar los sistemas de liquidación de valores en el país. Para ello, viene realizando una serie de actualizaciones a su estructura y reglamento.
- Agente de Retención. Por encargo del Estado peruano, CAVALI ha sido designada como agente de retención del impuesto a la renta a la ganancia de capital e intereses, provenientes de la venta de valores mobiliarios.

Name: VivCourt Trading
Description:
Vivienne Court Trading Pty Ltd (VivCourt) is a proprietary trading company headquartered in Sydney, Australia. Founded by Rob Keldoulis in 2011, VivCourt trades a diverse range of asset classes using its proprietary technologies, market-leading coverage and global connections. VivCourt operates across all trading styles including market making, quantitative trading and positional trading, with a focus on APAC markets. 

VivCourt is reimagining the purpose of a trading firm. Their mission is to create a people-first culture that allows people to be authentic and curious, ask questions, and work autonomously. Additionally, VivCourt is driving social change, challenging the finance industry with the company's socially conscious approach.

Rob Keldoulis, reflects on the company's origins “Trading can be a wonderful career, but there’s no function to it other than to make money. Doctors heal the sick and lawyers practise law, but a trader’s only job is to generate income over and over. After they make their money, a lot of traders have trouble finding meaning in the industry. I wanted to know if it was possible to take what is basically the most capitalist job in the world and create purpose out of it. Could trading become something that also helped make the world a better place?”

Since its inception in 2011, VivCourt has steadily grown and established itself as a pioneer in the financial world. Dedicated to maintaining its edge, VivCourt is in pursuit of top-tier traders and technologists, those with the right mix of skill and attitude, to delve into uncharted markets and set new benchmarks in the industry. A testament to our prowess, the Japan Exchange Group (JPX) has honoured VivCourt as the Best Market Maker in Outstanding ETF Market-Making Performance for three consecutive years.

Students interested in graduate/internship roles can sign up for our talent community here: https://boards.greenhouse.io/vivcourtevents/jobs/4401456006?gh_src=b83d83fc6us

Name: PSIK, the Polish Private Equity & Venture Capital Association
Description:
Polskie Stowarzyszenie Inwestorów Kapitałowych zrzesza fundusze private equity/venture capital (PE/VC) działające w Polsce. Celem Stowarzyszenia jest rozwój polskiego rynku private equity i venture capital. PSIK, the Polish Private Equity and Venture Capital Association represents private equity management firms operating in Poland. Its mission is to promote and develop the private equity and venture capital industry in Poland. Name: Capstone Securities Analysis Pvt Ltd
Description:
Capstone Securities Analysis Private Limited (CSA) is a financial services firm engaged in research and online trading of shares in US securities, particularly in the highly active NASDAQ, NYSE and Amex stocks. Since May 2005 traders at Capstone have been conducting research and trading: Capstone is a pioneer in providing intra-day trading and research services to its clients.

Name: Junomoneta Finsol Pvt. Ltd.
Description: Junomoneta is a proprietary stock trading company.

Name: Canadian Securities Administrators (CSA) - Autorités canadiennes en valeurs mobilières (ACVM)
Description:
Securities regulators from each of the provinces and territories in Canada form the Canadian Securities Administrators (CSA). The CSA protects Canadian investors from unfair, improper, or fraudulent practices and fosters fair and efficient capital markets.

The CSA is primarily responsible for developing a harmonized approach to securities regulation across the country. The CSA brings provincial and territorial securities regulators together to share ideas and work at designing policies and regulations that are consistent across the country and ensure the smooth operation of Canada's securities industry. By collaborating on rules, regulations and other programs, the CSA helps avoid duplication of work and streamlines the regulatory process for companies seeking to raise investment capital and others working in the investment industry.

Les autorités en valeurs mobilières des provinces et territoires du Canada sont regroupées au sein des Autorités canadiennes en valeurs mobilières (ACVM). Les ACVM protègent les investisseurs canadiens contre des pratiques déloyales ou frauduleuses, tout en favorisant l'équité et l'efficacité des marchés financiers.

La tâche première des ACVM consiste à instaurer un processus harmonisé de réglementation des valeurs mobilières dans l’ensemble du pays.

Les ACVM rassemblent les autorités provinciales et territoriales en valeurs mobilières pour échanger des idées et travailler à la conception de politiques et de règlements uniformes qui garantissent le bon fonctionnement du secteur canadien des valeurs mobilières. Collaborer à la création de règles, de règlements et d’autres programmes leur permet d’éviter le dédoublement des tâches et de simplifier le processus réglementaire tant pour les sociétés qui cherchent à réunir des capitaux que pour les autres intervenants du secteur.

Name: NAX Group

Description: IDLC Investments Limited is a full-fledged investment bank and a wholly owned subsidiary of IDLC Finance Ltd. It provides Investment Banking, Portfolio Management, Margin Loan and Research services.

For further information please visit our website.

Name: Lannebo
Description:
Att handla aktier kan verka lockande – idealet är att köpa billigt och sälja dyrt. Men detta är ofta ett nollsummespel: en vinst är någon annans förlust. På Lannebo, ett företag inom Öhman-gruppen, gör vi saker annorlunda. Vi investerar inte bara i aktier – vi investerar i företag. För oss innebär det att vara engagerade och långsiktiga ägare, som aktivt stöttar företagens tillväxt och utveckling. Genom detta tillvägagångssätt skapar vi hållbart värde för våra kunder och får deras sparande att växa.

Med över 120 års samlad erfarenhet från Öhman och Lannebo fortsätter vi att förvalta kapital med ett starkt fokus på långsiktighet. Lannebo grundades år 2000 av Anders Lannebo, medan Öhman har sina rötter så långt tillbaka som 1906, och tillsammans bildar vi nu Sveriges största fristående fondaktör. Genom denna sammanslagning förenar vi decennier av expertis och en gemensam vision om att erbjuda ett brett och hållbart sparande för alla.

Vi tror på fonder som ett smart sätt att spara. Med fonder får du enkelhet, riskspridning och möjlighet att regelbundet spara för framtiden. Vi brinner för att hjälpa våra kunder skapa trygghet, frihet och fler valmöjligheter genom ett strategiskt sparande.

Riskinformation
Historisk avkastning är ingen garanti för framtida avkastning. De pengar som placeras i en fond kan både öka och minska i värde och det är inte säkert att du får tillbaka hela det insatta kapitalet. Aktiefonders värde kan variera kraftigt beroende på deras sammansättning och de förvaltningsstrategier som används. Faktablad, informationsbroschyr och information om fondens avkastning över olika tidsperioder finns på lannebo.se. Ingen hänsyn till inflation har tagits.

Name: Iran Fara Bourse Securities Exchange
Description:
Iran Fara Bourse (IFB) is an Exchange located in Tehran receiving its license by the Securities and Exchange Organization (SEO) in 2008. IFB mission is to create an efficient market with priorities to transparency, liquidity and reliability to provide a place for financing diversified investment capabilities through securitization all types of assets and have an effective role in national economy.
IFB’ markets include First Market, Second Market, Third Market, Modern Financial Instruments Market and Base Market where started their transactions in 2009.
IFB is engaged in financing manufacturing and service companies by relaxing the process of listing.
The main purpose of IFB is to energize and strengthen the national economy through production by focusing on capital market.
The design and advancement of innovative financial instruments in the capital market business will lead to absorbing and directing savings of general public towards investing in the macroeconomic plans. We are proud to have a strong presence in the district of exchange business by focusing on emerging industries development.

Name: Climate United
Description:

Name: Institutional Investor Advisory Services (IiAS)
Description:

Our processes and benchmarks ensure a consistency of views. Our clear commentary and pragmatic advice contributes to responsible investing. We are trusted for our unbiased opinions.

Our Products: 

ADRIAN - http://iiasadrian.com/ - ADRIAN is a cloud based analytical tool that captures shareholder meetings, voting data and investor voting behaviour for over 1000 companies.

You can use the platform for recording your voting decisions, for compliance and regulatory filings, managing stewardship and engagements with companies and tracking corporate announcements.

LGF is made possible by the Inter-American Development Bank (IDB), the Latin American Association of Development Financing Institutions (ALIDE), the Danish Energy Agency, the International Climate Initiative (IKI) and the State for Economic Affairs SECO as a means for green financing initiatives in Latin America, the Caribbean and member countries.

Name: Alliance of M&A Advisors
Description:
The Alliance of Merger & Acquisition Advisors (AM&AA) is the Premiere International Organization serving the educational and transactional support needs of more than 1,100 independent middle market M&A professionals worldwide. 

“Connecting Leading Independent M&A Professionals to Build Relationships, Share Resources, and Create Value”

AM&AA members convene regularly for training and continuing education at the semi-annual conferences, CM&AA programs, and at our various AM&AA Chapter Events. 

The semi-annual Conferences cover a wide range of topics of interest to attendees, but most importantly, attendees gain the most benefit from the networking opportunities available to them and their middle market advisory colleagues.

AM&AA is the leader in providing an educational framework in mergers and acquisitions through their Certified Merger & Acquisition Advisor program. From the caliber of our instructors to the content of the curriculum, the CM&AA designation helps you to build on your existing skills. You will gain the necessary framework and network to further advance your professional and financial goals, as well as those of the clients being served.

AM&AA has various Chapters across the US where you can access and contribute to the knowledge base of your local market. The Chapters actively pursues the AM&AA's goals by providing a wide range of services for those working in M&A within the lower middle market. Chapters act as a local resource for networking, education, marketing, developing professional opportunities, and thought leadership.

Name: Alpha Inversiones

- Ritel Khusus

- Pertambangan & Energi

Untuk menjadi pelopor platform bisnis yang berkelanjutan berdasarkan empat pilar inti yaitu integritas, kualitas, profesionalisme dan kemanusiaan.

Misi

Untuk menciptakan, mengembangkan dan mempertahankan kelangsungan bisnis yang menciptakan peluang bagi generasi saat ini maupun generasi masa depan bangsa ini

Mission und Auftrag der ÖBAG

 Stärkung des Wirtschaftsstandortes Österreich
Unter Berücksichtigung der öffentlichen Interessen wirken wir an der Sicherung Österreichs als Wirtschafts- und Forschungsstandort mit. Dabei sichern und schaffen wir Arbeitsplätze und nehmen auf eine Werterhaltung und Wertsteigerung der Beteiligungsgesellschaften Bedacht.

 Sicherung der kritischen Infrastruktur Österreichs
Unsere Beteiligungen sind Eigentümer kritischer Infrastruktur und betreiben u.a. die Strom-, Gas- und Telekommunikationsnetze in Österreich. Die ÖBAG sorgt als langfristiger Investor für eine stabile Unternehmensführung und stellt sicher, dass notwendige und zukunftsweisende Investitionen in die Infrastruktur getätigt werden – für die Zukunftssicherung des Standorts Österreich.

  Value Creation
Wir stehen für einen klaren Fokus auf Wertsteigerung des uns anvertrauten Portfolios. Einerseits streben wir durch profitables Wachstum und Investitionen eine direkte Steigerung des (Börsen-)wertes unserer Unternehmen an. Andererseits leisten die jährlichen Dividenden der Unternehmen einen laufenden Beitrag zur Finanzierung Österreichs. Wir halten unsere Beteiligungen langfristig und ohne Veräußerungsabsichten und sehen uns als stabilen Partner für das Management und die Belegschaft unserer Unternehmen.

Alle Infos zu aktuellen Projekten und unserem Auftrag finden Sie hier auf LinkedIn sowie auf der offiziellen Website.

Name: WBAF Angel Investment Fund
Description:
An affiliated partner of the G20 Global Partnership for Financial Inclusion (GPFI), the World Business Angels Investment Forum (WBAF) aims to ease access to finance for businesses from startup to scaleup to exit, with the ultimate goal of generating economic development, jobs and more social justice worldwide.

To achieve this goal, WBAF is now, for the first time, raising its first own investment fund of USD 10M (the WBAF Angel Investment Fund), which will be an international co-investment platform to invest in the startups and scaleups of the Global Fundraising Stage (GFRS); it will incorporate a mix of private, public and non-profit sources for the benefit of startup ventures looking for smart finance.

• The ultimate goal is to create a high-quality portfolio with some of the world’s most promising startups and scaleups and, at the same time, create opportunities for co-investment and follow-on investments.

• Another goal is to connect the best startups with the best angel investors, making it possible for them to benefit from the know-how, mentorship and networks of qualified investors.

 

The WBAF Angel Investment Fund is designed to capitalise on the worldwide growth in entrepreneurial activity and venture financing for startups and scaleups and to benefit from WBAF’s extensive network of global investors, including angel investors, private equity funds, co-investment platforms, wealth management institutions, family offices, VCs and acceleration centres.

Name: Budapest Stock Exchange
Description:
The Budapest Stock Exchange Plc. (BSE) creates a platform for Hungarian companies to grow and prosper. Our mission includes providing small and medium-sized firms with expertise and financial support needed to join the stock exchange, as well as improving the financial culture in our society.

BSE has a considerable history: it was originally established in 1864 and re-established after the fall of communism in 1990. Today we are following our 2021-2025 strategy, which includes further increasing the role of the capital market in the Hungarian economy, promoting regional and industry cooperation, encouraging IT innovation and security, and taking steps in the future self-listing of BSE.

Our blue-chip companies represent well the Hungarian economy, with the total market capitalization of listed firms standing at approximately US $19.4 billion. We are set to further develop the capital market ecosystem where issuers are creating exciting opportunities for domestic and international investors, both retail and institutional.

In 2017, we introduced BÉT Xtend as a special market for medium-sized companies to join the exchange. Furthermore, BSE has a joint programme together with ELITE, a company of the Euronext Group, which gives mentorship to up and coming Hungarian companies to learn about the ways they can grow using diverse financing opportunities. Further BSE services for aspiring SMEs include BÉT50 for providing successful Hungarian companies visibility; BÉT Xmatch for facilitating private transactions; and recently, helping companies to ESG education and mentoring.

BSE is powered by Xetra, one of the fastest and most reliable trading systems in the world.

Description:
Se, hoje, a Canex Exportação LTDA é reconhecida no mercado nacional e internacional como uma facilitadora de bons negócios é porque temos uma base sólida de credibilidade que foi construída desde 1.959, com a tradição da família Soares na comercialização de gêneros alimentícios e produtos derivados da cana de açúcar pelo Sr. Roldão na cidade de Piumhi (MG).

Foi por meio deste talento para vendas e realização de negócios que a família Soares foi se especializando no mercado de açúcar e etanol, adquirindo expertise para construir a relevância que possui atualmente nos setores sucroalcooleiro e bioenergético.

Tal trajetória é a base que nos dá confiança e credibilidade para realização de negócios dentro e fora do Brasil, atuando como um facilitador na busca de soluções para os mais diversos players envolvidos na produção agrícola, com a marca da agilidade e eficiência, fator essencial num mercado tão dinâmico e volátil.

Por isso, é que a Canex tem o orgulho de ser uma especialista em fazer bons negócios envolvendo os principais parceiros do mercado, buscando soluções na compra e venda de açúcar e etanol dentro e fora do Brasil, de maneira única e eficaz.

Name: CMTA
Description:
An independent association formed by leading actors from the financial, technological, and legal sectors to create common standards around issuing, distributing and trading securities in the form of tokens using the distributed ledger technology. 

Established by Lenz & Staehelin, Swissquote Bank Ltd, and Temenos AG, the CMTA is a not-for-profit, non-governmental association, capable of assuming an independent role as standard-setter for the use of blockchain technology in capital markets. 

Blockchain technology makes it possible to simplify the processes through which companies issue securities to raise capital and to lower the barrier of entry to capital markets. 

By defining a set of industry-supported, open standards, the CMTA aims to facilitate access to funding for businesses, ultimately contributing to value creation throughout the economy.

The CMTA is an association organized under Swiss law with its registered office in Geneva and registered in the Commercial registry of the canton of Geneva under registration number CHE-408.722.286.

Name: Izba Zarządzających Funduszami i Aktywami
Description: Izba Zarządzających Funduszami i Aktywami powołana została do życia 28 października 2004 roku, na podstawie przepisów ustawy o funduszach inwestycyjnych, przejmując dorobek Stowarzyszenia Towarzystw Funduszy Inwestycyjnych w Polsce, który z biegiem czasu jest kontynuowany i dynamicznie rozwijany. Należą do niej największe i najważniejsze towarzystwa zarządzające funduszami inwestycyjnymi w kraju, najlepsze marki polskie i zagraniczne. Do statutowych celów Izby należy reprezentowanie środowiska zarządzających funduszami i aktywami, w tym towarzystw funduszy inwestycyjnych oraz podmiotów prowadzących działalność wyłącznie w zakresie doradztwa inwestycyjnego albo zarządzania portfelami w skład których wchodzi jeden lub większa liczba instrumentów finansowych. Cele te realizowane są poprzez wspieranie ich rozwoju, upowszechnianie wiedzy o zarządzających aktywami, rozwijanie i doskonalenie zasad etyki zawodowej specjalistów w tej dziedzinie. Izba Zarządzających Funduszami i Aktywami bierze czynny udział w procesie legislacyjnym projektów aktów prawnych dotyczących rynku kapitałowego, występuje o interpretację przepisów, których interpretacja budzi wątpliwości, wypracowuje i zgłasza propozycje nowego brzmienia przepisów niekorzystnie wpływających na rozwój i działanie na rynku, pracuje nad środowiskowymi standardami postępowania, prowadzi działania w zakresie gromadzenia i przekazywania informacji o rynku oraz działania związane z edukacją społeczeństwa w zakresie inwestowania. Izba prowadzi również szkolenia specjalistyczne, organizuje konferencje branżowe oraz inne wydarzenia integrujące środowisko zarządzających aktywami.

Name: Yamauchi-No.10 Family Office
Description:
挑戦と、生きていく。
私たちは、もっと自由に挑戦できる未来を叶えるため、
投資をはじめとするさまざまなアクションを実行していく。
この国は、独創性とチャレンジ精神を原動力に世界と渡り合ってきた。
しかし近年、その魅力を失いかけているように見える。
失敗を恐れては、革新は望めない。
安定を求めては、停滞しか生まれない。
任天堂中興の祖、山内溥の意志を受け継ぎ、
日本がもう一度、挑戦に満ちた国へと生まれ変わるために。
先見性とユーザー目線の思考を持ちながら、私たちは社会に貢献し続ける。

Dream. Leap. Live.
Japan was once globally renowned for its peopleʼs quality of unique creativity
teamed with a pioneering mindset. Their innovation and inventions changed
the world.
But that golden era has long been gone. It seems that the quality Japanese
people once possessed is overshadowed by worry and fear.
Hiroshi Yamauchi was the third president of Nintendo Co., Ltd. He was one of
those people who possessed truly unique creativity and a pioneering mindset,
along with foresight and the understanding of what users wanted. He took
over his grandfatherʼs struggling playing cards production business and
single-handedly transformed it into the global entertainment and play giant
that Nintendo is today. And he kept going. He never stopped striving for more.
He wanted to reach more people. He dreamed. He leapt. He lived.
We should all follow his example. Seeking stability only clouds your soul. Fear
of failing only kills seeds of innovation. We must create a more exciting future
where people feel free to dream and leap into a world of possibilities. We must
create a freer future where people are eager to truly live.
Drawing inspiration from Hiroshi Yamauchiʼs journey and achievement, we at
Yamauchi No.10 Family Office are determined to create a society that
encourages people to nurture their unique creativity, pioneering mindsets, and
passion, while making sure that we retain our foresight as well as
understanding of usersʼ perspectives. Weʼre determined to help create a more
exciting future for the world by investing in well-intentioned entities and by
implementing our own positive actions. We dare to dream. We dare to leap.
We dare to live. And we dream that you do too.

Description:
Emerge Funds Investments (EFI) is a hedge fund which specializes in systematic trading using quantitative models derived from mathematical and statistical analyses. 

EFI trades through the use of algorithms in different international financial markets (mainly NYSE and CBOE), achieving superior results than the tradicional available investment options. 

The EFI Portfolios actively manage third-party capital, prioritizing the conservation and growth of capital through the use of exclusive assets and diversification options, which are impossible to access in a particular way, with a reward/ risk ratio of 3 to 1, a probability of success close to 75%, and projected net results superior to 20% annually. 

With almost 200 automatic trading systems, Emerge Funds Investments monitors and trades around 2000 and 3000 assets, using different quantitative risk control methods that close out these trades automatically and without human intervention whenever scenarios are adverse and a risk threshold is met, as per the mechanical operation. 

As a hedge fund, EFI looks for achiving absolute returns, without depending on the direction of the Financial Markets (unlike the traditional Mutual Funds).  

EFI is structured as an audited Regulated Fund, registered with and controlled by the corresponding financial authorities.

Name: Collection Africa ltd
Description:
Collection Africa Limited (CAL) is a debt management outsourcing service, which is designed to provide our clients with a bad debt resolution tool.

CAL began its debt management outsource services to banking institutions n 2001 when established as the specialist debt collection organization within the CRBAfrica group purposefully to deliver debt portfolio management services to banks on their retail debts.

Retail debt is characterized by high volume and relatively low value per debt. This renders the collection of retail debt expensive and ineffective when traditional and conventional debt collection techniques are applied.

CAL was set up to provide banks with an outsource partner who would take up the costs and efforts to pursue, track, negotiate, and monitor the repayment of retail debt. CAL has since establishment in 2001 provided the banking sector with a highly effective non-performing asset resolution tool.

Our experience in the banking sector has been mirrored in other sectors as well with an equal measure of success.

CAL administers the collection of debt (from pr-determined age) for its clients using our proprietary Debt Management Software System, Recover! That tracks and monitors each and every debt to its final resolution.

Name: Magma Ventures
Description:
Go deeper, to rise higher. 
At Magma Ventures, this belief guides all our actions.

Deep alignment of values, partnering with founding teams.
Deep investment of time, working with investee companies.
Deep investment of capital, patient for the long-term.

Magma Ventures was founded when the Chamria family had a liquidity event on transferring control of Magma Fincorp* (listed NBFC) to the Poonawalla group in 2021.

We pride ourselves in doing in-depth research and taking long term bets.

Magma Ventures is an investment business with independent teams focused on four verticals-

> Listed Equities (Fundamental/Long-only): public market opportunities that will create outsized returns in the 3-5 year time horizon (small/midcaps, and opportunistically large caps)

> Derivatives (Futures & Options): strategies across Options trades (spreads, volatility arbitrage), Long/short trades, and Special Situation trades (M&A, share buybacks, open offers, etc)

> Unlisted (early/growth stage): focus on early-to-growth stage companies directly and through top-quartile VC-PE funds 

> Structured Credit (specialized debt solutions): strategic interest in few funds to provide special-situation financing (acquisition or growth finance, exit to investors, share buyback, etc) and debt-restructuring deals (debt settlement/refinancing, last-mile financing, etc)


*Magma Fincorp was founded in 1988 and grew to become one of India’s large retail NBFC’s having nearly 10k employees, across 300+ branches, in 20+ states, and AUM peaking at INR19,500cr. Magma was engaged in vehicle financing, mortgage lending, and SME financing and it entered the general insurance business through a JV with HDI Gerling of Germany (Magma HDI GIC). Magma had been funded by blue-chip investors- PE funds including KKR, IFC, Chrys Capital, True North etc along with Institutional Investors such as HDFC Life / I-Pru Life / Nippon MF, Goldman Sachs, Amansa Capital etc.

Seit Jahren sind wir konstant auf Wachstums- und Erfolgskurs und verfolgen unser großes Ziel auf dieser goldenen Welle: Das Image von Gold, Silber, Platin & Co. zu entstauben und der Welt zu zeigen, dass es für jeden eine perfekte, tatsächlich sichere und vor allem bankenunabhängige Anlagemöglichkeit gibt.

Description:
PT Kustodian Sentral Efek Indonesia (KSEI) is a Central Securities Depository (CSD) in Indonesia Capital Market, which was established in Jakarta on December 23th, 1997, and obtained an operating license on November 11th, 1998. Within Indonesia Capital Market Institutions, KSEI is one of the Self Regulatory Organizations (SRO), alongside PT Bursa Efek Indonesia (BEI) and PT Kliring Penjaminan Efek Indonesia (KPEI). Based on the provision of Law No. 8 of 1995 regarding the Capital Market, KSEI performs its function as the CSD in Indonesia Capital Market providing organized, fair and efficient central Depository and Securities transaction settlement services. 

Optimism and dedication become the spirit of KSEI in advancing the Indonesia Capital Market. With the ongoing support of shareholders, consisting of the SROs (BEI and KPEI), Securities Companies, Custodian Banks, and Registrars, KSEI continues to serve the best performance through various initiatives. Description:
东方证券股份有限公司（以下简称“公司”）是一家经中国证券监督管理委员会批准设立的综合类证券公司，其前身是于1998年3月9日开业的东方证券有限责任公司，总部设在上海，现有注册资本人民币69.94亿元。公司于2015年3月23日成功登陆上交所（证券代码：600958），2016年7月8日H股成功发行并上市（股份代号：03958），成为行业内第五家A+H股上市券商。

PMI’s platform presents your clients with the ability to trade and store their product or use their product as a collateral guarantee for financing, while their assets remain liquid in all markets. It also offers the security of fully insured, audited, allocated and segregated product, in addition to the safety and confidentiality of a Cayman Islands Jurisdiction; a Collateral Financing program for non-U.S. customers; Inventory that is audited by a major Accounting Firm; and the ability to store your clients’ product at insured depositories worldwide.

Alem da busca por suas realizações pessoais como trader autônomo Rafael Iasi começou à planejar um inovador sistema de aprendizagem e desenvolvimento especializado em DayTrading.

Em  meados de 2015 este grande sonho começou a se tornar uma possível realidade. Inicialmente compartilhando seus aprendizados e vivências em despretenciosos vídeos no youtube, a vontade de sistematizar e difundir os conhecimentos da moderna e universal Analise de fluxo de Ordens, bem como a importância do mindset e do Trading Management, fez com que o idealizador da Day Trader pro pensasse em uma forma original e pioneira de ensino on-line para Daytraders.

Então, porque não uma Escola para Day Traders?

Percebemos que apenas comprar um curso não fará ninguem um Trader! 

Sabiamos que era necessária uma maior interação entre alunos e professores, um suporte diferenciado e um ambiente completo e interativo para um  aprendizado responsável e efetivo desta tão difícil e desafiadora profissão. Assim surgiu a Day Trader Pro.

Rafael Iasi - Day Trader Pro

Name: Custody & Registrars (C&R) Group
Description:

In 1991, BARS was incorporated to offer similar services commercially to other listed companies and grew to become the largest Shares Registrar in Kenya. During a business review in 2006, the bank decided to dispose off some of its non-core businesses and BARS was sold as an on-going concern. The company was renamed C&R Group and remains the market leader in shares registrar’s services, enjoying a market share of 34% of all listed companies trading at the Nairobi Stock Exchange.

-C&R Document Management Solutions

Name: Capital Access
Description:
Capital Access Group is an independent IR advisory business connecting quoted companies with new and under-serviced institutions across the UK & Europe. We help companies generate fresh investor demand and increase investors' understanding of their equity story through our investor targeting, research, and virtual and face-to-face meetings.

We work with a wide range of companies from the top of the FTSE 100 and FTSE 250 through to micro cap, as well as investment companies, across all sectors. The diverseness of our clients is our strength, uniquely placing us to connect them with generalist, long-only investors.

Every company, management, and IR team is different - our investor engagement programmes are built and targeted to achieve your goals.

Capital Access services include:

Investor Access
Our experienced team offers unrivalled access with a wide range of investors, particularly regionally.

Investor Targeting
By combining investor data both off the register and from our investor network, we make efficient use of management and IR time targeting and matching investors to equity stories.

Equity Research
Our equity research promotes a company’s investment case whilst improving understanding of complex equity stories in a time where investors lack access.

Strategic Advice
Our team has deep and broad experience from both investment banking and communications. This enables us to provide high quality strategic advice to companies of all sizes.

Investment Companies
We help Investment Companies target Institutional and Private Client Fund Managers, selected IFAs, and specialist sector investors including fund of funds.

Investor Perception Surveys
The scientific approach of our 'Capital Access Insight' service gives clients the tools they need to understand the views of their investors and maximise the efficiency of their IR activities.

Name: WHU Finance Society
Description:
WHU Finance Society is WHU - Otto Beisheim School of Management’s finance club. As the business school’s oldest initiative, the club aims to create value for its members by providing additional academic sessions with proven experts, networking opportunities with first-class employers and society internal offerings. Our thematic priorities are investment management, sales & trading, management consulting in the financial sector, as well as classical investment banking.

WHU Finance Society counts a large part of currently at Campus Vallendar enrolled students as its members, this includes bachelor students across all years as well as master students. Members can either participate regularly by contributing their technical know-how and time or by attending events on a non-compulsory basis.

WHU Finance Society is a proud member of the IFSA – International Finance Student Association Network and the BVH - Bundesverband der Börsenvereine an Deutschen Hochschulen (Federal Association of German Academic Investment Clubs). The club is open to all members of the WHU community. For more information please contact us: info@whufinancesociety.org

The company leverages blockchain technology to facilitate official stakeholder news, voting and liquidity via a peer-to-peer exchange model using a mobile application.

Name: ML Capital
Description:
ML Capital is a forward-thinking capital management fund founded by a team of passionate and knowledgeable investors, including Jack Lyon and Jack Mallette, dedicated to transforming the way university students approach investing. Our mission is to provide accessible and valuable insights into the world of finance, equipping students with the knowledge and skills needed to make informed, value-driven investment decisions.

At ML Capital, we believe that financial literacy and hands-on experience are essential for personal and professional growth. That's why we are committed to transparency and education. We share our equity research findings and trade activities openly on LinkedIn, offering a behind-the-scenes look at the rigorous processes involved in researching, acquiring, and divesting equities within the capital management industry.

Our vision is to create a vibrant and supportive community of student investors who learn together, share insights, and collaborate to achieve their financial goals. We welcome feedback, questions, and engagement from our followers, as we believe that collective learning and collaboration can lead to better financial outcomes for everyone.

Join us on our journey to empower the next generation of investors, where learning and earning go hand in hand. Stay connected with ML Capital for valuable investment insights, educational content, and opportunities to be part of our growing community. Together, we can unlock the potential of student investors and inspire a future of financial success.

Name: D+A Strategies
Description:
An elite network of ambitious students from Bocconi, LSE, HSG, NYU, Oxford, ESADE, and more. Gain hands-on experience in quantitative analysis, prop trading, and financial markets through real-world applications and expert insights.

 What You Get
Master trading fundamentals, refine strategies, and build deep market insights to advance your career.

1 Trainee Program: From Beginner to Quant Trader
Start with the basics, then develop, backtest, and apply your own strategies. Engage in research, market analysis, and trading challenges.

2 Analyst Team – Apply and Compete
Put theory into practice. Join the Analyst Team to conduct market research, test strategies, and participate in trading challenges designed to replicate real prop trading environments.

3 Choose Your Path: Quant Research or Quant Trading Team
 Quant Research Team – Weekly macro & fundamental reports
 Quant Trading Team – Design, backtest, and implement trading algorithms, compete in demo challenges, and earn prizes

4 Master Prop Trading & Become a Funded Trader
Learn how prop trading works, secure capital, and navigate firm challenges. We prepare our members to succeed in the industry.

Name: Atlas Capital Markets
Description:
Summit Capital (Pvt.) Limited incorporated in 2006 with the paid-up Capital of PKR 300mn to accommodate the merger of Atlas Investment Bank Limited with Atlas Bank Limited. The Company at the time of inception acquired certain service led operations which have been functioning as a part of Atlas Investment Bank Limited as it's wholly owned subsidiary. Subsequent to the merger of Atlas Bank Limited and Atlas Investment Bank Limited, this company became a wholly owned subsidiary of Atlas Bank Limited.

On January 01, 2011, Atlas Bank Ltd officially merged with Summit Bank Ltd. (Formerly Arif Habib Bank Ltd.) and formed a new entity which is operating under the brand name of Summit Bank. Summit Bank is one of the fastest growing Commercial Banks in the country enjoying strong backing of Suroor Group Investments. The Bank has a network of 80 Branches/Sub Branches. The branch network covers Sindh, Punjab, Khyber-Pakhtunkhwa, Balochistan and Azad Jammu & Kashmir.

Subsequent to the merger of the Atlas Bank Limited, Summit Bank Limited, name of Altas Capital Markets (Pvt.) Ltd was changed on Feb 15, 2011 to Summit Capital (Pvt.) Limited. Summit Capital inherited the complete staff, active in the various areas of Equity Brokerage supplemented by a full scale research department, Money Market brokerage and Financial Product Distribution Unit. The company is a member of all three stock exchanges in Pakistan and also a member of National Commodity Exchange. The equity brokerage division, with over fifteen years of services to its clients has presence in three major cities i.e. Karachi, Lahore and Faisalabad.

The company has the privilege of providing brokerage services to state enterprises, mutual funds, commercial banks, NBFCs and a large number of retail investors. The main focus of the company is on efficiency in service, integrity and professionalism which is a prerequisite of local & international client base.

Name: İş Girişim Sermayesi Yatırım Ortaklığı A.Ş.
Description:
2000 yılında İş Bankası Grubu öncülüğünde kurulan İş Girişim Sermayesi, Türkiye’nin girişim sermayesi alanındaki öncülerinden biridir. Kuruluşumuzdan bu yana yüksek büyüme potansiyeline sahip KOBİ’lere ve orta ölçekli şirketlere yatırım yaparak onların finansman, kurumsallaşma ve stratejik gelişim ihtiyaçlarını karşılıyor; onlara yalnızca sermaye değil, “akıllı sermaye” sunuyoruz.

Amacımız; ortak olduğumuz şirketlerin operasyonel verimliliğini artırmak, rekabet gücünü yükseltmek ve piyasa değerlerini sürdürülebilir biçimde büyütmektir. Bugüne kadar 17 giriş ve 13 çıkış olmak üzere toplam 30 işlemle Türkiye’nin bu alandaki liderliğimizi pekiştirdik. Yatırımlarımızın yıllık bileşik getiri oranı hem Türkiye hem de dünya ortalamalarının üzerindedir.

2004 yılından bu yana borsaya kote bir şirket olarak yatırımcılara faaliyetlerimize ortak olma imkânı sunuyoruz.

Name: Alphom Advisory
Description:
Alphom Advisory is a Delhi-based High Frequency Trading firm. We are leaders in latency-sensitive arbitrage and quant strategies in India. We currently trade Futures & Options in the Indian markets, with volumes crossing more than a few thousand crores monthly.

Alphom Advisory was founded by two partners, both of them IIT-IIM alumni. Currently, we are a 5-person team with a combined experience of over 40 years in technology and quant research.
We bring with us a set of shared, core values - logic over passion (in work, of course!); data-and-analytics driven decision-making; and quantification before action. These are the values that are at the heart of Alphom Advisory.

Name: QST Financial
Description:
QST is a multi-asset multi-horizon quantitative investment firm. We rely on sophisticated statistical models and state-of-the-art IT infrastructure to find and exploit inefficiencies across modern electronic financial markets.

Our company is an organized alliance of small nimble teams. Each team sets its own goals and makes its own decisions while sharing access to integrated technical and research capabilities.
In ever-changing markets, we value agility that allows us to adapt, while staying true to our core principles of rigorous research, robust solutions and organic growth.

In a nutshell, we are interested in any problem at the intersection of finance, automation and statistics; and we believe that we have necessary skills, experience and infrastructure to tackle those problems.

We're always looking for new talent to join our close-knit team. If you are interested in applying, send your CV to careers@qstfin.com.

For press inquiries, please contact media@qstfin.com.
