Description: NIRMAL BANG SECURITIES PRIVATE LIMITED is a company based out of 38 B KHATAU BLDG2ND FLOOR,ALKESH DINESH MODY MARG FORT, MUMBAI, Maharashtra, India.

Name: CMT Digital
Description: Founded in 2017, CMT Digital is a leading global blockchain and web3 proprietary trading and venture capital firm focused on early-stage investments that accelerate the adoption of blockchain technology.

Name: NSE Indices Limited
Description:
NSE Indices Limited (formerly known as India Index Services & Products Ltd. - IISL), a subsidiary of NSE, provides a variety of indices and index related services for the capital markets. The company focuses on the index as a core product. The company owns and manages a portfolio of indices under the Nifty brand of NSE, including the flagship index, the Nifty 50. Nifty equity indices comprises broad-based benchmark indices, sectoral indices, strategy indices, thematic indices, and customised indices. NSE Indices Limited also maintains fixed income indices based on Government of India securities, corporate bonds, money market instruments and hybrid indices. Many investment products based on Nifty indices have been developed within India and abroad. These include index-based derivatives traded on NSE and NSE International Exchange IFSC Limited (NSE IX) and a number of index funds and exchange traded funds. The flagship 'Nifty 50' index is widely tracked and traded as the benchmark for Indian Capital Markets. 

For more information, please visit: www.niftyindices.com

Name: Sparkland
Description:
Since 2017, Sparkland has been allowing exceptional people to reshape the landscape of high-frequency trading. As a proprietary trading firm, we are free from the risks tied to managing clients' investments, remaining accountable solely to our highest standards. We use our own capital, relying on advanced mathematical models and complex trading strategies, which we build, test, and continuously refine.

Our unique approach helped us maintain profitability from the first month of creation for 7 straight years. Currently, we trade up to 6% of the trading volume on major exchanges. Recognizing our strengths, we collaborate with top-tier talent, fostering an exquisite team of professionals from EU, Middle East and Asia.

At Sparkland, we put our teammates first, offering them extraordinary opportunities, financial growth, and regular 'workations.' With a flat organizational structure and an open culture, we are committed to creating state-of-the-art technology alongside the finest experts in the world. Join us in shaping the future

Name: D2 Legal Technology
Description:
Award-winning legal data consulting firm, D2 Legal Technology (D2LT), sits at the intersection of FinTech and LegalTech, acting as a trusted advisor to institutions on process, data and the use of technology to unlock business value through legal change.  

Founded in 2011, today D2LT is at the forefront of providing the strategy and assistance to firms with expert solutions relating to capital markets legal agreement and opinion digitisation and data management, technology and process, data privacy and protection, assisting its clients across Europe, the US and APAC regions.

We specialise in enabling clients to harness LegalTech such as contract management solutions, document assembly tools, workflow, OCR, AI/machine learning and smart contracts and to respond to digital disruption, to become data driven and to add much needed business context to legal activity. D2LT’s areas of specialism include capital markets legal documentation (such as ISDA, GMRA, GMSLA, MRA, MSLA, OSLA, Prime Brokerage, Listed Derivatives and Clearing Agreements), risk management, regulation and a wealth of practical change management experience.

Our recent industry awards include:
●	2021: 
Waters Technology Inside Market Data & Inside Reference Data ‘Best Counterparty Data Project or Initiative’ (winner) 
Law Society Awards’ ‘Excellence in Technology and Innovation’ (shortlist)
Financial Times’ ‘Collaborative Innovation’ award (finalist)
●	2020:
Law Society Excellence Awards (shortlist)
Leading Adviser Awards (winner)
FT Intelligent Business Special Report - LEI Counterparty Due Diligence Utility (recognised)
●	2019:
Financial Times Intelligent Business Awards ‘Data Strategy’ (winner - with ISDA)
Financial Times Top 10 Market Shapers (2nd)

D2LT’s founder & CEO, Akber Datoo, is cited as one of EMEA’s 10 most innovative individuals in legal practice and is an appointed member of the Law Society’s Technology Law Committee where he chairs the digital assets and smart contracts sub-committee.

Name: Water Tower Research LLC
Description: Water Tower Research (WTR) is modernizing Investor Engagement through research-driven communications. Sound investment research begins with good Information. At WTR, we help companies and investors connect by creating expert information flow and strategies that are the foundations of a successful modern investor relations platform. Our analysts and capital markets professionals bring decades of unrivaled Wall Street experience and insight to a new digital world of investor communications and engagement. Our research and investor content is open for everyone to access and distributed across traditional research aggregators including FactSet, Bloomberg, Refinitiv, Capital IQ, etc., proprietary direct distribution lists, social media, search engines, and our website. As a result, every institutional and retail investor has equal access to our high-quality company research. Our mission is to help companies raise awareness and proactively reach investors while bringing investors a consistent flow of quality information to help them understand our clients’ businesses, industries, and the investment opportunities they present.

Name: Investing News Network - Australia
Description:
INN has been publishing for a global audience of small cap investors since 2007, educating and connecting them with investment opportunities. With the synergies between the TSX and ASX markets, we made the decision to bring our platform of independent journalism to ASX investors with the launch of Australian Investing News on our global platform. Last year, we launched investingnews.com.au with a focus on ASX listed Resource, Technology and Cannabis stocks.

We have opened a subsidiary in Perth to support our Australian expansion and deliver quality editorial to investors and top level service to our existing ASX sponsors. 

For Australian investors who want to go beyond the published content, INN’s suite of digital tools offers a variety of opportunities to directly connect with ASX companies.

Attracting and maintaining a knowledgeable, motivated Australian investor base allows INN to provide valuable lead generation for ASX listed public companies.

INN launched Investing News Network Australia to hone its coverage of news and educational topics in the resource, cannabis and technology sectors for the Australian market with the goal of contextualizing these diverse subject areas and helping both new and sophisticated investors make better decisions. INN's move to Australia comes after years of tracking investor sentiment in the country and examining the challenges faced by both investors and companies.

Name: ACG Chicago
Description:
ACG Chicago is a leader in the Association for Corporate Growth (ACG) global network of over 14,000 professionals. The ACG Chicago mission is to be the premier network in Northern Illinois for experts and decision-making professionals focused on strategies for increasing stakeholder value. 

More than 1,000 foremost authorities in their fields comprise this diverse and knowledgeable Chicago network of corporate executives, capital sources, corporate advisors and service providers.  The Board of over 20 dedicated members along with over 100 other committee members focus on the needs of these professionals to build unparalleled opportunities for networking, deal-making, personal growth and professional development.

Name: LKP Securities Ltd
Description: From a  humble beginning  in 1948 , LKP Securities Ltd today is a well established and dynamic broking house in India. Known for it's state-of-the-art systems and iPrimary Markets, Commodity Trading, Mutua l Fund Distribution, IPO and Life Insurance.

Name: Islami Bank Securities Limited (IBSL)
Description:
Islami Bank Securities Limited (IBSL) is a subsidiary company of Islami Bank Bangladesh limited (IBBL) which was incorporated in March 22, 2010 as a Public Limited Company under Companies Act, 1994 with the objective to carry out business of Stock Broker & Dealer in the capital market. 

Islami Bank Securities Limited is a prominent stock brokerage and wealth management firm in Bangladesh. The firm is committed in providing value for money to all its clients with top-notch trading services along with providing actionable investment ideas.

Islami Bank Securities Limited (IBSL) is one of the first full-service brokerage companies in Bangladesh. On top of our expertise and achievements, we take pride in our strong commitment toward the development of the Bangladesh capital markets. Bangladesh is currently at the initial stage of capital market growth, and we are committed to assist the entry of early movers into a growth-oriented, vibrant, nascent emerging market. 

Islami Bank Securities Limited. has developed a disciplined approach toward providing capital market services and including securities trading.

Authorized Capital Tk. 5,000.00 Million
Paid-up Capital Tk. 2,700.00 Million
Shareholding Structure 99.99% Shares are held by Islami Bank Bangladesh Limited.

Name: Autorité des Marchés Financiers de l'Union Monétaire Ouest Africaine (AMF-UMOA)
Description:
L'Autorité des Marchés Financiers de l'Union Monétaire Ouest Africaine (AMF-UMOA) est l'autorité publique de régulation qui s'assure du bon fonctionnement du marché financier régional. Il a été créé le 3 juillet 1996 par une Convention signée entre les huit (08) Etats de l’Union que sont Bénin, Burkina Faso, Côte d'Ivoire, Guinée Bissau, Mali, Niger, Sénégal et Togo. Son siège se trouve à Abidjan, en Côte d’Ivoire.
L'AMF-UMOA est chargé d'une mission générale de protection de l'épargne investie en valeurs mobilières et en tout autre placement donnant lieu à une procédure d'appel public à l'épargne dans l'ensemble des Etats membres de l'Union.
Il est dirigé par un Président nommé par le Conseil des Ministres, et son fonctionnement administratif et opérationnel est assuré par un Secrétaire Général.

Name: Securities & Trading Technology
Description:
Since its inception in 1985, Securities & Trading Technology (STT) has evolved into a global powerhouse, providing a diverse range of financial market software solutions across continents, including Africa, Asia, South America, the Caribbean, and Europe. As part of the STT Group, which comprises STT (South Africa), STT TradeClear, and STT (Mauritius),our journey has been marked by unwavering commitment to excellence and innovation. 

Currently installed in over 15 countries across the world, our core products cover exchange, trading, surveillance, clearing, depository, risk management and back office solutions customised where necessary in order to meet any of our client’s needs. 

At STT, we pride ourselves on nearly four decades of industry leadership, steadfastly following proven practices, policies, and processes. Join us on this journey of innovation and excellence as we continue to shape the future of financial market software solutions. 

Our company envisions a future marked by growth through our adoption of cloud-based solutions, software as a service, and the implementation of modular systems that improve scalability, flexibility and facilitate seamless modifications across various modules and applications

Name: ICU
Description: ICU Group is an independent, multi-strategy asset management, private equity, and investment firm that specialises in emerging and frontier markets worldwide. The Group also makes venture capital and fintech investments through its venture capital arm, ICU Ventures.

Name: Meksa Yatırım Menkul Değerler A.Ş.
Description:
1990 yılında kurulan şirketimiz, 1998 yılında aldığı Meksa Yatırım Menkul Değerler A.Ş. ünvanı ile Borsa İstanbul'da lider aracı kurumlar arasında yerini almıştır. Türkiye genelindeki 11 şube ve irtibat büromuz aracılığıyla, hem bireysel hem de kurumsal müşterilerimize geniş kapsamlı sermaye piyasası çözümleri sunuyoruz.

Uzmanlık alanlarımız; hisse senedi alım-satımı, vadeli işlem ve opsiyon piyasası (VİOP), Forex işlemleri, fon ve portföy yönetimi, yatırım danışmanlığı ve algoritmik işlemler hizmetlerini kapsamaktadır. Yurt dışı piyasalarda da aracılık hizmetleri sunarak, müşterilerimizin küresel fırsatları değerlendirmelerine olanak tanıyoruz.

Meksa Yatırım olarak, sürekli gelişim ilkesi ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımız ile yatırımcılarımıza değer katmaya devam ediyoruz. Sermaye piyasalarındaki yenilikleri yakından takip ederek, teknoloji ve bilgi gücümüzle yatırımcılarımızın hedeflerine ulaşmaları için güçlü bir köprü oluşturuyoruz.

Name: NCM Investment
Description:
With a history of more than 10 years, Noor Capital Markets (NoorCM) is an award winning Middle Eastern leader in online trading providing access to global markets “Think Global” to the local investors.

NoorCM was incorporated as a Kuwait Shareholding Company Closed (KSCC) in accordance with the Kuwaiti Commercial Companies Law of 1960 and amendments thereto. NoorCM is a subsidiary of Amwal International Investment Company KSCC (Amwal) whichl is a boutique investment house listed on the Kuwait Stock Exchange. Hence, the operations of NoorCM are regulated by the Central Bank of Kuwait
(CBK) and Capital Markets Authority of Kuwait (CMA).

NoorCM is one of the leading electronic trading companies in Middle East and North Africa (“MENA”) region offering access to its customers to the fastest growing global markets of forex, CFDs and commodities trading.

Name: Mercury Securities
Description:
We are a leading securities firm in Malaysia, providing delivery and execution of stockbroking and financial solutions. We are registered as a Participating Organization of Bursa Malaysia Securities Bhd. Mercury commenced operations in year 1992 and has now expanded to six branches across East and West Malaysia. Mercury Securities Group Bhd was listed on Bursa Malaysia in 2023 (0285:MERSEC).

Mercury provides broking services in the dealing of equity and equity-related instruments listed on Bursa Malaysia, as well as shares listed on a wide range of foreign exchanges. We provide nominee and custodian services through our registered nominees companies. We also provide credit facilities in the form of Share Margin Financing and Employee Share Option Scheme (ESOS) Financing. 

Mercury Securities is also licensed by Securities Commission Malaysia to undertake regulated corporate finance activities as a Principal or Independent Advisor. We have industry-leading experience with a range of corporate exercises including; Initial Public Offerings (IPOs); Mergers and Acquisitions; Takeovers; Corporate Restructuring; and Capital-Raising activities

Name: Komisija za hartije od vrednosti
Description:
Комисија за хартије од вредности је самостална и независна државна организација – регулатор тржишта капитала у Републици Србији. Основана 16. фебруара 1990. године.
Комисија за хартије од вредности обезбеђује уредно функционисање тржишта хартија од вредности, унапређујући заштиту инвеститора и обезбеђујући интегритет, ефикасност и транспарентност тржишта.

Name: Harmoney
Description:
Harmoney, an Agentic AI solution for fixed income, macro, and credit analysis for buy-side and wealth managers. We not only make financial analysis faster and cost-effective but also unlock things that could not be done manually before.

Harmoney's cofounders have worked at Goldman Sachs and Tata Capital and managed family offices. The team has strong experience in finance and technology; having previously worked at Morgan Stanley, Deutsche Bank, Amazon, LSEG, HDFC Bank, and studied at premier institutions.

Harmoney is backed by Y Combinator.

Name: AMAFI, Association française des marchés financiers
Description: L’Association française des marchés financiers – AMAFI – est l’organisation professionnelle qui représente les acteurs des marchés financiers en France. Reflet de leur diversité, l’Association est force d’analyse et de proposition  au service d’une activité vitale pour le financement  de l’économie, l’allocation de l’épargne et la croissance

Name: Barium Selat
Description:
We are a conglomerate of SMEs, headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. Our focus are mainly on manufacturing, engineering, research and development of products and services related to technology, chemicals, recycling, equipment & facility. Our focus is to transform industries through the power of innovation and unlocking the potentials for organic growth for our customers.

We will always be on a start-up mode since the humble beginning of Barium Selat in 2015. The culture of the company is to continuously come up with fresh ideas and challenge the paradigm we know today for a future we don’t.

As a young company with a team of experienced professionals, Barium Selat is a Malaysian based company with a global footprint. With over 50 years of combined experience in the energy industry, our team are focussed on innovative approach to cater for the growing energy demands across the globe.

Our main business principle is simple: TICC – Transparency, Integrity, Compliance and Competency. TICC will be our foundation and catalyst for an organic growth to achieve our vision 2025

Name: Holding
Description: Holding.com is a Swedish private equity firm, helping e-commerce founders to 10X to 100X their equity.

Name: Atix Capital
Description:
Atix Capital es una organización sin fines de lucro que busca promover la cultura de inversiones en el Perú.
Buscamos convertirnos en el primer fondo de inversión peruano gestionado por estudiantes universitarios. En el transcurso hacia ese objetivo, en conjunto con nuestros miembros, gestionamos una cartera ficticia de acciones peruanas replicando las mismas prácticas utilizadas por inversionistas profesionales. Esto trae consigue los siguientes beneficios para la comunidad:
- Fomentamos una cultura de ahorro e inversión.
- Promovemos el desarrollo del mercado de capitales peruano al enfocarnos únicamente en valores peruanos.
- Brindamos aprendizaje teórico y práctico a nuestros miembros
- Incrementamos las oportunidades en el mercado profesional en nuestros miembros basándonos en criterios meritocráticos.

Name: Andra AP-fonden (AP2)
Description:
Andra AP-fonden (AP2) manages the Swedish people’s pension capital and works to ensure a good pension for both current and future pensioners. We strive to be a leading pension fund manager in a changing world. To achieve good long-term returns and balance risks, we choose to invest responsibly worldwide in a wide range of assets. We create value, both through good returns and by promoting sustainable development for people and the environment. This contributes to a good retirement for all generations.

Strategic management model
The Fund’s strategic management model is based on financial theory and incorporates long-term forecasts covering demographic, socio-economic and capital-market developments.

Integrating sustainability
The Fund adopts an active approach to ethical, environmental and corporate governance issues, and has come far in making sustainability integral to portfolio management. Long-term investment requires companies capable of long-term sustainability, enabling them to generate a solid return that can provide a secure buffer for future pensions.

Attractive employer
AP2 is an attractive employer, with a staff of around 70. It employs some of the foremost in their respective fields, as portfolio managers, analysts and other specialists. Together, this workforce ensures efficient portfolio management with over 80 percent of assets being managed in-house. The office is centrally located in Gothenburg.

Name: Alpes Corretora
Description:
Corretora independente desde 1997, a Alpes CCTVM tem como filosofia inovação, transparência e solidez. A empresa investe constantemente em novas tecnológicas, que unida ao compromisso e bom relacionamento com os investidores, corroboram para sua consolidação e posição de destaque no mercado nacional e internacional.

Criada inicialmente para atender apenas clientes institucionais, com participação no mercado à vista e de futuros, em 2006 a corretora cresceu e passou a atender também o segmento de varejo. O marco dessa expansão foi a aquisição da WinTrade, plataforma de negociação para pessoa física.

The company was initially created to serve only institutional clients, with participation in the spot market and futures. In 2006 the brokerage has grown to also meet the Retail segment. The milestone of this expansion took place with the acquisition of WinTrade platform for individuals.

Name: Stowarzyszenie Emitentów Giełdowych (Polish Association of Listed Companies)
Description:
Stowarzyszenie Emitentów Giełdowych (SEG) to organizacja dbająca o rozwój polskiego rynku kapitałowego oraz reprezentująca interesy spółek notowanych na Giełdzie Papierów Wartościowych w Warszawie.  Stowarzyszenie istnieje od 1993 roku, oferując spółkom członkowskim pomoc i konsultacje w zakresie wymogów prawnych, regulacji rynku oraz relacji inwestorskich. 

SEG służy środowisku emitentów wiedzą i doradztwem w zakresie regulacyjnym (poprzez uczestnictwo w procesie legislacyjnym na poziomie europejskim i krajowym), samoregulacyjnych (wypracowywanie standardów, interpretacji i rekomendacji) oraz edukacyjnych (ponad 30 webinariów i 4 kongresy rocznie), jak również podejmując wiele innych działań na rzecz rozwoju rynku kapitałowego w Polsce.

Do Stowarzyszenia Emitentów Giełdowych należy ponad 200 spółek członkowskich. SEG jest członkiem EuropeanIssuers, organizacji zrzeszającej europejskie spółki giełdowe oraz organizacje europejskie reprezentujące emitentów.

Name: Ápice Investimentos
Description:
O Ápice Investimentos é um dos principais escritórios de assessoria de investimentos do Nordeste. Fundados em 2017, contamos com mais de R$ 3,5 bilhões sob custódia e mais de 4 mil clientes espalhados em todo o Brasil. Estamos presentes em quatro capitais: Salvador (BA), Recife (PE), Maceió (AL) e Fortaleza (CE).

Prezamos por um atendimento personalizado para cada um dos nosso clientes, oferecendo soluções em todos os âmbitos da vida financeira de cada família, transformando-nos em um hub completo de produtos financeiros sofisticados, aliando retorno e segurança de maneira ímpar.

Name: CT SMITH
Description: CT Smith Holdings Limited (CT SMITH), is a leading service provider in Sri Lanka’s capital market. CT Smith offers Investment Banking, Stockbroking and Asset Management services in Sri Lanka through its fully owned subsidiaries  CT Smith Capital (Pvt) Ltd, CT Smith Securities (Pvt) Ltd and CT Smith Asset Management (Pvt) Ltd. CT Smith operates the capital market cluster of the Colombo Stock Exchange listed conglomerate, CT Holdings PLC. CT Smith is the only capital market service provider in Sri Lanka to have a global equity house – CLSA (Hong Kong), as a strategic equity partner. CLSA is Asia’s leading capital markets and investment group and owns a 25% equity stake in CT Smith.

Name: Beegin
Description: Somos a primeira plataforma de investimentos conectada à BEE4 para dar acesso ao mercado regulado de ações tokenizadas.

Name: BOLSA DE VALORES DE CABO VERDE
Description:
Missão/Valores

Através de um serviço de excelência, a Bolsa de Valores de Cabo Verde tem como missão:

- Fornecer aos investidores, intermediários e empresas uma ampla variedade de produtos e serviços financeiros eficientes e repleto de responsabilização social;

- Contribuir ao crescimento e desenvolvimento do mercado de capitais em Cabo Verde;

- Ser uma instituição financeira que oferece soluções integradas em uma estrutura de segurança, transparência, flexibilidade e competitividade.

A Bolsa de Valores de Cabo Verde preza pelos seguintes valores:

- Ética: Assegurar a aderência à ética da comunidade do mercado Cabo-verdiano.

- Transparência: Fornecer informações claras, precisas e oportunas para o mercado e o público em geral.

- Inovação: Desenvolver novos produtos, recursos e esquemas operacionais satisfatórios e oportunas, segundo as necessidades do mercado Cabo-verdiano.

- Segurança: Fornecer confiança operacional e de segurança para os participantes do mercado.

- Alto desempenho: Maximizar a eficácia do nosso negócio para o benefício do mercado, as empresas e nossos accionista, obrigacionista.

Name: Unibra
Description:
UNIBRA S.A is a portfolio company headquartered in Brussels, Belgium, active in three business domains: Brewery, Real Estate and Investment Property & Funds.

The story of UNIBRA begins two centuries ago with the ambitions of a local brewer -M. Caulier- who gave life to the Caulier brewery. After expanding in Belgium, the company decided to acquire its first breweries in Congo and formed UNIBRA (Union des Brasseries Africaines) in 1960.

In 1964, UNIBRA gave birth to SKOL, a global beer brand that is today the fourth best-selling beer in the world and the first in Africa and Brazil, making UNIBRA a major player in the industry.

UNIBRA also diversified its portfolio by entering the real estate and finance businesses.

With a global position in high-end properties (Europe, Africa, USA), UNIBRA has successfully developed its expertise in the real estate business, be it in investment or development activities.

The financial activities of UNIBRA make it a self-sufficient corporation.

UNIBRA has built a unique experience in brewery -its core business- as well as in portfolio management. UNIBRA thus benefits from a true expertise and is continuously extending its knowledge to keep it high market position.

Name: CDG Capital Bourse
Description:
Société de courtage titres leader dans son domaine d’activité avec une part de marché de plus de 22% en 2010, CDG Capital Bourse conseille et accompagne ses clients dans leurs investissements en bourse.

CDG Capital Bourse propose à ses clients institutionnels nationaux et étrangers, personnes morales et personnes physiques, une large gamme de prestations dans les produits de la bourse.

CDG Capital Bourse se distingue par un service personnalisé qui se caractérise par la qualité du conseil et de l’exécution des ordres, le respect de la primauté du client et la discrétion dans le traitement.

    -  La réactivité : Un conseiller dédié et réactif qui permet au client de bénéficier des opportunités de marché et d’adapter l’orientation de son portefeuille rapidement.
    -  L'analyse : En prise directe avec les marchés, le conseiller offre au client une analyse pertinente des valeurs de la côte.
    -  L'engagement : Le conseiller s’engage aux côtés du client par une réponse individuelle sur mesure, adaptée à son profil, ses besoins et ses objectifs d’investissement

Enfin, CDG Capital Bourse participe à tout type d’opérations de marché : animation de marché, programmes de rachat, introduction en bourse, privatisation, levée de fonds, placement des actions et obligations, fusion - acquisition ….etc.

Name: RegRisk Legal Solutions
Description:
Regulatory Clarity. AI Precision. Market Trust.
From risk overload to strategic control.

Building on two decades of leadership with JWG-IT, RegRisk Legal Solutions is a new company with the same trusted mission: helping regulated firms navigate complexity, anticipate change, and control risk.

In today’s high-pressure environment, boards need clarity, precision, and trust. We deliver all three- at scale. Our award-winning platform, RegDelta, puts AI-powered regulatory insight at the core of smarter risk management.

 Intelligence: Stay ahead with curated insights, structured analysis, and real-time updates.
 Solutions: Leverage proven RegTech and expert services to streamline compliance workflows.
 Community: Bringing the industry together for smarter regulatory solutions.

RegRisk Legal Solutions is led by PJ Di Giammarino, a RegTech pioneer with decades of experience in anticipating regulatory change and building communities and solutions for them

Explore more at regrisksolutions.com or connect with our LinkedIn groups to stay informed.

Name: ICA Research
Description:
ICA is widely recognized as Asia’s premier capital markets solution and service provider in research, investor access, and market intelligence, with global expertise and local teams that span across cities in major financial hubs. We partner with public and pre-IPO companies to help them accelerate capital market growth and create lasting shareholder value through data-driven insights.

Our clientele includes companies listed in Asia and worldwide, representing diverse industries such as artificial intelligence, automotive tech, distribution & logistics, enterprise software, healthcare tech, fintech, consumer brands, biotech, and more.

Products:
Sponsored Research
Non-Deal Roadshow
Investor Conference
Investor Targeting Report

Name: Gantry
Description: At Gantry, independent thinking is in our genes. As a privately held firm, we take an intentional approach to everything we do. So, as our industry consolidates and becomes less personal, we push ourselves to ignore convention, to set a high standard and to always prioritize people ahead of profits. With over 30 years of experience of loan production and managing a $23 billion national servicing portfolio, our firm leverages a well-established correspondent-driven platform to construct the best financing solutions for our clients. For those seeking a partner that delivers more, we’re a little different. The right kind of different.

Name: DRACMA S.A.
Description:
Somos una empresa de servicios financieros con una fuerte inserción en el ámbito empresarial del interior del país. 

Con más de 15 años de experiencia, Dracma es líder en la estructuración y colocación de Obligaciones Negociables y Financiamiento Privado para el mercado regional. 

Nuestros Servicios

Inversión y Financiamiento en Mercados de Capitales. Contamos con el más amplio porfolio de Instrumentos Financieros tanto para Individuos como para Empresas. 
-Agente de Liquidación y Compensación registrado bajo el N° 201 de la CNV-

Asesoramiento en Fusiones y Adquisiciones, Valuaciones, Financiamiento y Reestructuraciones de Deuda. Equipo formado por profesionales con un importante historial de transacciones exitosas en fusiones y adquisiciones locales y regionales, financiamiento bursátil y préstamos estructurados.

Name: Valoris Securities
Description:
Valoris securities (Ex-Eurobourse) est un opérateur historique du marché financier marocain créé en 1998 sous la dénomination de Eurobourse SA (1998-2015)

Après 18 années d’activité sur le marché boursier marocain où elle a participé au placement de la majorité des introductions en bourse et privatisations publiques (+ de 15 opérations), la société a entamé en 2013 sa transformation stratégique et financière pour s’adapter aux nouvelles exigences capitalistiques du secteur et se donner les moyens humains et financiers pour le développement des nouvelles activités de marché.

La société a ainsi rejoint en 2014 le groupe financier marocain, Capital Gestion Group SA, acteur de référence dans les métiers de la gestion d’actifs (Valoris Management et Valoris Finances), le Corporate finance et l’immobilier. 

Société de bourse agréée par le Ministre des Finances, Valoris Securties exerce les métiers d’intermédiation boursière et la tenue des comptes Titres. Elle offre à ses clients actifs individuels ou investisseurs institutionnels une qualité d’analyse reconnue et une grande réactivité sur le marché. Sa salle de marché a accumulé une expérience de plus de 20 ans avec des profils ayant une grande expérience au Maroc et dans les bourses européennes.

Name: Atlas One Digital Securities
Description:
We are a Canadian-based digital securities company that will raise financing for companies in private capital markets and will give investors greater access to investment opportunities utilizing blockchain and digital technology.

Over the past several hundred years, public securities have benefited enormously from technological innovations that increased the overall accessibility, efficiency, and reliability for public companies and investors. In the meanwhile, private capital markets have experienced very few technological developments. Issuers and investors in the fields of private equity and real estate still operate in a highly opaque, inaccessible, costly, and highly illiquid environment. By using digital securities powered by blockchain technology, Atlas One will solve private capital markets' pain points. 

Digital securities are digital representations of traditional securities and financial interests (i.e. equity, debt, or fund units). Digital securities allow the ownership and transaction of all types of assets to be recorded on the blockchain. Moreover, the implementation of smart contracts automatizes the execution of legal characteristics of traditional contracts. This allows issuers and investors to raise and invest capital on their own terms, enhances liquidity, and enables the creation of new and innovative financial products.

Name: PureStream Trading Technologies
Description:
PureStream is a technology platform company with a singular focus on making institutional trading scale efficiently and securely.

For a glimpse at the problem and solution we are focused on, please consider the following:

Can you imagine a data network that links computers that only exchange 1/250th (.004%) of their data payload per connection? Then repeats the connection, transmission, disconnect process hundreds of times before completing.  Data networks don't work that way, but the US equity market does.

Why is the US trading network with only 50  "nodes" (15 Exchanges & 35 ATS's) considered fragmented, and data networks with thousands considered distributed?

The difference between data and liquidity transmission is in the sophistication and application specific nature of data protocols.

Equity trading has outgrown price and time as the only dimensions of its trading protocols. 

If you are interested in learning more as a potential partner, client and/or investor please contact Armando via LinkedIn.

Thank you!

Name: Mercata
Description:
The goal of Mercata is simple: help financial analysts waste less time searching for data and  more time applying judgement and making trade decisions.

Mercata is an AI-native Research OS that gives investment teams a faster, smarter way to turn their vast sea of raw information into action.

LLMs can summarize text, but they are factually inaccurate and not suitable for high stakes decision making without assistance. They invent facts, lose context, and cannot show their sources. Mercata fixes this by grounding AI in a continuously updated knowledge graph that maps how companies, people, projects, and events connect and evolve over time.

This creates a living intelligence layer that links every fact within every document and dataset together. Analysts can ask complex, high-context questions such as “Which board members worked together before?”, or “how much of this 300 page filing is REALLY new news” and get precise, source-linked answers in seconds.

On top of this foundation, Mercata delivers modern, intuitive workflows built for how investment teams actually work. It mirrors the natural rhythm of fundamental investing: spotting new signals, learning companies quickly, and tracking ideas from first mention to investment decision.

Name: BWK GmbH Unternehmensbeteiligungsgesellschaft
Description:
Die BWK GmbH Unternehmensbeteiligungsgesellschaft mit Sitz in Stuttgart gehört zu den ältesten deutschen Kapitalbeteiligungsgesellschaften. Der Schwerpunkt unserer Investitionstätigkeit liegt in der langfristigen Begleitung mittelständischer Unternehmen im Rahmen von Minderheits- und Mehrheitsbeteiligungen. 

Wir stellen „echtes“ Eigenkapital bereit, d. h. die Partnerunternehmen werden durch die Beteiligung im Falle von Kapitalerhöhungen nicht über einen zusätzlichen Fremdkapital-Hebel belastet, sondern erhalten weiteren Finanzierungsspielraum. Hierbei entwickelt die BWK flexible, auf die spezifische Unternehmenssituation zugeschnittene Beteiligungskonzepte. 

Wir investieren in Form von Direktbeteiligungs- und/oder Mezzaninekapital. Im Gegensatz zu vielen fonds- und laufzeitgebundenen Private Equity-Investoren erlaubt die Evergreen-Struktur der BWK eine langfristige und flexible Begleitung der mittelständischen Portfoliounternehmen. Zahlreiche Referenzen belegen diesen partnerschaftlichen und langfristigen Investitionsansatz.
Investitionsvolumen: rd. 300 Mio. Euro
Transaktionsvolumen: 5 bis 25 Mio. Euro Eigenkapitalinvestition
Umsatzgröße (Target): ab 10 Mio. Euro
Finanzierungsphasen: Wachstumsfinanzierung, Nachfolgeregelungen, Mehrheitsbeteiligungen, Minderheitsbeteiligungen, Gesellschafterwechsel (MBI/ MBO) | Kein Venture Capital und keine Sanierungsfälle
Branchen: Kein Branchenfokus; Wunschpartner sind ertragsstarke, mittelständische (Familien-) Unternehmen mit einer relevanten Marktposition in ihrem Segment
Geographischer Fokus: Deutschland, Österreich und Schweiz
Gesellschafter: Landesbank Baden-Württemberg, Wüstenrot & Württembergische, L-Bank, Gemeinnützige Hertie Stiftung
Referenz-Transaktionen:  Bechtle, Bizerba, Heller, Joma-Polytec, LTS Lohmann Therapiesysteme, R-Biopharm, Sick, Trumpf (Auszug)

Aktuelle Portfoliogesellschaften:

A capacitação dos profissionais envolvidos na prestação dos serviços e o atendimento dado aos clientes. GRT Partners goal is to provide our clients with customized services and structured projects that are effective, and executed with excellence. The long-term relationships of our partners across the financial markets provide for the necessary bridges for the success of each transaction we do. Established as a partnership culture of transparency and ethics, above all, we seek to achieve high performance in the pursuit of our endeavors.

Our services:
FINANCIAL RESTRUCTURING
Financial debt restructuring under litigation or not, with high levels of leverage or an unsuitable debt profile, negotiate terms and conditions with each operational and financial creditor in order to obtain the best capital structure that results from the cash generation of our client.

CAPITAL RAISING
Issuance of structured debt that was developed for each individual client in the local and international markets by using: bank loans, fixed income assets, private placements, high yield bonds, DIP, among others, to achieve the best capital structure for the client.

MERGERS AND ACQUISITIONS (M&A)
Structuring and execution of unique alternatives focused on the client’s needs. We can act either on the buy-side as well as the sell-side: partial or total sale, preparation of the company for sale or IPO, joint-ventures and strategic alliances.

TAKEOVERS
Presentation and execution of unique strategic alternatives directed to takeovers via acquisition of: shares in the stock market, bank debt, government related debt, IPU (Isolated Productive Unit) or companies in Recuperação Judicial with the goal of a turnaround.

Member of ABVCAP 
Member of TMA
Member of Opportunity Network

Description:

Its goal is to create better access to agricultural and financial markets for smallholder farmers, enabling them to sell their products at fair and competitive prices and gain access to financing opportunities.

AFEX established the first node of the regional East Africa Exchange in 2013 in Rwanda, and seeks to begin operations in West Africa with a base in Nigeria, and expand throughout the East Africa region.  Through its operations, AFEX aims to:

- Increase liquidity in commodity markets and enhance price discovery
- Improve existing value chains by linking production to high value markets
- Increase access to capital in agriculture by de-risking lending to the sector
- Increase farmers' bargaining power and share of created value
- Ensure integrity of trade and reduce default risk

Name: Capital Market Solicitors Association
Description:
The Capital Market Solicitors’ Association is an independent self-regulatory association of solicitors and commercial law firms engaged in capital market practice. The Association was established in 2001, with the aim of addressing the marginalization of Solicitors in capital market operations vis-à-vis other professionals, such as Accountants, Brokers and Stockbrokers. It is set up primarily as a platform to articulate and promote the interest of legal practitioners specializing or dealing in capital market transactions.

The establishment of the Association became imperative due to the requirement to register with the Nigerian Securities and Exchange Commission (“SEC”) as Capital Market expert or professional, pursuant to Sections 29 and 30 of the Investments and Securities Act 1990 (the ISA) now Section 38 of ISA 2007 and Rule 38 of the SEC Rules and Regulations. The necessity of registering with SEC is to make it easy to identify solicitors engaged in capital market practice and regulate their operations.

The Association is concerned with developing the legal framework within which the capital market operates and pursues its objectives by organizing training sessions, workshops and seminars for its members on topical issues arising in the capital market. As part of its vision to ensure a knowledgeable, dynamic and strong professional body, the Association has conceived a Continuing Legal Education (“CLE”) Programme for capital market solicitors. The CLE Programme is geared towards developing adequate legal capacity in the Nigerian capital market to meet the demands of an evolving capital market.

Name: SIGA Gestora de Recursos
Description:
A SIGA é uma gestora de recursos que atua na intersecção do mercado de capitais e de energia. 

Entendemos que o cenário energético não é apenas sobre recursos; trata-se de estratégia, visão e previsão para navegar em um ambiente operacional e regulatório em evolução. Neste sentido, mudanças regulatórias se tornam caminhos para a inovação.

Na SIGA, não somos apenas consultores financeiros; somos parceiros estratégicos. Colaboramos estreitamente com nossos originadores, adaptando soluções e instrumentos que se alinham com seus objetivos exclusivos e tolerâncias de risco, além de prazos aderentes às particularidades do nosso mercado. Seja você uma corporação do setor de energia que busca otimizar seu portfólio, um investidor que busca explorar oportunidades ou um recém-chegado navegando no complexo mercado de energia, estamos aqui para orientá-lo.

Nosso sucesso está enraizado na experiência de nossa equipe. Nossos profissionais combinam proficiência financeira com um profundo conhecimento do mercado de energia. Essa fusão de conhecimento nos capacita a tomar decisões informadas que impulsionam o crescimento, mitigando os riscos ao longo do caminho.

Name: Boston Women in Public Finance
Description:
Boston Women in Public Finance, Inc. is a 501(C)(6) non-profit organization for women in the public finance industry in the Greater Boston area. Founded in 2010, we provide educational and professional networking events throughout the year, including recent presentations by Massachusetts State Treasurer Deborah Goldberg, and SEC Enforcement Chief of Municipal Securities and Pensions Unit, Leann Gaunt.

Boston Women in Public Finance is 100% funded by sponsors, and does not charge membership or event fees. We are an affiliate of the national organization, Women in Public Finance, which was founded in 1997 in Chicago, and has since expanded nationally. Participants in the national and regional groups include state and local government issuers, investment bankers, commercial bankers, attorneys, corporate trust providers, financial advisors, nonprofits, rating agency analysts, and bond insurers.

“To support and advance the careers of women in public finance by fostering relationships and networking, and providing educational and learning activities and forums.”

Name: Spurs Capital, LLC
Description:
Spurs Capital, LLC (“Spurs”) is a New York-based investment management firm focused on investments in, and servicing of, seasoned residential mortgage loans.

Spurs was founded in February 2008 by a team of veteran mortgage professionals all of whom have extensive experience in pricing, due diligence, servicing, and restructuring of distressed residential mortgage assets.  Spurs was created to address the current dislocation in the residential mortgage whole loan and structured products market, as a long-term investor in the most credit sensitive sectors of that market.  Spurs has established a distinguished reputation and track record in the finance industry since its inception and serves the all participants in the industry which include large, mid-sized and small companies.

Spurs’s goal is to provide solutions to both financial institutions and borrowers currently under stress. We intend to establish long-term relationships in order to make a positive contribution to the resolution of the current market dislocation and the eventual re-emergence of a stronger, healthier mortgage market.

For financial institutions, Spurs will provide liquidity through a thorough and transparent investment approach that includes best-in-class pricing and models as well as highly proficient experience in servicing oversight that will produce exceptional asset performance.

Name: Israeli Association of Publicly Traded Companies
Description:
The Association of Publicly Traded Companies is a non-profit organization representing hundreds of public companies whose shares are traded on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange (TASE) and other stock exchanges throughout the world. The Association was founded in 1991 to represent the interests of companies listed on the TASE before government agencies and authorities in the areas of legislation, regulation, and supervision.

The Association’s chief goal is to enable oversight of the capital market through reliance on adequate disclosure rather than through strict regulation. The Association aims to reduce government involvement in business activity in general and the capital market in particular.

The Association is known as the representative of the public companies before the following regulatory bodies: the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange, the Israel Securities Authority, the Knesset and its committees, the Ministry of Justice, the Ministry of Finance, and other government authorities. The Association is involved in important decision-making processes concerning the Israeli capital market and has been a significant contributor in shaping legislation and regulation in recent years. These authorities recognize the importance of the Association and the need to consult with it before decisions are made

Name: Babylon Asset Management, LLC
Description:
Babylon is a private credit platform for $5M-$100M companies. We help them raise capital to handle unique or urgent situations. Our focus is debt capital, and we can structure deals to fit anywhere in the capital stack. Think of us like an investment bank, but we only work in debt, not equity. 

We run two divisions: Capital Advisory and Asset Management.

𝐂𝐚𝐩𝐢𝐭𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐝𝐯𝐢𝐬𝐨𝐫𝐲
We raise capital for businesses without banks or equity investors. Many owners don’t know the private credit solutions might be available to them. Through our top-down analysis, we help businesses discover "best fit" capital.

We help with situation
Advisory - We help businesses raise capital without relying on traditional banks or equity investors. Many operators aren’t aware of the private credit options available to them given their current capital stack. Through top-down analysis, we identify best-fit financing strategies tailored to each company’s specific situation. Advisory work includes, but is not limited to:

↳ Retrofitting capital to the actual need (i.e. sales financing)
↳ Bridging investor or lender fatigue (i.e. stalled capital raises)
↳ Working within or around existing senior/junior debt (i.e. hybrid deals)
↳ Structuring add-on or replacement financings (i.e. non-dilutive recapitalizations)

Fund - Babylon also acts as a direct credit investor. We deploy capital across the capital structures of non-bank financing institutions that originate loans to U.S.-based SMEs. We participate in deals at the transaction level, assuming direct credit risk in the underlying businesses. We’ve also backed senior credit facilities to select originators and specialty lenders. Name: PhilRatings
Description:
PhilRatings is the pioneer domestic credit rating agency in Philippines providing credit ratings for bonds, commercial papers, bank loans, banks and other financial institutions, corporations, project finance transactions, LGUs, and asset-backed securities, among others. 

A credit rating is an opinion that provides a measure of credit quality. It is an unbiased, independent, third-party evaluation of an issue or issuer. It is a grading system which focuses on a company's capability and willingness to pay its obligations upon maturity.

PhilRatings has been assigning credit ratings since 1985, formerly operating as a department of Credit Information Bureau, Inc. (CIBI). The department was eventually spun off to form a separate and independent entity, PhilRatings.

It is a founding member of the Association of Credit Rating Agencies in Asia (ACRAA) comprised of 30 domestic credit rating agencies from within the Asian region. 

PhilRatings plays an active role in the development  of the Philippine capital market. It is the first and the only domestic Credit Rating Agency (CRA) recognized by BSP for bank supervisory purposes. The eligibility criteria for recognition include, among others: a minimum 5-year track record in issuing reliable and credible ratings; a pool of experienced analysts; a competent and experienced Board of Directors; an established rating methodology; and an established record of independence, objectivity, and transparency. BSP also recognizes PhilRatings as a domestic External Credit Assessment Institution (ECAI) which can rate domestic debt issuances.

PhilRatings is likewise accredited as a credit rating agency by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Its assigned credit ratings are also used by the Philippine Dealing and Exchange Corporation (PDEx), and by the Insurance Commission, as applicable.

Name: LUXSIPA
Description:
Structured products have become over the past years a well-established asset class for professional and retail investors. The Association objective is to promote the global picture of structured products and thus, that of the Luxembourg Financial Center as a whole.

Luxembourg Structured Investment Products Association (LUXSIPA) was established in July 2019 to represents the common interests of the most active members of the structured products industry in the Luxembourg market. It brings together stakeholders active in the structured products business, from issuers to buyers as well as the most important partners in the field, such a stock exchanges or consultants. To ensure its ongoing influence, the Association strives to position itself as the primary, fairest and best point of contact in every question relative to structured products in Luxembourg.

Within the framework of this mission, the main objectives of LUXSIPA are to:

- Promote professionalism, integrity, quality of structured products and investor protection.
- Illustrate the advantages of structured products for investors and wealth managers.
- Promote, represent and defend the common interests of its members.
- Strengthen and support the place of the Luxembourg market in the global structured product value chain.
- Improve the transparency of transaction volumes on structured products involving Luxembourg market infrastructures.
- Actively participate in the elaboration of European and national rules in the interest of the market and all Luxembourg market participants.
- Be a source of information on the structured products industry to any interested market participant.
- Communicate with regulators, other associations, the media, as well as national and international organizations.

A CBARI é formada por profissionais voluntários que acreditam no valor do “pensamento integrado” para a sustentabilidade dos negócios.

Nossa Missão:
Propagar o conhecimento sobre o “pensamento integrado”, mostrando que é possível gerenciar negócios, criando valor a partir da integração de sustentabilidade e finanças, para organizações públicas e privadas e público em geral.

Visão
Ser referência do Relato Integrado dentro e fora do Brasil, e principal articuladora para adoção do de Relatos Integrados, sendo uma instituição engajada que realiza ações concretas que agregam valor.

Proposta de valor
Promover o conceito de “pensamento integrado”, objetivando a melhoria nos modelos de gestão e nos relatos corporativos, a fim de agregar maior valor às organizações brasileiras.

Conheça mais sobre a CBARI: https://relatointegradobrasil.com.br/

Since 2001, our products have served thousands of retail traders, hedge funds, and institutional clients. Our products are centered around our advanced, proprietary volatility analysis that we use to produce best-of-breed implied, forecasted, and historical volatilities.

In addition to various consulting work, we offer three main product categories: Trading Tools, APIs, and Historical Data.

Our trading tools are designed to help options traders make smarter decisions through a holistic, robust, and rule-based analysis platform. We believe in four pillars of trading that serve as the roadmap to success - backtesting, scanning, execution, and risk.

Our APIs are REST-based and designed to be powerful, quick, and easy to use. We offer live, delayed, and historical API endpoints to query both end-of-day options data (back to 2007) and intraday one-minute options data (back to 2020).

Our historical data files are available for download via FTP or AWS S3, and include accurate Greeks, theoretical values, and volatility data for over 5,000 US equity option symbols.

You can find webinars and tutorials for all our products on our website and YouTube channel. We also post frequently to our blog. We’re a small company with dedicated support, and will respond to any inquiries within one business day.

Originally known as the Asia-Pacific Securitisation Association, APSA's formal name was changed to its current form on 8 December 2010.

Objectives
•To promote the efficient growth and the interests of the structured finance industry in the Asia-Pacific region by providing a platform for the views of the industry to be communicated to regulators, standards-setters, market participants and investors.
•To increase awareness, build consensus and coordinate advocacy efforts on legislative, regulatory, legal, accounting, tax and policy issues that impact the regional structured finance industry.
•To identify and recommend market standardisation policies, practices, guidelines and related documentation in the interest of promoting the efficiency and cost effectiveness of the regional structured finance markets.
•To promote links with the People's Republic of China and the integration and development of the Association with other regional structured finance markets.
•To promote contacts and good relations amongst members of the Association.
•To raise investors' awareness of structured finance in the Asia-Pacific region.

Name: Binary Options Home
Description:
Binary Options Home information center includes trading tips, trading alerts, binary options brokers review and archives of binary options articles dealing with new trading strategies. Binary Options Home designed to give both new and old traders financial knowledge. 

Binary options offer investors a great way of earning money by simply guessing the direction of the price of binary stock or currency. One of the important news circulating in the binary options community is the impending financial default of Greece that can lead to adverse financial repercussions in Europe and the world.

Binary options are basically investment opportunities, where the profits are usually formulated to be either fixed amounts of compensation or totally nothing at all, if the option expires and runs out of funds. Essentially, these investments are known as all or nothing options or digital options.

Binary options offer a simple way of making money, because investors only have to decide which direction they want the price movement to go. They are not saddled with additional hassles, like in usual stock market trading. It is a good investment opportunity for beginner investors to make a lot of money, in the quickest amount of time. You have the option of either using the European or American style of binary trading.  If you use the European method, the underlying price must overcome the strike price at the expiration. If you use the American type, calls are automatically in effect when the price becomes equal to the strike amount, thus creating entirely different outcomes.

One of the latest news in the world of binary options trading is the creation of Binary Options Home. This institution was created by many global financial experts to allow the average investor, the opportunity to invest and profit from this type of investment strategy. Banc de Binary, through the use of innovative methods, has formulated an exceptional system to deal in binary stocks.

Name: LisansNeAlemde
Description:
Sermaye Piyasaları Kariyerinize Yön Veren Dijital Hazırlık Platformu

Sermaye piyasaları gibi dinamik ve rekabetçi bir sektörde kariyer hedeflerinize ulaşmanın ilk adımı, doğru bilgi ve yetkinliğe sahip olmaktır. Lisansnealemde olarak biz, Sermaye Piyasası Faaliyetleri Lisanslama Sınavlarına (SPL) hazırlanan adayların bu kritik süreci en verimli ve başarılı şekilde tamamlamaları için kapsamlı bir dijital öğrenme deneyimi sunuyoruz.

Misyonumuz
Misyonumuz, finans sektörüne adım atmak isteyen öğrenciler, yeni mezunlar ve kariyerinde bir üst seviyeye çıkmayı hedefleyen sektör profesyonelleri için SPL sınavlarına hazırlık sürecini kolaylaştırmak, erişilebilir kılmak ve başarı oranını en üst düzeye çıkarmaktır.

Kime Hitap Ediyoruz?
Üniversite Öğrencileri ve Yeni Mezunlar: Finans alanında sağlam bir kariyer temeli atmak ve işe alım süreçlerinde bir adım öne çıkmak isteyenler.
Sektör Profesyonelleri: Aracı kurumlar, bankalar, portföy yönetim şirketleri ve diğer finans kuruluşlarında çalışıp yetkinliklerini belgelemek ve kariyerlerinde yükselmek isteyenler.
Kariyer Değişikliği Yapmak İsteyenler: Farklı bir sektörden finans dünyasına geçiş yapmayı hedefleyen ve gerekli lisansları alarak bu süreci hızlandırmak isteyenler.

Neden Lisansnealemde?
Zorlu sınav maratonunda adayların ihtiyaç duyduğu her şeyi tek bir platformda birleştiriyoruz:

 Güncel ve Kapsamlı İçerik: Tüm SPL modülleri için SPK'nın güncel müfredatına %100 uyumlu, anlaşılır konu anlatımları, özetler ve binlerce sorudan oluşan geniş bir soru bankası.

Gerçekçi Sınav Deneyimi: Sınav formatına ve süresine uygun olarak hazırlanmış deneme sınavları ile kendinizi test edin, zaman yönetimi becerilerinizi geliştirin ve sınav stresini yenin.

Vizyonumuz
Türkiye'de sermaye piyasaları lisanslama sınavlarına hazırlıkta akla gelen ilk ve en güvenilir kaynak olmak; finansal okuryazarlığı yüksek, donanımlı ve yetkin profesyonellerin yetişmesine katkı sağlamaktır.

Name: Business Idea
Description:
Those seeking to open a business but are short of ideas or opportunities
It’s time to wake up and there is something more exciting than your early morning coffee, which pulls you out of your bed. You reach out to that smart phone of yours tucked under the pillow and voila! Your day has begun. There is no hiding what happens next. Check and respond to emails and status updates on Facebook and tweet on. Sounds familiar? I am no exception either.

We have reached a stage where we ‘eat, sleep and breathe social media’. Social media has become a mainstream way of communicating - for individuals as well as businesses.

Small businesses today can hardly ignore the impact of going social. A few years ago, most small-business owners worked to get ranked high in Google searches. Today, it is how to increase the followers’ base on Facebook or Twitter? The question remains “Are the small businesses there yet? According to an infographic by MarketMeSuite and Placester, 26% of small businesses are currently spending an hour or more on social media sites.

While large corporations all over the world are leading their countries forward with rapid innovation and expansion, small businesses are playing a vital role in grassroots economic development. Small businesses provide a platform for wider employment and economic opportunity at the local level and, like the small stores and vendors supporting the large anchor store in a mall, the local support larger corporations need to function.

Name: SOC Investment Group
Description:
The SOC Investment Group holds directors accountable for irresponsible and unethical corporate behavior and excessive executive pay.

Founded in February 2006, the SOC Investment Group works with pension funds sponsored by unions affiliated with the Strategic Organizing Center, a coalition of unions representing more than four million members, to enhance long-term shareholder returns through active ownership. Members of SOC affiliates participate in Taft-Hartley plans with over $250 billion in assets.

The long-term health of these pension plans, and the retirement security of the workers and families who rely upon them, are threatened by conflicts of interest on Wall Street and in the boardroom, a corporate backlash that seeks to weaken the accountability of executives to shareholders, and outright corporate fraud.

The Investment Group responds to these challenges by organizing workers’ capital into an effective voice for corporate accountability and retirement security. Shareholder activism can improve long-term performance– particularly those of worker funds that are broadly diversified across the whole market. In addition, activities intended to monitor or influence the management of portfolio companies are consistent with a fiduciary’s obligations under ERISA. The Investment Group, develops strategies and initiatives to support efforts by trustees and their pension funds to be responsible active owners.

The Investment Group pays particular attention to major corporate transactions and contests for control because of the magnitude of shareholder value at stake and the fact that many past deals have destroyed such value. The SOC Investment Group believes active engagement by shareholders with company directors and executives at these critical junctures can help to prevent, or change the terms of, otherwise questionable transactions.

Por que contar com um assessor de investimentos?

Como investidor, certamente você já deve ter se questionado se seus investimentos lhe rendem o que deveriam, ou , se é bem orientando. Essa pergunta é muito comum, pois investir sozinho é como estar em uma ilha deserta frente à imensidão do mercado financeiro. Buscar um assessor de investimentos é uma excelente opção por vários motivos. Os assessores de investimentos da Bequest Capital têm experiência de mercado, credibilidade e são treinados para acompanhar o cliente com dúvidas, sugerir melhorias nos seus produtos e estratégias dos investimentos. Description:
Overview

Central Depository Bangladesh Limited (CDBL) was incorporated on 20 th August 2000 sponsored by the country's Nationalized Commercial Banks (NCBs), Investment Corporation of Bangladesh (ICB), Private Commercial Banks (PCBs), Foreign Banks, Merchant Banks, Publicly listed Companies, Insurance Companies and Dhaka & Chittagong Stock Exchanges with the collaboration of the Asian Development Bank (ADB). Legal basis for CDBL's operations is set out in the Depositories Act 1999, Depositories Regulations 2000, Depository (User) Regulations 2003, and the CDBL by-laws.

CDBL's core services cover the efficient delivery, settlement and transfer of securities through computerized book entry system i.e. recording and maintaining securities accounts and registering transfer of securities; changing the ownership without any physical movement or endorsement of certificates and execution of transfer instruments. The Central Depository System (CDS) operated by CDBL has proved to be a convenient and reliable means to settle securities transaction. The investor has been freed from the hassles of physical handling of certificates, errors in paper work and the risks associated with damaged, lost and forged certificates.

Vision

Central Depository Bangladesh Limited (CDBL) shall be a dynamic, forward looking institution committed to adding value to the business of its clients. It will be equipped with up-to-date Information Technology to ensure prompt customer response and provide innovative solutions to the needs of the capital market playing a pivotal role in Bangladesh’s financial services sector.

Mission

CDBL will have a sound management team with carefully-chosen, highly-motivated staff fostering a spirit of enthusiasm balanced with prudent policies to achieve a high level of sophistication and expertise in the performance of its personnel by consistently striving to provide high quality services that are reliable, transparent and efficient by:

    Emphasizing the importance of the customer,
    Unleashing employee initiative by empowering them,
    Viewing activities of the business as processes and the goal of continuous improvement.

Name: Kaasstad Kapitaal
Description:
Kaasstad Kapitaal - Jouw Partner in Ondernemerschap en Investeringen. 


Kaasstad Kapitaal biedt ondernemers de unieke kans om hun bedrijfsplannen te presenteren aan een groep informele investeerders. Denk aan een "Dragons' Den" met Noord-Hollandse nuchterheid!

Met inmiddels ruim 60 aangesloten investeerders brengt Kaasstad Kapitaal niet alleen kapitaal, maar ook een schat aan kennis, ervaring en een uitgebreid netwerk. Dit noemen we "slim geld".

Voor Ondernemers:
Ondernemers met ambitie streven naar succes en willen de top bereiken. Dit kunnen ze niet alleen. Ze hebben een goed product, een sterk team en kapitaal nodig om in hun plannen te investeren. Ondernemers maken fouten en leren daarvan. Hoe waardevol zou het zijn als ervaren ondernemers, die deze fouten al hebben gemaakt, deel uitmaken van je team om je te begeleiden en te ondersteunen? En hoe waardevol zou het zijn als deze ondernemers ook het kapitaal hebben om je plannen te realiseren?

Voor Investeerders:
Investeren via Kaasstad Kapitaal betekent samen met andere investeerders presentaties van kapitaal vragende ondernemers aanhoren en kritische vragen stellen. Dit proces helpt investeerders om weloverwogen beslissingen te nemen over welke ondernemers te ondersteunen.

Door regelmatig bijeenkomsten te organiseren, creëren we een sterke verbondenheid tussen investeerders. Deze verbondenheid wordt versterkt door samen te investeren, niet alleen met kapitaal, maar ook door kennis, netwerk en ervaring te delen.

Elke investeerder beslist zelf of hij wil investeren in de gepresenteerde plannen. Ons motto is "Niets moet, veel mag." We vragen alleen dat investeerders minimaal € 100.000 beschikbaar hebben om te investeren als de plannen hen aanspreken. Investeerders betalen geen fee voor deelname aan investeringen en behouden 100% van de rendementen die zij realiseren (en dragen uiteraard ook de eventuele verliezen).

Commodity Partners Inc. is a boutique merchant bank and advisory group focused on identifying undervalued companies with highly prospective business opportunities. We primarily focus on public companies in the natural resource, biotech and special situations sectors.

ADVISING

A core competency of Commodity is identifying companies that have unique and compelling fundamentals. To have a successful public company, management teams need to focus on two business segments, fundamental corporate development and capital markets. We have often found that there are many great companies that are undervalued because the management teams are great fundamental operators, but lack the capital markets expertise to expose and unlock shareholder value through exposure via marketing, strategic funding and investor relations.

This is where we come in.

Operating from a “shareholder first” mentality, we seek to align ourselves with management and shareholder’s interests be only working with companies that we own equity in. Name: Startup Stock Exchange
Description:
The Startup Stock Exchange provides a regulated marketplace for startups and small businesses to sell ownership shares directly to qualified global investors. The listed shares trade freely on a government regulated securities exchange (DCSX) providing investors a liquid market where they can invest at any level of ownership and any stage of growth. The startups raise money at a significantly lower cost of capital, with less paperwork and in a shorter period of time than current money raising methods.

SSX accepts applications from companies worldwide in any business sector that wishes to raise funds. The company then proceeds through a six step application and due diligence process with an approximately 3% listing approval rate.  The approved companies then sell a percentage of their ownership shares to public investors through SSX.  Investors participate in a liquid market and as owners in the company share in its successes.

SSX is a member of the Dutch Caribbean Securities Exchange in Curacao, Kingdom of the Netherlands. DCSX is the government regulated and supervised Exchange on which all SSX companies and investors trade.  SSX launched on June 10, 2013

Name: Eqvor
Description:
En digital plattform som gör handeln med onoterade aktier enklare, mer tillgänglig och transparent. Vi skapar digitala lösningar åt investerare som vill köpa och sälja aktier i onoterade bolag – utan de krångliga processerna.

Vad vi gör:
Onoterade aktier har länge varit en utmanande marknad med låg transparens och svåråtkomlig information. Vi ändrar på det. Med Eqvor kan investerare handla aktier i onoterade bolag på ett smidigt och digitalt sätt – med full insyn i orderdjup, kurshistorik och aktieflöden.

Vår mission:
Vi vill modernisera handeln med onoterade aktier genom att skapa en mer likvid, transparent och lättillgänglig marknad. Vår plattform underlättar för investerare att göra rätt affärer och ger nuvarande aktieägare möjligheten att sälja sina innehav på ett tryggt sätt.

Vår vision:
Att sänka trösklarna för att handla onoterade aktier och bygga en marknad där fler investerare kan ta del av unika möjligheter – utan onödig friktion och osäkerhet.

Varför Eqvor?

Full transparens – Vi samlar all relevant information på ett ställe så att du kan fatta välgrundade investeringsbeslut.

Enkelt & digitalt – En smidig plattform för att köpa och sälja onoterade aktier utan komplicerade processer.

Stort nätverk – Våra användare är en blandning av professionella investerare, family offices och institutioner som är aktiva på den onoterade marknaden.

Unika möjligheter – Få tillgång till investeringar utanför den publika marknaden och upptäck bolag som annars är svåra att handla.

Tillgång till data – Se orderdjup, kurshistorik och affärsflöden i realtid för att fatta bättre investeringsbeslut.

Vi byggde den plattform vi själva tyckte saknades.

Eqvor har ett erfaret team inom finans och aktiemäkleri som finns tillgängliga för att stötta dig genom processen och samtidigt bidra till att uppmärksamma potentiella motparter.

Är du redo att utforska den onoterade marknaden på ett smartare sätt?

Name: #NSFMNextGen
Description:
About #NSFMNextGen:
The #NSFMNextGen initiative is an international, non-partisan network of finance sector professionals, academics and thought leaders who have an active interest in long-term investing. We believe that the recurring crises recently experienced in our financial markets are not isolated incidents. Rather, this instability is evidence that the financial market system needs a well-thought-out reform so that it can better serve its core purpose of creating long-term sustainable value. The Network seeks to focus research and debate on the underlying causes of financial market instability and on development of fundamental reforms. 

The #NSFMNextGen Initiative was formed by Network for Sustainable Financial Markets board members as a follow up initiative in December 2018 and focusses on supporting young professionals and academics across the Sustainable Investing, Banking and Insurance industries by providing an online platform for engagement, knowledge exchange, career opportunities and mentorship. For more information and to keep up to date with the #NSFMNextGen Initiative, please visit http://nsfmnextgen.org

Ampfield is a fast growing proprietary trading firm based in Stockholm, Sweden. We operate around the clock on established, regulated exchanges in Europe and the United States. 

Ampfield has a proven track record with high growth in terms of turnover and profit, and a very high risk adjusted return on capital.

Ampfield primarily trades liquid currency and commodity futures. Our approach to trading is mathematical, rigorous and based on the scientific method. We use only quantified and validated edges to assume a series of small calculated risks with favorable risk/reward characteristics. The business is highly automated, with computers autonomously executing trades, while continuously monitoring risks. We don't do arbitrage or make markets, and we don't participate in the arms race toward sub-millisecond execution.

Ampfield is continuously looking for new talent who can contribute to our team and reinforce our competitive edge. We are particularly interested in outstanding students from the Engineering Physics program with a strong mathematical background and a genuine interest in the financial markets. We offer a dynamic and intellectually stimulating work-environment that encourages curiosity and critical thinking.

GlassBox Verified provides brokers, advisors, and consultants the infrastructure to launch capital advisory as a scalable service line—without hiring staff, building tech, or managing lender relationships.

Why “GlassBox”?
Unlike working with a broker or bank, our platform provides full transparency into every stage of the loan origination process—from submission to funding. You can track deals in real time, understand lender requirements, and see exactly where deals stall or close.

Why “Verified”?
We verify client financials and business metrics before deals reach lenders, which means higher approval rates and faster closings. Lenders receive opportunities that actually fund—not just applicants that aren’t fundable.

The result:
Brokers can help businesses secure funding for growth, mergers, and acquisitions while differentiating their firm and driving new revenue.

Name: Altech Group
Description:
Die Altech Advanced Materials AG (ISIN: DE000A2LQUJ6) ("AAM") aus Heidelberg ist eine in Frankfurt notierte Beteiligungsgesellschaft. 

Ziel des Unternehmens ist es, am Markt für Lithium-Ionen-Batterien und damit am schnell wachsenden Sektor der Elektromobilität sowie an der erwarteten Marktentwicklung für die anderen Anwendungen von hochreinem Aluminiumoxid zu partizipieren. 

Zu diesem Zweck hat sich die Altech Advanced Material AG mit 25% an der Altech Industries Germany, Dresden, ("AIG") beteiligt, wo zusammen mit dem Partner Altech Chemicals Limited, Australien ("ATC") eine Fabrik zur Herstellung von Beschichtungsmaterial für Anodenbatterien errichtet werden soll. Derzeit wird die Machbarkeitsstudie erstellt. AIG hält die Exklusivrechte für die Nutzung der Beschichtungstechnologie für Anodenmaterialien und die Rechte an der Technologie zur Herstellung von hochreinem Aluminiumoxid ("HPA") innerhalb der Europäischen Union von Altech Australia Pty Ltd, Australien. Darüber hinaus hält AAM eine Option auf den Erwerb einer Beteiligung von bis zu 49% an Altech Australia Pty Ltd, Australien, ("Altech") für bis zu 100 Millionen Dollar. Derzeit ist Altech eine hundertprozentige Tochtergesellschaft von ATC. Altech ist Eigentümer der IP-Rechte an der HPA-Technologie sowie die 100%ige Muttergesellschaft von Altech Chemicals Sn Bd, Malaysia, über die eine HPA-Anlage mit einer Kapazität von 4.500 Tonnen in Johor, Malaysia, gebaut werden soll, und von Altech Meckering Pty Ltd, Australien, dem Unternehmen, das die Rechte an der Kaolinmine hält, aus der das Rohmaterial für die HPA-Produktion stammt.

Description:

As the world faces such challenges, there is a need to work on a global scale and increase the pace of action. We work to find areas where small changes can catalyze significant impact.

Name: Stone Pier Capital Advisors
Description:
Founded in 2012 by Dale Killmeyer and Charlie Schliebs, Stone Pier Capital is a boutique merger & acquisition advisory firm, advising mostly sellers (sell-side) but also advising buyers (buy-side), with additional specialties in strategic and financial advisory services such as capital and debt restructuring, debt refinancing, etc.  In addition to advising on sales or purchases of all of a company, we often advise on hybrid sales where the original owner retains a significant percentage of the company, continues as President or CEO, and looks to "take a second bite of the apple" upon a later sale. Our projects generally cover industries where we are experienced and add extra value.  In the energy space, a primary area of focus for us, this includes projects in shale gas (upstream, midstream and downstream), including multiple oilfield services assignments, as well as nuclear services, wind and solar, renewable methane, coal, and other energy projects.  Often related to energy, we have extensive experience representing significant engineering and construction companies.  In healthcare and life sciences, we have worked on projects in the biopharma, health & wellness,  healthcare software and services, workers compensation patient management and related manufacturing industries.  In addition to projects for the general manufacturing, distribution and business services companies that are common in the region, we have also handled projects for a diverse array of other companies, including an international broadcast media company, a publicly-traded computer games technology company, an artisan food maker, and a craft brewery.   While our clients have been in locations such as CA, FL, New England,  and eastern PA, the vast majority of our projects have been located in the western PA/OH/WV area. 

Mission
To provide high-level M&A, financial and strategic advisory services to lower middle market companies often not able to access such services at a reasonable cost.
