Name: Indonesia SIPF
Description: The Indonesian Securities Investor Protection Fund (Indonesia SIPF) is a new company established by the Financial Services Authority (OJK) in 2013. The company was established as a subsidiary of three Self Regulatory Organizations (IDX, KSEI and KPEI) with an equal portion of paid-in capital. Indonesia SIPF is an institution that aims to provide protection for capital market investors who lose their funds or shares due to fraud committed by the broker management they face. As of January 2, 2021, the maximum compensation to investors through the Investor Protection Fund is IDR 200 million per investor or IDR 100 billion per Custodian. As the only institution that protects capital market investors in Indonesia, Indonesia SIPF has the responsibility to protect the total assets of investors worth IDR 4,552 Trillion managed by securities brokers (June 2021). Indonesia SIPF will start operating as an investor protection fund operator in January 2014, marked by the acceptance of 114 securities companies in Indonesia as members. Currently Indonesia SIPF has 125 members (103 securities and 22 custodian bank). In connection with its role in protecting approximately 3.2 million investors (June 2021) of the stock market in Indonesia, Indonesia SIPF will collect membership fees and annual fees from its members starting January 2014.

Name: Kapitalmarkt KMU
Description:
Der Interessenverband kapitalmarktorientierter kleiner und mittlerer Unternehmen mit Sitz in Frankfurt am Main wurde 2017 gegründet. 

Der Verband ist davon überzeugt, dass der Kapitalmarkt auch für KMU attraktive Finanzierungmöglichkeiten bietet. Bisher wird dem kapitalmarktorientierten Mittelstand der Zugang an die Börse aber häufig erschwert – vor allem aufgrund einer ausufernden und unangemessenen Regulierung. Der Verband setzt sich daher im Sinne seiner Mitglieder vor allem für die Verbesserung der maßgeblichen Rahmenbedingungen für KMU bei der Kapitalmarktfinanzierung ein – und tritt dafür aktiv mit der Politik, den Gesetzgebungsorganen, Aufsichtsbehörden und den Institutionen des Kapitalmarktes in den Dialog. Der Interessenverband kapitalmarktorientierter kleiner und mittlerer Unternehmen sitzt also mit am Tisch, wenn über die KMU-Rahmenbedingungen für den Kapitalmarktzugang entschieden wird – und zwar bevor Regeln und Gesetze verabschiedet werden. 

Darüber hinaus weiß der Verband, dass zahlreiche mittelständische Unternehmen Vorbehalte gegenüber der Börse haben und sich den Anforderungen des Kapitalmarkts nicht gewachsen fühlen. Aus gutem Grund steht der Verband daher auch kapitalmarktinteressierten KMU mit Rat und Tat zur Seite, wenn es darum geht, die Chancen und Risiken der Kapitalmarktfinanzierung auszuloten. 

Die inzwischen rund 50 Verbands-Mitglieder profitieren somit nicht nur von einem umfangreichen Netzwerk, sondern auch von der Expertise, dem kapitalmarktorientierten Mittelstand alternative Finanzierungsmöglichkeiten aufzuzeigen.

       公司前身是东方证券资产管理业务总部，1998年开始从事证券公司资产管理业务；2002年首批获得客户资产管理业务资格；2005年首批开展集合资产管理业务，发行东方红1号集合资产管理计划，“东方红”品牌由此诞生；2010年成为国内首家获中国证监会批准设立的券商系资产管理公司；2013年成为业内首家获得公开募集证券投资基金管理业务资格的非基金管理类公司，一直走在资产管理行业发展的前列。

企业文化
       感恩、责任、梦想

企业愿景
       致力于成为一家受人尊敬的资产管理公司

主要业务
       公司主要业务范围包括证券资产管理业务和公开募集证券投资基金管理业务，其中，证券资产管理业务包括集合资产管理业务、单一资产管理业务和专项资产管理业务。
       公开募集证券投资基金管理业务。自2013年8月公司成为首家获中国证监会批准开展公开募集证券投资基金管理业务的券商资管公司，2014年1月业内首只券商系公募基金——东方红新动力混合基金成立。截至2022年12月31日，公司共管理公募基金87只，产品类型涵盖股票型基金、混合型基金、债券型基金、指数型基金、货币型基金和FOF基金。
       集合资产管理业务。公司自2005年开展集合资产管理业务，截至2022年12月31日，管理着113只集合资产管理计划，拥有先锋、明睿、明悦、明远、明锋、添利、添安、添裕、添盈、添鑫等多个产品线系列，涵盖权益类、固定收益类、指数与多策略等多个投资领域。
       单一资产管理业务。该业务是资产管理机构与单一客户签订资产管理合同，进行投资管理的业务。公司依托单一资产管理计划为客户提供“一对一”的专属投资管理服务。
       专项资产管理业务。公司依托资产支持专项计划开展资产证券化业务，依托公募基金和专项资产管理“双牌照”优势开展公募REITs业务，可为客户提供多元化投融资解决方案。截至2022年12月31日，公司主导发行设立专项累计29只（其中担任计划管理人的26只），基础资产包含小额贷款、应收账款、信托受益权、融资融券债权、不动产投资信托REITs、融资租赁债权等。

资金规模
       截至2022年12月31日，东方红资产管理受托资产管理规模人民币2847.52亿元（数据来源：东方证券2022年年报）。

资产管理团队
       公司的资产管理团队经历了中国资本市场多轮牛熊市考验，积累了丰富的投资管理经验和风险管理经验，长期业绩突出。经过多年的持续努力，公司拥有包括权益投资管理团队、固定收益投资管理团队、基金组合投资管理团队、指数与多策略投资管理团队以及ABS与公募REITs团队在内的五大资产管理团队。
       随着价值投资在中国市场的有效性日益成为共识，在价值投资领域深耕二十余载的东方红资产管理团队，以稳健的长期业绩、专业的客户服务和良好的品牌口碑为公众所熟知。
      截至2022年12月31日，东方红资产管理近七年主动股票投资管理收益率 91.75%，排名位于行业第 2 位（数据来源：东方证券2022年年报；银河证券基金研究中心公募基金管理人长期主动股票投资管理能力榜单，参评公司排名2/69）。东方红资产管理旗下固定收益类基金近五年绝对收益率 26.37%，排名行业前 1/5（数据来源：东方证券2022年年报；海通证券研究所金融产品研究中心基金公司权益及固定收益类资产业绩排行榜，参评公司排名19/99）。

品牌承诺
       自2005年“东方红”品牌正式创立以来，东方红资产管理已经形成了具有差异化定位和客户口碑的资产管理品牌。“东方红，更好的投资体验”是东方红资产管理全新的品牌主张和品牌承诺。
       在全新升级的品牌系统中，东方红资产管理提出，围绕“更好的投资体验”，以价值投资为长期投资思想内核，以封闭产品为长期投资工具，以专业服务为长期联结，努力实现从投研价值到投资收益转化的最低损耗，力争为客户带来更好的投资体验。
LinkedIn URL: https://www.linkedin.com/company/东方证券资产管理有限公司

Name: Ovato.com
Description:
Ovato is the next generation of digital currency.
The Ovato ecosystem offers a real-world solution for the mass adoption of cryptocurrency. By using Ovato, merchants earn more revenue, and in turn, users receive greater value from their everyday purchases. We are building a community of like-minded individuals, committed to delivering a better, more profitable way to exchange value—secure, safe, and decentralized.

Built as a Layer 2 solution, Ovato syncs seamlessly across all of its platforms, including the coin itself, merchant tools, user wallets, and NFTs. Ovato stands out not only for its Daily Deals and other economic incentives but also for its fixed supply, which allows the coin to be appreciable in nature. In this way, Ovato is not just a store of value—it is a functional currency that rewards usage and drives adoption.

"At the core of our philosophy is that utility must be the lifeblood of a long-term store of value."

We believe that real-world utility is essential to building a foundation of real users in active marketplaces. That’s why we’ve built a suite of products designed specifically for both merchants and users—focusing on functionality and ease of use. Developed as a Layer 2 solution on Polygon, these products integrate effortlessly on the blockchain, providing users with a consistent, reliable experience. Users also retain the freedom to off-board from the Ovato ecosystem to exchanges, merchant service providers (MSPs), or leading DeFi platforms.

Three-Pronged Approach
Ovato employs a unique three-pronged approach, targeting merchants, users, and secondary markets (including exchanges, MSPs, and DeFi). This strategy allows each group to act independently while remaining seamlessly connected across platforms. Though these components serve distinct purposes, they work in elegant coordination—as a true currency should.

Name: IIRF-Israeli Investor Relations Forum
Description:
The Israel Investor Relations Forum of the Israeli Association of Publicly Traded Companies, is a leading and unique organization in Israel, which bonds the investor relations community in Israel. The organizations aims to lead and promote the field of investor relations in the country, based on the understanding that proper investor relations management can provide a significant value to companies in particular, and to the capital market and business sectors in Israel in general. The investor relations field has a significant contribution in the increase of transparency and reliability of the companies, and creating accessible information for the existing and potential investors.
The Forum places Israel alongside many countries around the world, in which similar forums and unions operate, and promotes the international standards common in the Western world. The forum members include senior manages and decision makers in the Israeli economy, as well as investor relations managers in public and private companies. It serves as a professional environment to the Israel Investor Relations community.

Name: cleo.finance
Description:
cleo.finance is revolutionizing independent and prop firm trading with the most advanced visual trading platform on the market. We help prop firms launch faster, scale smarter, and provide their traders with professional-grade tools that drive real results.

FOR PROP FIRMS:
Launch your firm in weeks, not years, with our fully customizable turnkey solution. Everything you need: advanced trading platform, real-time risk management, market data integration, back-office systems, and white-label branding. Companies like HyroTrader trust CLEO to power their operations.

FOR TRADERS:
Trade smarter with visual order management - drag to set entries, stops, and multiple take-profits directly on charts. Our platform includes pre-calculated risk-to-reward analysis, position presets for rapid execution, and real-time compliance monitoring to keep you profitable.

BEST-IN-CLASS BACKTESTING:
Market Replay environment with authentic historical data across crypto, forex, and stocks. Test strategies on any timeframe before risking capital. Detailed analytics show exactly what to improve - PnL breakdowns, profit factors, Sharpe ratios, and performance by time/strategy.

INTELLIGENT RISK MANAGEMENT:
Automated guardrails, configurable position limits, and real-time rule monitoring. Built specifically for prop firm requirements with daily profit tracking, drawdown alerts, and compliance checks.

The team behind it all has deep expertise in algorithmic trading, data architecture, machine learning, and capital markets with a successful track record within the financial sector. Our team of 12 is headquartered in beautiful Prague.

Name: Fxedeal

Both Forex and Precious Metals can be traded online using Fxedeal platform. No matter if the client is retail, white label, or affiliate, they can access liquidity and various spreads using the automated MT4 trading platform which is available for multiple device types in the form of Web Terminal, Desktop, Android App, iPhone Trader, and iPad Trader.

VALUES
Our values are a direct reflection of the company’s working process and its mission statement.

 1. Result and Growth Oriented - We are passionate for gaining better results which are the outcome of a successful strategy

Name: Genève
Description:
Genève's unique legacy is driven by its ability to acquire, create and assemble high performing businesses and category leaders. Creating a control-oriented private equity firm specializing in acquiring and partnering with businesses that can benefit from our operational expertise and flexible capital base. We combine the operational and due diligence capabilities of a strategic buyer with the seasoned M&A team of a traditional financial buyer.

Since 1985, we have successfully acquired and operated 120 companies while employing a consistent, operationally-oriented approach to create value in our businesses alongside management. Our portfolio has included companies across diverse industries in which our partners have considerable experience, including technology, telecommunications, business services, industrial, healthcare, media & entertainment, and consumer products. For investors seeking structured, professional exposure to the small business market, Shefford Companies offers a distinct and compelling opportunity. 

Together, we’re shaping the future of small business ownership - one acquisition at a time.

Name: MTS S.p.A.
Description:
MTS is Europe’s premier electronic fixed income trading market, with over 500 unique counterparties trading European government bonds, quasi-government bonds, corporate bonds, covered bonds and repo, and with average daily volume exceeding EUR 85 billion.

MTS’ state-of-the-art technology delivers efficient and effective solutions, which when combined with expert knowledge and client-focused consultancy benefits all market participants, including issuers, primary dealers, and market makers.

MTS supports the full chain of pre-trade, trade execution and post-trade capabilities across cash and repo markets, and also provides independent benchmark fixed income market data and comprehensive fixed income indices. Its platforms are used daily by a very wide number of diverse counterparties, ensuring optimum liquidity.

Name: The Business Buyers Club
Description:
The Business Buyers Club was founded by Guy Bartlett, the UK's leading expert in company acquisitions. The Club's aim is to help business owners and entrepreneurs achieve their financial and personal goals through acquisitions.

Guy on the Business Buyers Club…

People often ask me why I run The Business Buyers Club. “After all,” they always say, “you could just spend your time buying businesses and reaping the rewards.”

And it’s true – I could do that. But I’ve invested a great deal of time and money in learning the skills needed to do this, and I get a real kick out of sharing what I’ve learnt with my members.

If you’d figured out a unique path to financial freedom – one that very few other people were making the most of – then I’m sure you’d want to show that path to other people too.

I’ve been in that place that a lot of entrepreneurs and investors find themselves in. Maybe you’re running a business, working long hours and struggling to grow it as quickly as you’d like, or maybe you’ve invested in property and you haven’t quite achieved the financial freedom you crave.

It’s where a lot of my members are when they first join us, and it’s exciting to watch them set ambitious goals for where they want to get to over the next 12 months.

What I do is give people the tools they need to take a much quicker route to financial freedom… by buying a business without using any of their own personal capital. It’s life-changing stuff.

And it doesn’t just stop at buying a business. When you work with me and my team, you’ll have all the knowledge, all the documentation, the systems and processes, and all the contacts you need to help you turn the business you’ve bought into a valuable asset.

Name: Cruising Through the Stock Market: Winning Strategies for Working Professionals

The author has explained the basics of the stock market, the common mistakes, and the Risk Management Strategy that works well for working professionals. This book is written considering all the challenges that they face investing in the stock market.

An alumnus of IIT(ISM) Dhanbad with 25 years of experience in the stock market. During his journey as an investor, he continued to find a way to avoid losses and generate good returns from the financial market.

Finally, he derived a strategy that works well for all working professionals who intend to invest in the stock market. 

Understanding the challenges of working professionals, he felt it is high time to share some of the insights around investments with "happy" outcomes which, made him write the book, "Cruising through the Stock Market". 

His vast stock market experience and derived Risk Management Strategy would help and guide you to generate good returns from the stock market.

Name: FinX Capital Markets
Description:
FinX Capital Markets is a leading technology provider specializing in advanced analytics for capital markets, with expertise in cash flow generation, scenario analytics, and stress-testing across fixed income, structured, and private security markets. The FinX Asset Modeling Platform (FinX AMP) offers unparalleled speed and accuracy, enabling rapid calculations of regulatory scenarios and portfolio evaluations across thousands of interest rate paths. 

FinX excels in private-security modeling, supporting complex deal structures and long-dated portfolios. Its platform, FinX AMP, integrates tools like the Analytics Library, Model Management Environment, Security Reference Database, and Private Deal Author, streamlining workflows for private and public securities alike. Private deals are modeled with the same precision and assumptions as public securities, ensuring consistency and reliability. 

FinX is trusted by major insurance, reinsurance, and asset management firms for structuring and analyzing public and private ABS, MBS, and CLOs. It serves as a high-performance addition to workflows that include Blackrock Aladdin, Clearwater, and Moody’s Axis. 

The platform supports industry-standard approaches, including cash flow-based valuation, prepayment modeling, default modeling, sensitivity analysis, and rate environment calibration. It includes granular configurations for cash flow testing, forecasting, and stress scenarios, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements like Bermuda Monetary Authority’s BSCR calculations. 

With cutting-edge technology, FinX delivers scalable, flexible, and efficient solutions for capital markets analytics, empowering firms to optimize their portfolios and meet regulatory demands with precision and transparency while covering all asset classes and deal types.

Derzeit wird die Machbarkeitsstudie erstellt. AIG hält die Exklusivrechte für die Nutzung der Beschichtungstechnologie für Anodenmaterialien und die Rechte an der Technologie zur Herstellung von hochreinem Aluminiumoxid ("HPA") innerhalb der Europäischen Union von Altech Australia Pty Ltd, Australien. Darüber hinaus hält AAM eine Option auf den Erwerb einer Beteiligung von bis zu 49% an Altech Australia Pty Ltd, Australien, ("Altech") für bis zu 100 Millionen Dollar. Derzeit ist Altech eine hundertprozentige Tochtergesellschaft von ATC. Altech ist Eigentümer der IP-Rechte an der HPA-Technologie sowie die 100%ige Muttergesellschaft von Altech Chemicals Sn Bd, Malaysia, über die eine HPA-Anlage mit einer Kapazität von 4.500 Tonnen in Johor, Malaysia, gebaut werden soll, und von Altech Meckering Pty Ltd, Australien, dem Unternehmen, das die Rechte an der Kaolinmine hält, aus der das Rohmaterial für die HPA-Produktion stammt.

Portware's flagship product, Portware Enterprise, is the first and only thinking execution management system (EMS): a fully customizable, FIX-compliant trade management and execution system for portfolio, basket, single stock, automated, and algorithmic trading.

Portware Enterprise offers users the ability to create, implement, and modify trading strategies and algorithms on the fly. Portware’s user interface enables traders to manage real-time market data to perform real-time charting, reporting, and transaction cost analysis. The system's open architecture also allows for seamless integration with existing infrastructures and 3rd-party applications such as data feeds and networks.

Also in our suite of products are Portware Strategy Server and Portware FX. Strategy Server is a powerful algorithmic engine designed specifically for high volume, high-frequency, automated order management. Strategy Server allows users to create complex trading strategies and algorithms in a dedicated, highly secure trading environment. It can be used independently as a standalone, black box trading solution, or in tandem with Portware Enterprise to address specific algorithmic development and trading requirements.

Portware FX offers a real-time, aggregated view of the entire FX marketplace through a single, fully customizable, broker-neutral front-end. This is coupled with a powerful algorithmic engine and API access, as well as middle and back office solutions for allocations and settlement, providing users with a compelling and complete FX trading solution.

عن الشركة
تأسست مجموغة شركات عبد الرحمن الحمام واولادة

بما يحقق اعلي درجات الثقة والرضا لعملائها الكرام .

公司注册资本26.25亿元，注册地为四川省成都市，泸州老窖集团为第一大股东。华西证券凭借强大的市场适应能力，是全国少有的从2004年持续盈利至今的证券公司，连续9年获评A类券商。

公司已经形成了以成都为总部，北京、深圳、上海3个业务分部，3家全资子公司、15家分公司、上百家营业部的组织架构。公司拥有全资期货子公司1家、私募投资基金子公司1家、另类投资子公司1家；自营业务分公司1家、经纪业务分公司12家、承销保荐分公司1家、主营机构业务分公司1家；公司证券营业部遍布四川、北京、上海、天津、重庆、广州、深圳、大连和杭州等经济中心城市；公司员工逾3000人，服务客户总资产超过3000亿元。

公司以“成就价值梦想”为使命，秉承“专业、敬业、高效、担当”的企业精神，全力打造财富管理、投资银行以及投资管理三大支柱业务, 围绕公司投研支持、机构销售、PB外包以及资管产品创设等跨业务关键能力打造机构服务和券商资管两大业务平台，与三大支柱业务深度协同，助力业务发展, 成为价值驱动，极具活力和特色的全国一流证券金融服务商。

Since 1989, SEM has come a long way and its transformational journey and successful positioning as one of the leading Exchanges in Africa, is a quite enticing story.

SEM today has a state-of-the-art operating system, trading is effected daily for five-and-a-half hours, the settlement cycle is T+3, the total market capitalisation has crossed the USD 8.5 billion mark, and the internationalisation process is in full swing. Der Gründer Tino Leukhardt, mit Bundesbank-Hintergrund, und sein Team verknüpfen erfolgreich eine traditionelle und konservative Branche mit Wertschätzung und der nötigen Innovationskraft für zukünftige Generationen.

Metallorum ist eine treibende Kraft bei der Vermittlung von Sachwerten. Wir sind Wissensvermittler und unterstützen ein gesundes Verhältnis zum Vermögen. Unsere Mission: Einen einfachen Zugang zu Edelmetallen für alle zu schaffen.

Day by day, we are finding smart ways to disrupt the industry. We motivate each other to run with ideas, test theories, and trust instincts. It is all about building something bigger and better in a way that only a nimble, dynamic, and fast-moving team can. You will not find red tape around here, only full exposure to endless opportunity.

Something pivotal happens when fundamental economics and breakthrough innovation join forces. And we should know. We are continuously pushing the limits of algorithmic trading — and it sure feels good. But no matter how far we get, we are always working to outdo ourselves. What keeps us excited is the ever-evolving market environment that fuels more ideas, more growth, and more disruptive thinking. There is no cap to where we can go, so we will never stop starting up.

Jesteśmy członkiem wspierającym Izby Zarządzających Funduszami i Aktywami od 2022 roku.

Naszym celem jest przede wszystkim:

- Reprezentowanie środowiska członków stowarzyszenia wobec organów państwowych, organów administracji publicznej oraz przed organami jednostek samorządu terytorialnego.

- Podejmowanie inicjatyw w zakresie kształtowania regulacji prawnych dotyczących dystrybucji jednostek uczestnictwa funduszy inwestycyjnych i tytułów uczestnictwa funduszy zagranicznych oraz rynku kapitałowego.

- Współdziałanie z organizacjami, stowarzyszeniami krajowymi i zagranicznymi związanymi z działalnością funduszy inwestycyjnych oraz rynku kapitałowego.

Name: CTI Capital Securities Inc.

CTI is registered with the Autorité des Marchés Financiers (AMF) as an Investment Dealer.
CTI is registered with the Ontario Securities Commission as an Investment Dealer, with the Alberta Securities Commission as a Non Resident Investment Dealer, with the British Columbia Securities Commission as a Non Resident Investment Dealer.

CTI is a member of the Canadian Investor Protection Fund.

Prevádzkujeme systém vyrovnania v rámci ktorého zabezpečujeme vyrovnanie burzových a mimoburzových obchodov a transakcií s finančnými nástrojmi. Našim cieľom je podporovanie rozvoja kapitálového trhu a vytváranie dobrých podmienok pre podnikanie s cennými papiermi na Slovensku.

Name: Börsen-Initiative Karlsruhe e.V.
Description:
Der Zweck der Börsen-Initiative Karlsruhe ist die Aufklärung, Information und Anregung der Mitglieder und der breiten Öffentlichkeit über das Wertpapier- und Börsenwesen.

Außerdem werden Wissenschaft und Forschung auf diesem Gebiet vom Verein selbständig oder in Zusammenarbeit mit Lehr- und Forschungseinrichtungen Karlsruher Hochschulen gefördert.

Dieser Zweck wird erreicht durch Seminare, Vorträge, Workshops und andere Projekte aus dem Bereich des Börsen- und Finanzwesens, Information über das aktuelle Geschehen auf den Finanzmärkten und Erstellung eigener Studien.

Weiterhin ist es Zweck dieses Vereins, die Verbindung von Theorie und Praxis herzustellen und zu fördern und somit einen wesentlichen Beitrag zur Bildung der Allgemeinheit in diesem Bereich herzustellen.

(Auszug aus der Vereinssatzung)

Diese Verbindung von Theorie und Praxis zeigt sich zum Beispiel bei unseren wöchentlich stattfindenden BIK Trading Abenden. Neben den meist sehr theoretischen Vorlesungen, in denen allerlei mathematische Formeln und komplizierte Ausdrücke gelehrt werden, bietet sich hier die Chance, das gelernte Wissen in die Praxis umzusetzen. Durch Vorträge hochkarätiger Referenten von zum Beispiel A.T. Kearney oder der Commerzbank, bei denen man viel über die Finanz- und Wirtschaftswelt lernen kann, soll zudem die Möglichkeit geschaffen werden, Kontakte in die Finanzwelt zu knüpfen und so das eigene Netzwerk zu vergrößern. 



https://bik.org/impressum

Name: The Dollar Vigilante
Description:
The Dollar Vigilante (TDV) is not your typical financial newsletter. As a brand, TDV represents a community of free-market individuals who rebel against the government's control over money and financial policies. They advocate for the sale of un-backed fiat currencies in favor of assets like gold, silver, foreign real estate, and bitcoin. 

TDV takes a thoroughly free-market approach, with all editors, writers, and analysts being libertarian purists grounded in free-market Austrian economics. They offer the most comprehensive analysis of the ongoing collapse of the US dollar financial system from a free-market perspective. Subscribers gain access to TDV newsletters, special reports, and a private Facebook community where like-minded individuals can discuss topics. 

Moreover, TDV provides stock and investment portfolios with options for both conservative and risk-tolerant investors. TDV also offers stock recommendations and alerts for premium subscribers. For those interested in cryptocurrency trading and investing, The Crypto Vigilante provides expert insights. Trustworthy and insightful, TDV is a go-to source for surviving and prospering in a turbulent financial landscape.

Founded in 2009, by Jeff Berwick and Ed Bugos, TDV has grown into one of the most well known financial websites and newsletters in the world due to its extreme free market bent and timely calls on emerging trends. Including recommending Bitcoin when it traded at $3 in 2011 (it subsequently rose to over $1,000). 

TDV has been featured on CNBC, Bloomberg, Fox Business, CBC, ZeroHedge, Kitco.com, LewRockwell.com, and countless other TV, radio, podcasts and websites.

Name: Association of Corporate Trustees
Description:
The Association of Corporate Trustees (ACT) is the forum for all registered Corporate Trustees in Nigeria to interact, exchange information, support and promote Trusteeship practice in Nigeria.

Aims and Objectives 
•	To provide a non-political forum for the promotion of the [practice of Trusteeship in Nigeria.
•	To regulate and harmonise the activities of members and enhance the exchange of information for their benefit and for the benefit of the Association.
•	To co-operate with the Securities & Exchange Commission, The Nigerian Stock Exchange, The Central Securities clearing System Limited any other institution which share the ideas and the objects of the Association.
•	To identify and associate with reputable local and international bodies or associations with similar objectives, aspirations and goals.
•	To promote, support or express opinions and procure such actions as may be deemed necessary on legislative matters or other government policies or actions.
•	For the purpose to serve as a forum for the discussion and the formulation of strategy to any issue that may affect members and other capital market operators and the capital market.
•	For the aforesaid purposes, to promote bills in parliament and adopt other measures for the development of the capital market.
•	For he aforesaid purpose to print or publish any newspapers, periodicals, books or leaflets that the association may think desirable for the promotion of its objects subject to the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.
•	To promote the observance of prudent business practices amongst members, ensure integrity, professionalism and efficiency in the discharge of trusteeship duties.

Name: Bratislava Stock Exchange
Description:
Bratislava Stock Exchange j.s.c. (BSSE), founded through a Memorandum of Foundation from 8 January 1991 by banks and insurance companies, is the sole operator of a regulated market of securities in the Slovak Republic. Trading on the BSSE started on 6 April 1993, based on a licence issued by the Ministry of Finance of the Slovak Republic to establish a Stock Exchange, organize the trading of securities and co-ordinate associated activities. From 26 June 2001, BSSE has been performing its activity on the basis of a licence to establish and operate a Stock Exchange, granted by the Financial Market Authority of the Slovak Republic. Following a decree of the National Bank of Slovakia, the licence was extended on 26 March 2008 to include the operation of a Multilateral Trading Facility (MTF).

BSSE is a joint-stock company whose activities are governed primarily by the Stock Exchange Act No 429/2002 (Coll.) on the Stock Exchange as amended by later legislation, other legal regulations and Stock Exchange Rules. BSSE operates on a membership principle, which means that only Stock Exchange Members (and National Bank of Slovakia) are authorised to directly conclude stock exchange transactions.

The QFMA officially undertook its responsibility on September of 2007, where the market, the listed companies and financial services companies were informed that the official functions of supervision and regulation were transferred from the market to the Authority after such functions were with the market for the last 10 years.

To keep up with developments in the financial markets, Law No. (8) of 2012 was issued regarding Qatar Financial Markets Authority and entered into effect on October 18th of 2012 to replace the repealed law No. (33) of 2005.

Name: APIMEC RIO
Description:
No final da década de 60, o mercado de capitais brasileiro registrava um forte vigor na esteira de profunda reestruturação que se iniciou com a Lei do Mercado de Capitais e a reestruturação do Sistema Financeiro Brasileiro, com a criação do Banco Central do Brasil, nos anos 1964 e 1965. Paralelamente, com vistas a estimular a capitalização das empresas, educar o investidor tornando-o apto a entender as aplicações em renda viável e dinamizar o mercado secundário de ações, em 1967 o Governo editou o Decreto Lei 157, onde abria mão de parcela do imposto de renda para sua aplicação em Fundos de Investimento de Ações.

Neste ambiente, ampliou-se o número de profissionais que dedicavam-se com apuro técnico à análise das alternativas de investimento. Intuitivamente, ocorreu uma aproximação entre eles visando a troca de idéias e de experiências. Na formalização destes encontros, em maio de 1970, no Rio de Janeiro, foi fundada a primeira Associação de Analistas do Mercado de Capitais do Brasil. Posteriormente, foram sendo constituídas congêneres em diversas outras unidades da Federação, que em 1988 criaram uma entidade de âmbito nacional, visando dar maior representativa à comunidade de analistas perante autoridades e demais órgãos de mercado e associações de classe.

Como integrante da Apimec Nacional, os cerca de 3.200 associados espalhados pelo País dispõem além da representatividade nacional, também da internacional, integrando o Comitê Internacional das Associações de Analistas Financeiros sediada em Paris, e a ACIIA- Association of Certified International Investment Analysts, responsável pela certificação de profissionais a nível mundial.

Com essa visão nos adequamos à necessidade dos novos tempos de uma economia globalizada e de profissionais multidisciplinares, que atuam no segmento mais amplo do mercado financeiro e de capitais e integram nosso quadro associativo.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

SOFTWARE DEVELOPERS AND ENGINEERS

- 4+ yrs of coding experience, of which 2+ yrs working on low-latency trading software (or equivalent)
- Exceptional C/C++ knowledge and code optimization (speed, not throughput) 
- Expertise in Linux (including administration, useful tools, command line)
- Proven knowledge of multithreading and asynchronous systems
- Affinity with securities and derivatives trading
- Eagerness to learn and put into practice new technologies (software and hardware).
- Excellent communication skills, written and spoken English.


OPTIONS TRADERS
Gradient Trading is also accepting employment enquiries from talent with junior to mid-level (equity options) market making experience seeking a highly entrepreneurial environment. Candidates require a deep understanding and interest for derivatives pricing theory and analysis, plus a strong math aptitude. Programming skills are highly desirable, affinity is essential.

Description:
Seturion is to unify the fragmented settlement landscape in Europe, removing cross-border barriers.

• The platform enables significant cost savings, leveraging blockchain technology.
• Seturion is open to all banks, brokers, trading venues – classical and digital – and tokenization platforms across Europe.
• Open architecture with easy connectivity; public and private blockchains supported; settlement against central bank money or on-chain cash; coverage of all asset classes.
• Boerse Stuttgart Group’s European trading venues will connect to Seturion as ‚clients zero‘; partners to follow soon.

Description:

Within the framework of the pivotal role played by the Ministry of Finance in managing the state’s general budget and organizing and managing government debt by using innovative financial tools that contribute to diversifying funding sources and targeting a new segment of investors in the global market, which will have an impact on reducing the cost of financing on the state’s general budget on the medium and long term, and given the importance of sovereign sukuk as one of the non-traditional financing tools in financing the needs of the Egyptian state to implement various development projects included in the general budget, The Egyptian Financial Company for Sovereign Sukuk was established. Name: African Conservation Development Group
Description:
We believe conservation-led development is the way to optimise world-class natural resources, creating opportunities for the current generation without compromising the needs and rights of future generations.

We design land-use plans that allocate rights optimally for the ecosystem and ensure their effective implementation. We secure and hold the land rights, raise public and private sector capital and mobilise specialist technical and institutional resources to unlock the full commercial, ecological and social value of an ecosystem.

The philosophy and guiding model for our approach has evolved and been refined over the past 30 years. Through a series of investment and development projects executed across Africa, we have proven our founding thesis that underutilised land and natural resources in Africa, consolidated and packaged with defined use rights, can produce attractive returns while restoring ecological integrity.

Name: Government Capital Corporation
Description:
Government Capital Corporation is a leading public finance firm providing origination and underwriting to state and local government agencies in the U.S.  Government Capital Corporation maintains expertise in the private placement of structured, tax-exempt debt instruments issued by local government and public education agencies.

Government Capital Corporation (“GCC”) was founded in 1992 with one simple mission: “Bring Wall Street to Main Street.”  Although GCC routinely assists the largest municipal issuers across the country in financing personal property and infrastructure projects, their growing team of professionals deliver the same level of expertise and hands on customer service to all sizes and types of municipal entities.

GCC believes that the small Volunteer Fire Department in rural America should have the same access to capital as the large metropolitan city.

More importantly, GCC strives to partner with and educate their clients in a very personal way, on the uniquenesses and advantages of the many innovative tax exempt municipal financing structures which are available. To ensure that their clients have access to all financing alternatives, GCC incorporated a sister company, Government Capital Securities Corporation (“GCSC”) in 1999. 

GCC’s mission is to provide efficient, cost-effective municipal financing solutions. GCC deploys their Vendor Services team across the country every day to work with manufacturers and distributors who sell products and services to municipal entities. Working concurrently with municipal issuers and vendors together, our financing programs serve to simplify the municipal procurement process and expedite delivery and installation of equipment. This results in win-win solutions for both our municipal issuer clients and vendor clients as well.

GCC has earned the trust of thousands of municipal issuers and vendor clients in all fifty states and would appreciate the opportunity to share their expertise with you.

Name: International Capital Market Services Association
Description:
The primary purpose of the association is to foster the highest standards in the practice and management of international capital market services, thereby facilitating the efficient functioning of the market.

Our membership includes universal banks, registrars, stock exchanges, law firms, International Central Securities Depositories (ICSDs) and other service providers specialised in specific product segments such as the processing of tax reclaims. 

In its day-to-day activities, the ICMSA focuses on the operation of the International Securities Market (i.e. securities primarily issued and deposited with the ICSDs, Clearstream Banking S.A. and Euroclear Bank S.A./N.V.), with outstanding value exceeding €9.5 trillion in 2017.

History:

The ICMSA was founded in 1994 as the International Paying Agents Association (IPAA). As the work of the IPAA expanded, covering an increasing number of roles in the administration of International Capital Market Issues, the association sought to recognise the expansion of the association.

On February 26 2004, the IPAA (with nine members) made a decision to expand the remit of the association and admit associate members. The IPAA changed its name to the International Capital Market Services Association (ICMSA), creating a Trade Association to reflect the evolving International Capital Markets and providing a formal platform for service organisations.

In 2009, with 27 members (14 full and 13 associate) all contributing to the work of the association the need to distinguish between two levels of ICMSA membership was deemed no longer necessary and all members were granted equal status in the association.

ICMSA incorporated as a Company Limited by Guarantee on 19th December 2014 - Company number 09362312.

Name: InFin Capital Ltd.
Description:
ABOUT
InFin Capital is a leading underwriting and consulting firm with unique expertise in managing debt and equity financing transactions for domestic and foreign corporations, seeking raising debt and equity in the state of Israel. 

InFin Capital was founded in 2015 by Mr. Yehonatan Cohen, previously CEO of Clal Finance Underwriting, who brings with him over 15 years of experience in the Israeli capital market. During that time, he was responsible for issuing more than US$30bn of debt and equity. 

Since founded in 2015, InFin Capital was involved in 59 issuance cases, raising a total amount of more than NIS27bn, out of which InFin Capital had led 29 significant transactions, issuing debt and equity in the total amount exceeding NIS10bn, for both of U.S. and Israeli clients.

END TO END SERVICES
InFin Capital provides a variety of services including underwriting and distribution, deal structuring and management, investment banking, rating consultancy and investor relations services. 

In addition, following successful completion of an issuance case, InFin Capital represents its US based clients in any matter in related to the Israeli capital market and provides on-going advisory and IR services. 

InFin Capital cooperates with top tier Israeli legal and accounting firms, assisting the issuers in setting up the entire experienced team required for executing the transaction. 

Our clients benefit from our long-lasting and familiar relationships with all major institutional and private investors in Israel, as well as with the local credit rating agencies and regulatory institutions.

Name: Adl Capital (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
Adl Capital (Pvt) Ltd (ADL) is engaged in various areas germane to Islamic Banking & Finance (IBF) with “Islamic Finance Advisory”, which includes Product Structuring, as its core activity. In fact, it is recognized as the leading provider of IBF Advisory services in Sri Lanka and has enjoyed this position over the last decade or so. Adl has also ventured overseas, most notably in the Maldives. Other areas of its services on offer include Corporate Finance and Private Equity. 

In the period since incorporation, ADL has built up a strong portfolio of clients, including several Licensed Commercial Banks, NBFIs, Insurance Companies as well as other corporate entities, based in Sri Lanka as well as overseas. These include institutions such as HNB, NDB, Seylan Bank, LOFC, Peoples Insurance, LB Finance and CDB. Overseas assignments include the Bank of Maldives, which is the premier bank in the Maldives and the Capital Markets Development Authority (CMDA), Maldives, which is the Regulatory Authority for the Capital Markets in the Republic of Maldives.

Some of its other notable achievements were, recognition at the 7th SLIBFI Awards ceremony (2018) adjudicated by KPMG, for the successful raising of USD Ten Million from a Middle Eastern entity on a 3-year tenor for LOFC, which was adjudged ‘Deal of the Year’. Its pioneering initiatives in the Capital Markets also include the development of the very first Shariah-complaint Money Market Fund, for which Adl was conferred an Award in 2013.

Adl Capital also secured the very first license granted by the SEC to a Market Intermediary for the provision of Margin Trading on a non-interest basis. At an individual level, the Managing Director, Ishrat Rauff, was appointed as the ‘National Consultant’ in the Asian Development Bank sponsored initiative for the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) of Sri Lanka, leading to an enabling mechanism for the listing of Sukuk on the CSE.

Name: Đồ câu Trung Đức
Description:
Từ xa xưa thú chơi câu cá vốn là thú chơi tao nhã của các bậc thi nhân. Ngày nay trong xã hội hiện đại, khối lượng công việc nhiều hơn, áp lực công việc lên mỗi người ngày càng nhiều và vô hình chung con người và gia đình chúng ta có nhiều stress hơn bất kỳ lúc nào. Thú chơi câu cá là hình thức giải trí lành mạnh nhất giúp mọi người và gia đình có những khoảng thời gian thư giãn sau những thời gian lao động và làm việc mệt mỏi, giảm stress cho mỗi cá nhân, góp phần gìn giữ hạnh phúc gia đình và tái tạo lại sức lao động cho xã hội
Từ sáng sớm khi ánh bình minh còn chưa bao phủ hết thành phố thì rất nhiều “cần thủ” với những bộ đồ nghề khác nhau, đã tranh thủ đến các con sông, kênh, rạch,… tìm một nơi thích hợp để thả câu.
Song, nhiều người trong số họ đến đây không phải để kiếm cá mà chủ yếu là giảm stress và tách ra khỏi sự ồn ào, căng thẳng của nhịp sống hiện đại.
Câu cá không đơn thuần là một thú chơi bình dị, dân dã mà nó cũng rất cầu kỳ và nghệ thuật. Nó đòi hỏi người đi câu phải có kỹ thuật và nắm bắt được đặc điểm từng khu vực câu cũng như sở thích ăn mồi của từng loại cá. Đặc biệt, người đi câu còn phải học tính kiên trì, nhẫn nại chờ đợi…cá cắn câu.
Trong nhịp sống hối hả của thời đại, nhiều bạn trẻ đã và đang lao vào những cuộc chơi tốn kém tiền của mà đánh mất những giá trị chân thật, rất đỗi bình thường, gần gũi, gắn liền với thiên nhiên.
Do đó, việc câu cá không đơn thuần là dùng cần câu để câu cá mà còn dạy mỗi chúng ta bài học về lòng kiên nhẫn, giúp chúng ta có không gian tĩnh lặng để suy nghĩ về những việc đã làm và từ đó có định hướng tốt hơn trong tương lai. 
Đồ câu cá Trung Đức chuyên bán các loại cần câu cá chính hãng, giá rẻ như cần câu máy, cần câu tay, cần câu lure, cần câu lục, cần câu cá lóc, cần câu đơn, rút, đài, cần câu cá biển, cần câu tôm, cần câu 2 khúc shimano, cần câu 3 khúc, cần câu lure máy đứng, cần câu lure máy ngang, cần câu iso, cần câu lăng xê máy câu cá, lưỡi câu cá, móc câu cá, mồi câu cá, dây câu cá, thời trang câu cá

Name: GPT-3 Venture Fund
Description:
We are a venture capital fund focused on AI implementations for business use, with a special emphasis on innovative applications involving GPT-3 and products similar to ChatGPT.  

Here is how the fund works.

First we identify startups using GPT-3 in innovative ways and are seeking investors.  Then we present these opportunities to our investors as an example of the kind of startups we would consider. If the investor likes the direction we are going, we invite the investor to become a limited partner with a soft commitment to invest a significant amount of money, typically a minimum of $1M USD. 

Once we raise our threshold funding target, which is presently $50M USD, we start vetting the opportunities and deploying capital. 

We are now in the earliest stage of this process where we assemble a team of experts to advise the fund on the viability of potential investments.  We are also open to hear pitches from technologists and entrepreneurs with novel applications of GPT-3 who are seeking funding.

Disease-Specific Indexes 
Poliwogg publishes and licenses disease-specific indexes (the “Poliwogg Indexes”), which are designed to underlie financial instruments such as swaps, forward and futures contracts, options, exchange traded funds, and other structured products.  Each individual Index is published monthly, and tracks the average cost per patient in the US of a particular disease or condition for the preceding twelve months.  The source data for the Indexes is comprehensive and unique paid claims data.

Bringing together informed analysis and big data, Poliwogg delivers innovative and proprietary indexes that enhance and complete the spectrum of sector based investment and hedging tools.  

Poliwogg believes that better price discovery will allow for better transfer and mitigation of risk, with the potential to improve the efficiency of the entire sector.  

The first disease-specific Poliwogg Index tracks Type 2 Diabetes, and represents the cost of treating one patient for one year suffering from Type 2 Diabetes. 


Poliwogg Equity Indexes
Poliwogg applies metrics specific to biotechnology and pharmaceuticals that are not applicable to other sectors or industries, resulting in highly idiosyncratic performance characteristics. Indexes are comprised of companies that are principally engaged in the US health care sector, with a strong emphasis on the dynamic small/mid-capitalization biotechnology segment.

-Poliwogg Medical Breakthroughs Index (TICKER: PMBI)
PMBI has been Licensed ALPS and is the basis for The ALPS Medical Breakthroughs Exchange Traded Fund

Name: Alumina Partners
Description:
Alumina Partners is a New York-based private investment partnership of experienced accredited investors who came together to bring sensible, responsive, accretive, non-predatory and non-disruptive institutional investment back to the emerging growth arena. We work diligently with the companies we invest in to better understand the unique challenges they face and the opportunities they can take advantage of when well-capitalized. That central focus on the issuer’s-eye-view is reflected in the diversity, flexibility and scalability of the investments we make. 

It is our firmly held belief that long-term success in the emerging growth arena is most often the result of capable management teams. We share their persistence of vision and seek to introduce a strong and steady flow of direct capital investment to accelerate their growth.

That persistence of vision is the result of our independence: Alumina is not a capital advisor, we are principal investors.  As a result we are not distracted by redemptions or trend-following. We are in the business of directly investing our capital in the issuers and management teams that we believe in. That focus gives us the flexibility to adapt our terms to reflect each issuer’s needs and the agility to move quickly from term sheet to closing and disbursement.

Our mandate includes investment in a broad range of publicly traded securities including equities, debt securities, derivatives and structured products: as long as the terms make sense for both sides we will give any structure serious consideration.

Name: National Depository of Ukraine
Description:
The National Depository of Ukraine was established according to the Law of Ukraine “On the National Depository System and Peculiarities of Securities Electronic Trading in Ukraine” to ensure the functioning of the common depository accounting system.

On December 18, 1998 the Securities and Stock Market State Commission and the National Bank of Ukraine signed the Agreement on Establishing the National Depository of Ukraine. The state registration took place on May 17, 1999.
 
NDU’s share capital makes up UAH 103 000 000. The State owns 86 % of shares, from them, by the Securities and Stock Market State Commission. Besides, 14 % shares of  NDU belong more than 20  to stock market participants of Ukraine.

On September 19, 2006 the National Depository of Ukraine (the NDU) was granted a license for realization of depository activity as a securities depository for a term of 10 years by the Securities and Stock Market State Commission. (series AB #189650)

Under this license the NDU starts the operational activity, namely safekeeping and servicing of securities circulation on securities accounts and issuer’s operations as to the securities issued.

On April 21, 2008, the State Securities and Stock Market Commission of Ukraine granted to the National Depository of Ukraine a ten-year-valid license to carry out clearing and settlement activity. (series AB #397921).

Name: Coventina Foundation

Coventina stewards an ecosystem of Web3 developers, impact entrepreneurs and forward-thinking funders, orchestrating the creation of thriving economies and coordination at scale. All built in a truly decentralized web hosting and app infrastructure. 

Problem ~ Solutions
Centralization of power and Data Sovereignty →  Transitioning from centralization and power concentration to an age of greater sovereignty and collective intelligence. 

Extraction and inequality → We build resilient and decentralized economic infrastructures aiming at healthy patterns of flow. 

Disconnection from nature → Our technologies align with living systems dynamics.

Name: Asociación Salvadoreña de Intermediarios Bursátiles - ASIB
Description:
Anteriormente conocida como la Asociación de Casa de Corredores de Bolsa de El Salvador (ACABOLSA), la organización fue fundada en Julio de 1992 para agremiar a los participantes del mercado de valores salvadoreño y reformando sus estatutos hasta Noviembre de 2008, ésta cambia su nombre de persona jurídica a la Asociación Salvadoreña de Intermediarios Bursátiles (ASIB).

La ASIB tiene como propósitos:

1. Defender los intereses gremiales de sus miembros,
2. Procurar el acercamiento y armonía entre sus asociados.
3. Velar porque la actividad de sus miembros se realice dentro del más alto nivel de responsabilidad, ética, competencia profesional, moralidad y respeto a las disposiciones legales internas de la Asociación.
4. Servir como mediador entre los miembros asociados.
5. Mantener relaciones de cooperación con otras asociaciones similares y afines.
6.  Patrocinar y organizar conferencias, congresos y eventos relacionados a las operaciones bursátiles a nivel técnico, ético y profesional.
7. Promover el desarrollo del mercado de capitales en El Salvador.

Actualmente, la Asociación promociona en conjunto con sus miembros y con la Bolsa de Valores de El Salvador el Diplomado Bursátil, diseñada para que los participantes adquieran todos los conocimientos y la información relacionada con el mercado de valores de El Salvador, su funcionamiento y operatividad, permitiendo además la formación de futuros Agentes Corredores de Bolsa.

Name: Scherzer & Co. AG
Description:
Die Scherzer & Co. AG ist eine Beteiligungsgesellschaft, die sich zum Ziel gesetzt hat, durch sowohl sicherheits- als auch chancenorientierte Investments einen langfristig angelegten Vermögensaufbau zu betreiben.

Zu unseren sicherheitsorientierten Investments zählen Beteiligungen in Abfindungswerte und Value-Aktien, die einen „natürlichen Floor“ besitzen und so in ihrem Börsenkurs nach unten abgesichert erscheinen. Auch eine exzellente Bilanz- und Ergebnisqualität im Bereich der Value Aktien kann den Ausschlag für eine Beteiligung geben.

Chancen sehen wir in Unternehmen, die bei kalkulierbarem Risiko ein erhöhtes Chancenpotenzial aufweisen. Dabei konzentrieren wir uns auf ausgewählte, wachstumsstarke Unternehmen mit einem nachhaltigen Geschäftsmodell. Aber auch Sondersituationen, die attraktive Chance-Risiko-Verhältnisse enthalten, sind oft einer näheren Betrachtung wert. Darüber hinaus nehmen wir gern an aussichtsreichen Kapitalmaßnahmen oder Umplatzierungen teil.




Scherzer & Co. AG is a Cologne-based investment holding company whose object is to pursue long-term capital appreciation for its shareholders through investments that are both safety-oriented and opportunistic.

From safety-oriented aspects investments are undertaken in takeover bid/squeeze out stocks and value stocks where the market price appears underpinned on the downside. Price-stabilizing features may be a ‘natural floor’ in the case of structural measures, either announced or in progress or excellent balance sheet and earnings quality in the case of value stocks.

Scherzer also invests in companies offering enhanced opportunity potential at predictable risk, focusing especially on select growth companies with a sustainable business model. However, the market is also analysed for special situations that can offer attractive risk-reward profiles for diverse reasons. In addition, Scherzer gladly seizes upon opportunities to participate in promising capital measures or secondary placings.

POWER OF BLOCKCHAIN
It is the nature of markets to push expectations about the future into current prices. Since rates of future adoption are highly uncertain, high volatility is inevitable, as expectations wax and wane with coin-related news, and the coin market rationalizes high expected returns with high volatility (no free lunch).A stable coin is that is pegged to another stable asset, like gold or the US dollar.

Name: Competitive Scope
Description: Competitive Scope refers to the breadth and depth of a company's target market and the strategic approach it adopts to gain a competitive advantage within that market. This concept plays a crucial role in determining how firms position themselves against rivals—whether through broad market strategies targeting mass audiences or focused approaches aimed at niche segments. Analyzing competitive scope involves evaluating factors such as industry dynamics, customer segmentation, value chain positioning, and differentiation strategies. By clearly defining its competitive scope, a company can align its resources, capabilities, and strategic initiatives to achieve sustainable growth and market leadership. This study/tool/framework explores the dimensions of competitive scope, offering insights into how businesses can effectively balance scale and specialization in response to competitive pressures and evolving consumer demands.

Name: Montenegro Stock Exchange JSC (Montenegroberza AD)
Description:
Montenegro Stock Exchange was established in June 1993, pursuant to the Law on Money and the Capital Market.
The first shareholders of the Stock Exchange were the Republic of Montenegro and four banks from Montenegro.

In the period from 1994 to 2000,the Montenegro Stock Exchange traded mostly gyro money and short-term securities, as it was allowed by the existing legislation.

The first brokerage houses in Montenegro were established in 1996.

The transfer of authority of regulating securities markets from the Former Republic of Yugoslavia to its member states required the adoption of the Montenegrin Law on Securities, which did not regulate the issue of short-term securities or trading with them. In this manner, following the adoption of the aforementioned Law, in Montenegro Stock Exchange are trading long-term debt and equity securities. 

On 20 September 2001, six Montenegrin financial institutions and Brokers Business Association founded the New Securities Exchange of Montenegro. In this period, the activities on the Montenegro Stock Exchange were running very low (due to the failure to meet the legal requirements for trade in securities). 

Montenegro Stock Exchange completed the final harmonization with the Law on Securities Montenegro in 2004, which led to a situation in which, until the end of 2010, there were two stock exchanges operating. The start of operations of the New Securities Exchange of Montenegro is significant because for the first time in Montenegro capital market transaction were executing by electronic trading system.

In the beginning of 2011, the two Montenegrin stock exchanges were integrated, through the merge of the New Securities Exchange of Montenegro to the Montenegro Stock Exchange. 

The first working day on the single Montenegro Stock Exchange was 10 of January 2011.
In December 2013, Borsa İstanbul became a shareholder of Montenegro Stock Exchange by acquiring 24.38% of its capital.

Name: AX99 Investments
Description:
Strategic Investment in a Volatile Year: AX99 2024 Approach
20.09.24 By Alexsandro Barros da Silva | AX99 | Strategic Investment & Risk Management


2024, until now, has been a challenging year for investors, for that reason, we're proud to have achieved a 28% positive return despite the difficult conditions.

Our strategy was built on understanding historical central bank cycles, inflation behavior, stagflation, and currency dynamics.
I focused primarily on equities, specifically in sectors like renewable energy, EVs, Luxury(CG) and industrials. These sectors were hit hard in 2022 and 2023, presenting opportunities to buy at their lows. Navigating sharp market volatility required a disciplined approach:

 Week 1: Identify buying opportunities
 Week 2: Analyze market trends and opportunities
 Week 3: Take profits and build cash positions
 Week 4: Hedge and capitalize

We repeated this cycle monthly, adapting to a fast-moving market—almost like compressing a year’s worth of market behavior into one month.
This strategy will continue until the economy signals either a recession or a soft landing.

 Join Us at AX99!
At AX99,  anyone can invest with us. We also offer a range of services, including financial architecture, retirement plans, investment plans, and more. Our mission is to provide personalized strategies that align with your financial goals and aspirations.

Name: Ann Arbor Angels
Description:
The Ann Arbor Angels is a membership organization of Angel investors that invest in early-stage innovation based companies, with a primary focus in Southeast Michigan. 

A2A is not a fund. Our members collaborate on due diligence, but make individual investment decisions.  Members recognize the inherent risks of early-stage investing.

Ann Arbor Angel members are focused on investment returns, while often additionally motivated by a desire to give back to the community, to help build successful companies and to participate in the satisfaction that comes from this involvement.

Members of the Ann Arbor Angels are accredited investors who invest in companies primarily in Michigan. Broadly defined our members fall into four categories:

Guardian Angels who bring both entrepreneurial and industry expertise.

Entrepreneur Angels who have experience starting companies but come from different sectors.

Operational Angels who bring industry experience and expertise, but from large, established companies, and lack first-hand experience with the travails of a startup.

Financial Angels who typically invest purely for the financial return.

Name: AIM-Watch
Description:
As arguably the world’s most successful growth market, the AIM Market is hugely popular with companies looking for investment capital, as well as with private and institutional investors.

However, due to the number of companies listed, the relative lack of resources available compared to the Main Market, and the sharing of misinformation by those intentionally or unintentionally ramping particular investments, investors can easily be caught out or left in the dark when trying to invest in the best smaller cap companies on AIM.

To help counteract this, AIM-Watch was established as a trusted source of information to help support other private investors who are passionate about following the FTSE AIM All-Share. Here you can find: insights on AIM companies and trends to help focus your own research; insights on the trading of smaller cap companies; insights on the workings of the London Stock Exchange; an up-to-date record of all AIM companies by sector; an up-to-date record of all AIM trading dates for the diary; and an overview of the most important AIM news and announcements.

None of the information contained should be considered as financial advice, simply a means for you to go and conduct your own research and due diligence. If you feel as though the content can be improved or developed upon in any way, we would be very happy to hear from you.

Name: Weave Social Finance
Description:
Weave Social Finance provides consulting and fund management services for social enterprises and businesses based in low income communities.  Weave specializes in facilitating funding through the New Markets Tax Credit program for businesses that will create quality jobs and/or provide needed products and services in low income communities.  Weave’s primary focus for the NMTC program is on helping to raise capital for “triple-bottom-line” businesses in rural communities in under-served states.
 
In 2019, Weave facilitated a $12 million Federal NMTC and $9.9 million Kentucky State NMTC transaction supporting the first full scale manufacturing plant for Danimer Scientific in Winchester, KY.  The company’s bioplastics replace petroleum based plastics for use in the creation of biodegradable straws and food packaging.

In late 2019, Weave facilitated a $8.5 million Federal NMTC transaction supporting the improvements to the main campus and expansion of Laradon Hall Society’s program space for developmentally disabled students and adults.

In early 2018, Weave facilitated a $14 million NMTC transaction supporting the construction of the first manufacturing for Pursell Agritech in rural Sylacauga, Alabama. The company has developed innovative environmentally friendly controlled release fertilizer technologies and micronutrient delivery systems.

In early 2015, Weave facilitated a $12 million New Markets Tax Credit transaction to support the construction of the Goodwill Opportunity Center in Charlotte, NC.  The Center will provide a medical clinic, credit union, job training, and other social services under one roof for Goodwill’s clients.  The facility will also house Goodwill’s administrative offices, a large warehouse, and an outlet store.  www.goodwillsp.org

In 2017, Weave helped facilitate Rocky Mount Downtown Community Facility in Rocky Mount, NC in partnership with the municipality. It is a mixed-use community facility including a health clinic.

Name: Pars Capital Partners, LLC.
Description:
Pars Capital Partners, LLC is a transaction based firm launched to provide services exclusively to the companies operating in the fragmented Contract Research Organization (CRO) and Contract Manufacturing Organization (CMO and CDMO) ecosystem. The CRO, CMO and CDMO subsectors are very fragmented in general and extremely fragmented in the micro, lower and middle portions of the market. At the same time, the nature of the services which the companies operating in the subsector deliver to their sponsors, and the numerous therapeutic areas they operate across, make the understanding of the industry very complex, requiring layers of knowledge and time to master the landscape.

Our thesis: a generalist banker, operating part-time or for the first time on a transaction in the CRO/CMO/CDMO sub-sector, cannot fully unlock the value of an asset in a liquidity event. At the same time, it is not operationally feasible or economical for a generalist banker to build the depth of knowledge and gather necessary data points needed to timely and fully unlock the value of the transaction for a single event.

Pars Capital Partners, LLC is fully committed to the sub-sector; our goal is to provide superior services to the companies operating within the subsector. The firm has developed a proprietary database of the companies operating in the landscape, has developed relationships with strategic, financial, analytical, governmental, media and educational stakeholders in the industry and can locate acquisition assets in a timely and efficient manner. On the Sell-Side, the firm has developed a database of transaction statistics to build the case for fully unlocking the divestiture value.

We expect to target companies involved in the exploration, processing, production, and domestic refining and recycling of minerals essential to national defense, clean energy independence, and technological leadership, preferably with enabling technologies.

理财易站于2016年一季度完成A轮融资3000万，投资方是基业长盛投资。基业长盛专注于投资具有行业竞争壁垒的金融企业与高成长企业，以及传统行业的国企改制。理财易站已经在资产管理和智能理财业务奠定了坚实的基于数学算法的量化模型和自动化配置的模型和技术基础，2016年也会发展迅速，计划在2017年完成B轮融资。  
理财易站的金融技术团队通过独创的产品分析流程，运用科学定量研究和具有前瞻性的定性研究，成功研发了具有独创性的财务分析模型以及核心投资决策模型等实用型理财工具，尤其在公募、券商集合理财和私募基金投研方面独树一帜。

理财易站坚持“专业、独立、客观”的原则，致力于为中国中产阶级投资者提供包括理财市场研究、金融产品分析；通过数学算法建立筛选模型，根据客户的资产状况以及风险承受力进行多维度的客户画像后，进行智能推荐和智能匹配。从而为客户提供科学、理性的财务状况分析、包括个人和家庭资产配置建议在内的综合性理财服务，并提供针对性和个性化的理财配置建议，帮助客户实现个人和家庭资产的稳健增值。

核心竞争力
智能投顾：首先拥有独特的基金动态筛选模型，这是目前行业里唯一用数学算法实现的动态基金筛选模型和风险收益组合模型。结合个人投资者的具体风险偏好与理财目标，通过后台算法与用户友好型界面相结合，根据客户的风险收益比，利用数学算法跟踪客户的资产配置模型进行动态配置建议，并持续跟踪市场变化，在这些资产偏离目标配置时对其进行动态调整建议和再平衡；并且还拥有业内唯一的基金一键组合购买，根据客户风险偏好、资金规模和流动性特点，提供起点、流动性和风险收益不同类的产品，再加上随着客户生命周期理财需求的变化，自动化调整理财目标，进行智能产品组合、大类资产配置的理财服务。

金融理财工具：
模拟账本，帮助客户通过虚拟资金账户体验动态、实时地模拟基金理财。同时附有基金定投和基金转换功能，提供多样化的理财管理；
理财账户诊断，通过数学算法将客户的风险偏好与客户的现有资产组合对比，自动得出诊断报告。对客户账户中的基金组合进行风险分解与收益归因，同时根据客户的历史交易行为操作对客户进行用户画像，从而向客户提出切合自身的理财诊断和建议；

量化模型：在传统的MVO模型和RP模型基础上，改善了收益和风险的计算方式与度量方法，构建独特的资产配置模型；采用神经网络、小波分解等工业算法对股指进行择时分析，构建大类资产择时模型；通过对基金基本面因子、价值因子、基金经理指标的筛选，构建基于机器学习和遗传算法的公募FOF筛选模型；依托于VaR风险模型，根据风险因子分解构建多因子模型，预测未来波动情况，构建基金组合风险评价模型。

Name: Colombo Stock Watch
Description:
ColomboStockWatch.com (CSW) is now the leading source of online investment information on companies listed on the Colombo Stock Exchange. CSW now provides more information and more tools for investors than any other free information source in Sri Lanka. Both retail and institutional investors are increasingly using CSW to obtain investment information due to the vast amount of content available, ease of use and advanced filtering capability.

What is Investor Relations?

Investor relations is the term used to describe the ongoing activity of companies communicating with the investment community. While the communication that quoted companies undertake is a mix of regulatory and voluntary activities, investor relations is essentially the part of stock market life that sees companies interacting with existing shareholders, potential investors, analysts and journalists.

 

Why commit to investor relations?

Fundamentally, the remit of investor relations is not only to create an awareness and understanding of your company amongst the investment community, it is also to help quoted companies gain access to capital and achieve liquidity in, and fair valuation for their shares.

 
Access to capital

Liquidity

Fair valuation
 

Your Investor Relations info on CSW

You invest a significant amount of funds with the relevant publisher to come up with your Annual Report. However, much of the investment community does not have access to the key information it provides as there is no summarization of critical information provided anywhere. CSW now provides a comprehensive and highly accessible platform to provide this information to the investment community who are ready to invest on the Colombo Stock Exchange.

 Volatility

Most investors take a long term view; they would ride the ups and the downs, which becomes frustrating as one minute you’re in profit and the next you’re not. It’s important to realize that volatility is a good thing to traders, as is the saying buy low and sell high. Buying a good share at the wrong time is a mistake, technical tools help to almost perfect your timing, and when it comes to the market timing is everything.

 

Time = Risk
The longer you hold onto a share the higher the risk there is to lose money, things can change over time. Time also = money, you will often hear people say they don’t have time to trade, but they have no idea of what they are missing out on. What if you could make a 10% return in 10 minutes?

You would say impossible, what if we traded and made 10% in 10 minutes you would say incredible. We will do just that, remember it costs nothing to listen.

De APT is voorstander van efficiënte, transparante, robuuste en eerlijke handel in financiële instrumenten met een level playing field voor alle deelnemers. Market makers spelen een belangrijke rol op deze financiële markten. Zij verschaffen liquiditeit aan andere marktdeelnemers en dragen bij aan een transparante en efficiënte prijsvorming. De Nederlandse market makers zijn toonaangevend op de wereldwijde financiële markten.
 
De APT overlegt namens haar leden met onder meer toezichthouders, ministeries en de politiek. Ook onderhoudt de APT contacten met Euronext Amsterdam en andere beurzen en treedt zij in gesprek met andere belangenorganisaties.

Name: The Great River Company, Inc.
Description:
The Great River Company (“GRC”) is a Minneapolis-based private investment company backed by business owning families for family and founder owned businesses seeking liquidity for ownership transitions, career and financial opportunities for management teams, and experience and capital for organic and acquisitive growth. 

GRC is unique because we are purposefully built to be a long-term catalyst for growth and the overall betterment of companies and their stakeholders. We do this by pairing a long-term, potentially indefinite, hold period with a flexible approach to investing, which includes the potential for significant continued ownership for existing shareholders, ownership opportunities for current and future management and employees, and a vast network that your team can draw upon to tackle business challenges.

What Sets Us Apart
GRC is an alternative to traditional private equity firms who think in terms of three to five year investment periods; we think in terms of successful Company outcomes over decades. We were founded on the belief that we can achieve more together than on our own, and that a successful outcome is one where all stakeholders benefit: shareholders, employees and their families, the community where the business resides, the customers the Company serves, and the vendors that provide services/products to the enterprise.

What We Do
GRC provides transitional solutions for business owners seeking succession planning and liquidity options, while preserving their legacy and maintaining the culture that makes their company great. Our transitional solutions are flexible and can come in the form of non-control and control equity, preferred equity or other structured investments.

What We Look For
•	Preference for family or entrepreneur owned businesses
•	Strong alignment with management
•	Potential for organic and/or acquisition growth
•	Revenue greater than $10 million
•	EBITDA greater than $2 million
•	Headquartered in North America

Sem ele, não há passado para ser aprendido, presente para ser escrito e futuro para ser vislumbrado.

No entanto, o legado só pode ser construído a partir das escolhas diárias de cada indivíduo que afetam não só sua vida, mas também daqueles pelos quais ele deseja ser lembrado.

A Capital79 surge com uma forte vontade de auxiliar o investidor, a partir de escolhas inteligentes, ter a liberdade para crescer e atingir os seus objetivos familiares e pessoais que o possibilite a criar seu próprio legado.

Buscamos nos aprofundar na vida financeira e patrimonial do investidor para apresentar oportunidades – muitas vezes desconhecidas por ele – e ferramentas financeiras que o ajudará a tomar as melhores decisões.

É criando valor sem parcialidade que a Capital79 ajuda você a ser lembrado não só por aquilo que deixará para as pessoas, mas pelas escolhas responsáveis que o darão a liberdade para você criar o legado que será deixado nas pessoas.

Liberdade para crescer é feita de escolhas.
Escolhas começam um legado.
O seu legado começa na Capital79.

Our Mission:

Education: Our primary mission is to provide a supportive environment where members can learn about options trading and related financial concepts. Through workshops, seminars, and guest speaker events, we aim to equip our members with the knowledge and skills necessary to navigate the complexities of options markets.

Hands-On Experience: We believe that experiential learning is essential for mastering any skill. The Options Club offers simulated trading competitions, case studies, and collaborative projects that allow members to apply theoretical knowledge in a practical setting. This hands-on experience helps bridge the gap between theory and real-world application.

Community: The Options Club is more than just a student organization; it's a community. We provide a space for open discussions, idea sharing, and mutual growth. Our club welcomes individuals from diverse academic backgrounds, ensuring a well-rounded and enriching experience for all members.

Risk Management: Understanding and managing risk is crucial in the financial world. Our club encourages members to develop strategies that align with their risk tolerance and investment goals.

Collaboration: Collaboration is at the heart of the financial industry. We encourage collaboration among members by organizing group projects, study sessions, and trading simulations. 

Join us to expand your knowledge, build your network, and embark on a journey towards becoming a well-informed participant in the world of finance.
Connect with us to learn, grow, and thrive in the exciting realm of options trading!

Name: 中天国富证券有限公司
Description:
一、公司介绍：中天国富证券有限公司（下称“中天国富或公司”）成立于2004年，是由中天金融集团股份有限公司（下称“中天金融集团”）控股的证券公司。 2015年12月，中天金融集团成为公司的实际控制人。 2016年7月，公司注册地址正式迁入贵州省贵阳市。 2016年9月，一支国内大型券商高管团队加入中天国富，公司业务能力与服务理念全面得到升级，致力于成为民营的优秀券商。 2017年底，公司净资产达到54.48亿元人民币，并计划在未来实现全牌照、全国性布局。 截止到2017年末，公司已设立上海、北京、深圳、贵州、广东、湖南、山东、云南、四川、湖北、吉林、浙江、江苏、安徽、内蒙古、河南、宁波等17家分公司 ，2019年计划完成30家分公司的建设。 
二、股东介绍：中天金融集团股份有限公司（股票代码000540）创立于1978年，是贵州省第一家上市公司、旗下员工近2万人，是贵州省内成长最快、规模最大的上市公司之一。中天金融集团旗下有保险、证券、基金、公募基金销售等多家金融分子公司。目前，民营银行、再保险、财产保险等金融机构资质正在履行相应审批程序。中天金融集团基本形成了以保险、证券、基金、民营银行及普惠金融、科技金融、绿色金融一体化的生态链体系。 
三、团队介绍：中天国富拥有一支资深的高管团队，其核心团队成员均由国内大型券商资深高管和业务骨干组成。整支队伍拥有十年以上证券市场从业经验和强大的管理能力，具有规模化、专业化、高学历、实战经验丰富等特点，且在国内外资本市场拥有深厚的人脉资源、客户资源和资金资源。 
四、公司荣誉：2017年，中天国富并购重组业务实现重大突破，以191.07亿元的交易规模排名第7，按业务数量统计排名第10。 2017年，公司荣获“金蝉奖•2017年度证券公司创新奖“。 2017年，公司荣获“领航中国”年度评评选——2017“杰出市场竞争力奖”。 2018年，公司荣获“2018中国区证券（行业）新锐投行君鼎奖”。 2018年第一季度，中天国富并购重组业务数量迈入行业排名前三。

RIVA Markets leverages cutting-edge technologies such as Blockchain and AI to revolutionise the Private and Real Estate Debt, Corporate Bonds and Funds Market with a novel Capital Market Infrastructure creating Accessibility, Transparency, Efficiency and Liquidity.

We see Tokenised Real World Assets (RWA) as the future of Asset Management, but we also see it as a transformative process, supporting the industry in a smooth transition from traditional to securitised to tokenised Asset Management

Our End-to-End Solution consists of 4 integrated Modules: 

RIVA Prime - Loan Origination System for native On-Chain Loan Origination and Servicing.

RIVA Securities -  Securitisation & Tokenisation of Asset & Mortgage Backed Securities as single loan tranches and pools of loans for RIVA Prime and 3rd party loan issuance on-chain-off-balance sheet.

RIVA Markets - Primary Issuance & Secondary Market Trading Marketplace for professional and institutional Investors.

RIVA Capital - Fund Management Platform to issue and manage funds fully digital and on-chain.

We therewith offer investors such as Private & Real Estate Debt Funds, Asset Manager, Banks, Insurance, Hedge Funds and Family Offices access to global Private & Real Estate Debt Investments, and a fully integrated infrastructure to transact and manage those assets in the most efficient and innovative way.

Name: CODA Markets, Inc.
Description:

CODA Markets’ on-demand auctions neutralize the speed arms race through a pause that allows for competition among trade responses, while also minimizing the potential for gaming or order leakage and the transaction costs associated with execution delays and fragmentation. 

CODA Markets, Inc. is a registered broker-dealer, member FINRA and SIPC, and wholly owned by PDQ Enterprises, LLC. CODA Markets, Inc. was formerly known as PDQ ATS, Inc.

Name: The SPAC Podcast
Description:
Welcome to The SPAC Podcast — your front-row seat to the dynamic world of Special Purpose Acquisition Companies.

Hosted by Michael Blankenship, a leading capital markets attorney and partner at Winston & Strawn LLP, and Joshua Wilson, executive producer and capital markets advisor, The SPAC Podcast brings you candid conversations, insider insights, and sharp analysis from the people shaping the future of the SPAC market.

Whether you’re a sponsor, investor, founder, attorney, banker, or just curious about the mechanics and momentum behind SPACs — this show is your go-to source for education, strategy, and real-world stories from the dealmakers behind the deals.

 What You’ll Hear

In each episode, we’ll unpack:

The structure, lifecycle, and mechanics of SPACs — from IPO to de-SPAC
Legal and regulatory insights that matter to sponsors and targets
Interviews with founders, investors, and advisors who’ve navigated successful transactions
Trends and forecasts from the front lines of capital markets
Lessons learned, deal strategies, and ways to leverage SPACs as a growth vehicle

We’re not just watching the SPAC market — we’re talking to the people building it.

 Who This Show is For

SPAC Sponsors & CEOs
Institutional and Private Investors
Investment Bankers & Corporate Attorneys
Venture-backed Founders and Startups
Private Equity & Family Offices
Finance Professionals and Capital Markets Enthusiasts

 Subscribe, Follow, and Join the Conversation

This isn’t just a show — it’s a platform for education, connection, and business development in the SPAC ecosystem. Subscribe now on Apple, Spotify, or YouTube.
