Name: Amstel Securities
Description:
Amstel Securities NV was founded in 1989 and has all through its life steadfastly held on to its two guiding principles: it trades strictly on an agency basis and it only trades with professional, institutional investors. It has also always been management-owned and avoided conflicts of interest by not engaging in proprietary trading, investment banking activities and activities like that. 

Amstel started out as an equity and equity-derivatives specialist for the Far Eastern markets and is as such well known among European institutional investors. In the last six years, it has grown strongly into a global operation with nine offices in all major time zones, employing just over 100 people. 

Amstel prides itself on employing a dedicated and experienced sales staff that knows that long-term client relationships can only be build by providing a quality service. 

Amstel covers a very wide product range, from equities and equity derivatives to energy derivatives, high yield and distressed bonds and money markets, swaps, forex and forwards. 

All of its business it settled on a DVP-basis through its settlement agents Deutsche Bank AG, Kas Bank NV or Pershing LLC.

Name: TDU
Description:
Das Netzwerk für Türkische und Deutsche Unternehmer. Die TDU übernimmt die Brückenfunktion zwischen den Unternehmen innerhalb von Deutschland.

Die TDU wurde im April 1996 von 28 Unternehmern türkischer Herkunft in Berlin gegründet. Mittlerweile hat der Verein 280 Mitglieder. Etwa zehn Prozent der Mitglieder sind deutscher Herkunft. Die Mitglieder der TDU sind in fast allen Wirtschaftsbranchen tätig und repräsentieren somit die gesamte Bandbreite des Berliner Unternehmerspektrums von kleinen und mittelständischen Unternehmen (KMU’s).

Die wirtschaftlichen Aktivitäten der türkischstämmigen Unternehmen in Berlin haben ein hohes Niveau erreicht. Im Jahr 2008 existierten schätzungsweise über 9000 kleine und mittelständische Betriebe türkischer Herkunft in Berlin, die ca. 29.000 Mitarbeiter beschäftigen. Diese Betriebe erwirtschaften laut IHK einen Jahresumsatz von etwa 3,5 Milliarden Euro.

Das Engagement der TDU liegt darin, die türkische (Business-) Community zu unterstützen sowie zu ökonomischen, politischen, sozialen und kulturellen Themen Stellung zu beziehen und aktiv daran teilzunehmen. Um dies zu verwirklichen organisiert die TDU regelmäßig Veranstaltungen zu aktuellen Themen und strebt einen offenen, konstruktiv-kritischen Dialog mit Institutionen, anderen Verbänden und politischen Parteien an.

Innerhalb von Berlin werden die Themen, die die Mitglieder der TDU und die türkische Gesellschaft direkt betreffen, mit den verantwortlichen Stellen des Senats, der IHK, der Handwerkskammer, den Bezirken, den Ausbildungsstätten und weiteren Organisationen besprochen und sowie wichtige Projekte ins Leben gerufen.

Durch ihre vielfältigen Aktivitäten bildet die TDU einen Knotenpunkt in der türkischen Community in Berlin-Brandenburg Sie ist eine Anlaufstelle für Personen aus unterschiedlichen gesellschaftlichen Kreisen des In- und Auslandes geworden.

Description:

Sherpa was founded by Principals with over 35 years of experience in the real estate lending industry. امروزه توسعه صنعتي و اقتصادي كشور نيازمند بهبود سيستمها و روشهای مديريت و ارتقای سطح کارآيی  موسسه های دولتی و خصوصی از طريق اجرای برنامه های مناسب آموزشی و نيز کمک به سياستگذاران در يافتن کمبودها و تنگناهای مديريتي اجرای طرحهاي مورد نظرشان ميباشد.
لذا استفاده از تجارب و توانمندیها و توجه به ضرورتها و پاسخگويي به نیازهای مديريتي جامعه صنعتی، خدماتي و توليدي كشور از طريق ترویج، توسعه و كاربردیسازی فناوریهای نوین مدیریت در حوزههای مختلف مديريت مانند كیفیت، بهرهوری، منابع انسانی، فناوري اطلاعات، مدیریت اسلامی و ... مقولهاي حياتي محسوب ميشود كه اين مهم از طریق انجام پژوهش، مشاوره و آموزش هدفمند در حوزههاي مختلف مديريتي محقق خواهد گشت.
جهت تحقق اين مهم، يكي از مؤلفههاي اصلي و اساسي توزيع مناسب خدمات آموزشي و مشاورهاي با رعايت امكانات و اعتبارات موجود و نظر به وضعيت مطلوب است. از اين رو لازم است در توزيع مناسب و تخصيص كارآمد امكانات و فرصتها ار تمركز خدمات در منطقهاي واحد جلوگيري شود و با در نظر گرفتن نيازهاي مناطق جهت ارائه خدمات آموزشي، مشاورهاي و تحقيق و پژوهش به نحو احسن برنامهريزي گردد.
در این راستا سازمان مديريت صنعتي، با بیش از 50 سال فعاليت، كماكان اصليترين متولي توسعه ي مديريت در بنگاههاي اقتصادي و صنعتي كشور  و همچنين مهمترین تولید کننده و توسعه دهنده فرهنگ مدیریت حرفهای محسوب ميشود. این سازمان با اتخاذ سياستهاي مرتبط با توسعه شبكه نمايندگيهاي خود و به منظور افزایش ضریب تأثیر در نظام مدیریت كشور، از سالها قبل، نمایندگی های خود را در برخی از استانهای مستعد كشور ایجاد نمودهاست.
نمایندگی استان قم این سازمان در سال 1391 همزمان با  پنجاهمین سال فعالیت سازمان مرکزی تأسیس شده است. این نمایندگی در حال حاضر در سه حوزه اصلی آموزش، مشاوره و تحقیق با کادری مجرب و متخصص شامل اساتید برتر دانشگاهها و موسسات آموزشی و  مشاوران خبره سازمانها آماده ارئه خدمات به صنایع مختلف استان میباشد.

Name: REEM Capital Corp. TSXV:REEM
Description:
Seegnal Inc. Completes Qualifying Transaction and Begins Trading on TSX Venture Exchange

We are pleased to announce that on August 29, 2025, REEM Capital Corp. (TSXV: REEM.P) successfully completed its previously announced Qualifying Transaction with Kalron Holdings Ltd., the parent company of Seegnal eHealth Ltd.

Following the transaction, the company has been renamed Seegnal Inc., and its common shares will resume trading on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol SEGN.

Transaction Highlights:

The transaction was completed under an amended and restated definitive securities exchange agreement dated January 27, 2025.

In connection with closing, Seegnal and Kalron completed non-brokered private placements of subscription receipts for gross proceeds of $3.47 million.

All outstanding convertible debentures and SAFEs of Kalron converted into ordinary shares prior to closing.

At closing, Seegnal acquired all of the issued and outstanding shares of Kalron in exchange for Seegnal shares and warrants.

Each subscription receipt converted into one Seegnal share and one warrant exercisable at $1.20 per share for 24 months.

As a result, Kalron is now a wholly owned subsidiary of Seegnal.

Capital Structure Post-Transaction:

45,319,031 common shares outstanding.

Former Kalron shareholders collectively hold ~80% of issued and outstanding shares.

29,789,007 warrants and 250,000 stock options outstanding.

Name: Mannheim Finance & Controlling Club e.V. (MFCC)
Description:
Der im Jahr 2005 gegründete Mannheim Finance und Controlling Club e.V. sieht seine Kernkompetenzen in den Bereichen Accounting, Controlling und Finance. Ein besonderer Fokus unseres Vereins liegt dabei auf den Schnittstellen dieser Fachbereiche und den Herausforderungen, die sich in diesen Bereichen in der heutigen Zeit ergeben. In diesem Zusammenhang möchte der Verein einen Brückenschlag zwischen Theorie und  Praxis bilden, indem er unter anderem Kontakte zu Banken, Industrie und Beratungsunternehmen herstellt und vertieft. Hierbei ist es im Sinne des Vereins, zum Wohle der Universität, der Studentenschaft und den beteiligten Unternehmen zu handeln, um auf diesem Wege einen Erfolg für alle beteiligten Seiten zu erreichen.

Weiterhin sieht der Verein es als Aufgabe, anwenderorientiere Veranstaltungen für Studenten der Universität Mannheim zu organisieren, um in den oben genannten Bereichen Wissen und Kontakte zu vermitteln. Bei der Organisation oder Teilnahme an diesen Veranstaltungen erhalten die Studenten somit die Möglichkeit, ihre Kenntnisse zu erweitern und zu vertiefen. All diese Angebote werden den Studenten durch die Unterstützung renommierter Unternehmen zur Verfügung gestellt.

Unser Verein zeichnet sich auch dadurch aus, dass wir neuen Ideen sehr offen gegenüberstehen und Neumitglieder bei uns vom ersten Tag an wichtige Aufgaben und Verantwortung übernehmen können. So entstand vor etwa zwei Jahren bei einem Neumitglied die Idee, eine Veranstaltung zu entwickeln, welche eine Brücke zwischen der in Deutschland beliebtesten Sportart und der Welt der Finanzen schlägt. Durch kontinuierliche Ausarbeitung dieser Idee sowie die Begleitung des Projektteams während der verschiedenen Planungsphasen durch den MFCC wurde das Projekt zu dem, was es heute ist: Das größte kostenlose Projekt einer Mannheimer Studenteninitiative in den letzten Jahren, „Fußball und Wirtschaft“, welches symbolhaft für die aktive Einbindung neuer Mitglieder in den Verein steht.

Name: Capital Markets Authority Lebanon
Description:
The Capital Markets Authority (CMA) is an independent, autonomous regulatory body established by Capital Markets Law No. 161, ratified on 17 August 2011. 

The CMA’s main responsibility is regulating, supervising, licensing, and monitoring the activities of the Lebanese Capital Markets as per the powers stipulated by the Capital Markets Law 161/2011.

The CMA has two main objectives that underline its strategic mission and vision: (I) promoting and developing the Lebanese Capital Markets; and (II) protecting investors from fraudulent activities, through issuing regulations that are in line with international best practices, and proper control and audit of all institutions that deal with financial instruments.

Name: Greenwood Archer
Description:
Greenwood Archer is a minority owned, forward thinking private equity firm focused on investing in emerging domestic markets, urbanization and affordable housing.

At Greenwood Archer, we think differently. We seek to provide returns to both the social and financial bottom line. Our core belief is simple: relationships matter. That principle is at the heart of our “Human Capital” approach; it is vital to who we are and how we work to deliver market-leading performance.
 
We believe the greatest repositories of underdeveloped, undervalued and underrepresented assets reside in our most economically challenged communities.  These emerging domestic markets provide a tremendous opportunity for growth and strong financial returns, while simultaneously giving rise to sweeping social impact.
 
Investment in low to moderate-income communities is a multi-trillion-dollar opportunity that is largely untapped. This market creates a steadily increasing stream of business opportunities, giving way to some of the industry’s fastest-growing companies. It is also a market with the fastest-growing workforce and a rapidly expanding supplier base.
 
At Greenwood Archer, we will secure favorable returns by channeling capital to underserved sectors: minority-run ventures, inner-city companies, rural enterprises, and businesses that hire lower-skilled workers or supply underserved customer groups. In this pursuit, we will create positive, indirect benefits in the form of job creation, economic stimulus in disadvantaged communities, as well as ownership and management opportunities for underrepresented minorities and women. We will re-imagine the way America’s most underserved communities leverage assets, establish wealth, strengthen infrastructure and create jobs.
 
Creating stakeholders, adding value, delivering results. Welcome to Greenwood Archer.

Name: Eikos Partners
Description:
At Eikos Partners, everyone has experience working in cutting edge financial technology — at large commercial and investment banks, hedge funds and fintech startups.

Around that core of people we have built a team of people with multiple cores of expertise – business, IT management, architecture, software engineering and technologies. 

Our goal is to bring better practices, and solution innovation, to the issues faced by financial institutions in meeting ongoing needs, in a constantly changing marketplace.

Our most important traits, after obvious business and technology skills, are impatience and a fear of boredom — we want to fix your problems, train your staff, work with business leaders and then move on to the next challenges. We heavily focus on the quality of the solutions we deliver, and are not driven by quantity.

Eikos Partners is small and intense by design because we value the sharing of skills and the intensity of our work. We are technologists, not management consultants or industrial psychologists, but in our experience many of the obstacles to effective technology operations revolve around people.

We are always looking to leverage prior experience and process so that new projects can leverage this experience.  As a result we have several toolkits that we leverage as we engage with existing and new clients and projects. 

We try to develop close collaboration even in large banks spread over many floors. Our proof of concept approach to problem solving is pretty basic and easily understood — Listen, Develop, Present. Then repeat as often as necessary. 

We work fast and as participants begin to see progress in stalled projects, they usually catch the enthusiasm and pitch in. As we develop a solution, we engage with the IT staff and train the people who will be responsible for maintaining and expanding its functionality. By the time we finish, our clients have a sustainable improvement in their operations.

Participamos activamente en el financiamiento a empresas a través de la venta de cheques de pago diferido, incrementando significativamente nuestra participación en dicho mercado durante los últimos años. 

Organizamos la emisión de Obligaciones negociables, acciones y fideicomisos, desde su inicio, analizando alternativas de plazos, moneda y tasa; confec-cionando el prospecto y finalmente presentándolo ante la Comisión Nacional de Valores y la Bolsa. 

Ahora también ofrecemos acceso a la operatoria de futuros de dólar a través del ROFEX.  Mediante esta modalidad podrá cubrir riesgos cambiarios derivados de operaciones de comercio exterior o bien realizar arbitrajes de tasa de interés en forma sencilla y segura.

Description:

MWC's three key strategic objectives are: (1) to raise a series of minority wealth investment funds targeted toward creating wealth in minority communities, (2) to reduce the startup capital gap for entrepreneurs of color, and (3) to increase Assets Under Management for diverse fund managers and increase the number of diverse fund managers in the industry.

To facilitate investment in minority communities, the MWC is focused on actions that stimulate economic opportunity and mobility, encourage entrepreneurship, expand quality educational opportunities, and ultimately eradicates the racial wealth gap. The MWC is leading an effort to level-set capital investment parity for minority businesses and next-generation entrepreneurs of color that can expand our economy and impact our communities.

Name: FX1 International Pte Ltd

Our clients can also leverage on our expertise to develop Robo-Advisors or a full-fledged hedge fund.

 In 2015, FX1 pioneered ProfitPips, an all-rounded mobile trading app that allows traders of all levels to engage the financial markets. Billed as the World’s Smartest Trading App, clients can study, follow trade calls and engage a LIVE coach – all on a single trading platform.

With cutting-edge expertise gleaned from years of professional engagements & serving big clients, FX1 brings valuable insight, advice & innovation to all clients – educators, IBs, White-Labels, brokers, investment firms & asset management companies. 

Amidst expansion, FX1 continues to refine its products & service quality, expand capabilities, scale new heights & impact the lives of thousands each year. 

Speak To Our Consultants Today to see how we can help you to grow your business & attract more clients in the financial markets.

Name: BitcoinCash
Description:
THE BEST MONEY IN THE WORLD

Bitcoin Cash brings sound money to the world, fulfilling the original promise of Bitcoin as "Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash". Merchants and users are empowered with low fees and reliable confirmations. The future shines brightly with unrestricted growth, global adoption, permissionless innovation, and decentralized development.

All Bitcoin holders as of block 478558 are also owners of Bitcoin Cash. All are welcome to join the Bitcoin Cash community as we move forward in creating sound money accessible to the whole world.

NEW FEATURES
On Chain Scalability - Bitcoin Cash follows the Nakamoto roadmap of global adoption with on-chain scaling. As a first step, the blocksize limit has been made adjustable, with an increased default of 8MB. Research is underway to allow massive future increases.

New Transaction Signatures - A new SigHash type provides replay protection, improved hardware wallet security, and elimination of the quadratic hashing problem.

New Difficulty Adjustment Algorithm (DAA) - Responsive Proof-of-Work difficulty adjustment allows miners to migrate from the legacy Bitcoin chain as desired, while providing protection against hashrate fluctuations.

Decentralized Development - With multiple independent teams of developers providing software implementations, the future is secure. Bitcoin Cash is resistant to political and social attacks on protocol development. No single group or project can control it. The bitcoin-ml mailing list is a good venue for making proposals for changes that require coordination across development teams. Workgroups have been set up to assist developers to coordinate and seek peer-review. For those wishing to implement changes to the Bitcoin Cash protocol, it is recommended to seek early peer-review and engage collaboratively with other developers through the workgroups.

Name: Investor Acquisitions
Description:
Investors & Deal Flow is an exclusive, invitation only Group made up of EPIC Active and Alumni.  

EPIC members do not have a LinkedIn presence, so, with permission from the Official EPIC Mgmt., we started this Group to bring like-minded individuals together to connect, collaborate and capitalize on EPIC type deal-flow, to ultimately acquire and grow businesses. 

This is a for profit group started by EPIC Alumni, Matt Anderson (EPIC 4) and Jon Stoddard (EPIC 8).   

Matt and I are providing a valuable servicing by bringing a variety of "EPIC" vetted companies to your attention.     

These sellers are "EPIC Motivated Sellers".  We vet according to our EPIC training, and assist with screening, due diligence, advising on price valuations and financing strategies.

For this service, we are compensated through a Finder’s Fee. 

Before an introduction is made you will be asked to sign a Finders Fee Agreement.  

Matt and I are acting only as a "Finders" and not as a broker.  The distinction between Finder and Brokers is that Matt and I do not get involved in negotiating the price between the Buyer and Seller.  As an example a broker gets involved in negotiating the price during the buying and selling of a house.  As Finders,  Matt and I are only introducing you to potential acquisition targets.   

Our Finder’s Fee Agreement includes a Non-Disclosure Confidentiality Clause.  This is here to ensure that all legal precautions are used to protect the highly confidential information that you are given access to and to ensure the continued confidentiality of such information and to prevent its unauthorized access and disclosure.

All inquiries, and communications between the groups owner and you,  are strictly confidential.   

Do you have a Deal that you passed on?  If you have a deal that you pass on,  submit it to Matt or Jon and we will share it with the rest of the group.

Apostamos por nuevos sistemas y entornos de financiación para la PYME, más allá de la tradicional financiación bancaria, que ha demostrado sus carencias y límites en especial en el complicado entorno de este principio de siglo.

La PYME innovadora puede y debe, basar su crecimiento en la capitalización, ofreciendo a los inversores un proyecto interesante y escalable, que aporte rendimientos atractivos proporcionados a los riesgos inherentes de cualquier iniciativa empresarial. El MAB y el MARF, deben consolidarse como auténticas alternativas de financiación para las small & midcaps españolas que generen valor añadido y puestos de trabajo cualificados.

Los actores políticos a su vez, deben procurar un entorno fiscal y legal que genere un círculo virtuoso entre empresa e inversores.

Nuestro cometido es ofrecer una radiografía completa del Mercado que permitirá a todos los agentes interesados (stakeholders) entender las claves y el comportamiento del mismo y de esa forma acceder a la herramienta de financiación, inversión y crecimiento potente que proporciona el MAB.

How to maximise our returns with the least possible risk to the hard earned coins? Especially in a bear market as we endured from Jan to April.

Our autonomous trading platforms went live for inhouse trading in March 2018. On experiencing phenomenal results in a matter of months we felt it is best to share our platform with the crypto community across the world under a licensed software scheme.

The last few months we have improved both our AI technology and UX to a degree incomparable in the market. The result is an application that trades on your behalf which is incredibly simple to use and offers unmatched results.

We are working hard everyday to add more exchanges on to the platforms and currently offer both cryptocurrency trading and leverage trading options using our systems (binance and bitmex). Unlike other trading bots, available in the market where users have to select one amongst several trading bot options, select several trading parameters our AI ecosystem completely automates the same for users. Dennard  Lascar Investor Relations is the largest IR firm in the Southwest.  Serving more than 30 public and private company clients, Dennard  Lascar provides customized, expert IR counsel and is an industry leader in offering integrated third-party IR/CFA analyst professional services.  We develop client-specific strategies to communicate each company’s unique value proposition, enhance disclosure and credibility, and drive maximum visibility, long-term shareholder value and the lowest cost of capital.  

Dennard  Lascar expanded its traditional full-service IR Counsel over ten years ago by introducing IR+, ground-breaking services staffed by experienced former sell-side research analysts.  IR+ provides public companies unprecedented 24/7 access to experienced analysts who assist clients in developing enhanced public disclosures that increase operational and financial transparency, build management credibility and help clients effectively communicate the correct message to the investment community.  

Dennard  Lascar added Corporate Governance to its suite of service offerings in 2014.  We can serve as an external Corporate Secretary function or provide full support around annual stockholder meetings, including proxy statement drafting, annual report production and inspector of election services. 

For more information regarding its clients or services, please visit www.dennardlascar.com or call (713) 529-6600.

Name: Phoenix Capital B.V.
Description:
To meet the requirements of sustainable development, the Democratic Republic of Congo has decided to use the most advanced technologies to serve the environment and local communities :

– Creation of a gold-backed sovereign digital monetary instrument legally recognized as a tangible asset in RDC;

– Tokenization of natural resources from grassroots communities to ensure transparency, traceability, and ethics of transactions for the equitable creation and sharing of wealth.

The traceability of gold resources will be ensured not only by the security of transactions via blockchain but also by an innovative drone transport system.

Placed under the high patronage of the President of the Republic, Head of State, His Excellency Félix Antoine Tshisekedi Tshilombo, the Social Fund of the Democratic Republic of Congo (FSRDC) has entered into an unprecedented partnership with Phoenix Capital B.V. for the implementation of the AXIS National Program. This partnership marks a historic shift in the strategic natural resource management model, benefiting local communities and marking a decisive turning point towards sustainable and ethical development in the region.

Name: Circadian Group
Description:
Circadian Group is an ultra-full-service boutique Investor Relations, Public Relations, and Capital Formation Firm, specifically focused on two industries: Natural Resources and Tech. Circadian’s sweet-spot clientele market cap ranges from $5MM to $500MM, servicing the Nano, Micro, and Small capitalization space. 
 
For a rapidly growing company to cost effectively outsource a time consuming, and often liability laden function such as IR & PR, frees up company resources to focus on what is important--  building the business. In today's extremely competitive Capital Markets, a professionally managed Investor Relations program is essential in creating an efficient and orderly market, and is the basis for shareholder value creation. 

Having developed expertise in their respective fields of Mining and Clean-tech, Circadian’s Managing Partners provide client companies with unmatchable solutions by way of the many relationships developed over the years with:  money managers, money influencers, and high-profile media outlets-- effectively blurring the lines between the IR and PR functions. 
 
With a combined 20+ years of diverse capital markets experience, Circadian’s Management provides crucial and intangible insight into the ever-changing and challenging world of Investor Relations. Circadian being small enough to care, but connected enough to deliver, gives an unmatched level of service.

Name: CML Bolsa
Description:
CML Bolsa, es una entidad que desde 1990, está dedicada a dos funciones principalmente, la formación de inversores privados o profesionales en materia de operativa bursátil y derivados, y a la información financiera destinada a la inversión.

FORMACIÓN 

- Formación destinada a la instrucción de inversores privados o profesionales (operadores de capital de Fondos de Inversión, de pensiones o de sociedades de inversión colectiva), dentro del corto y medio plazo sobre valores de Bolsa.

- Formación de operadores de capital de alto rendimiento que actúan para las entidades financieras o los inversores privados de alta capitalización. 

INFORMACIÓN FINANCIERA

Información financiera para operar en Futuros y valores de Bolsa de manera intradiaria. En esta información se les señala los siguientes conceptos:

•	Instrumento financiero en el que se debe invertir cada día y cómo hacerlo (abriendo cortos o largos).
•	Hora exacta en la que se debe abrir la posición y la hora de cierre.
•	Límite máximo de pérdidas que se deben asumir en cada operación (Stop Loss).
•	Beneficios a conseguir en cada operación (Objetivo).

Con esta forma de actuar, el inversor podrá entrar en el mercado financiero guiado por las opiniones de inversión de especialistas con muchos años de experiencia práctica, y por tanto, con bastantes posibilidades de hacer de este tipo de inversiones, un negocio rentable de manera continuada en el tiempo.

Name: Verlangen Finance B.V.
Description:
Ondernemer opgelet! Denk niet alleen aan vandaag. Denk ook aan je (Project) Toekomst. In één leuke dag het pensioenprobleem opgelost voor drukke ondernemers, door met hun verdiende geld vermogen op te bouwen. Daarvan kunnen zij vroegtijdig met pensioen, zonder dat het hun tijd kost en op een manier die jarenlang bewezen is. Owja, voor het eind van de dag is je investering minimaal 2x terugverdiend en op de lange termijn gaat je vermogen x10. Gegarandeerd. Alles volledig uitgewerkt, nagerekend en gesimuleerd.

GARANTIES:
100% Tevredenheid Garantie
200% Terugverdiend Garantie
100% Hoogste Rendement Garantie

HET PROBLEEM:
48% van de ondernemers heeft niks voor zijn pensioen geregeld. Een ondernemer wilt ondernemen om de wereld beter en leuker te maken. Maar ook een ondernemer wordt ouder, krijgt (klein)kinderen en wil meer tijd doorbrengen met zijn geliefde, vrienden en/of familie, nu en in de toekomst. Helaas gaat dit vandaag de dag allemaal niet meer lukken als er niks is geregeld.

Zonder een goed plan om vermogen op te bouwen voor jouw toekomst, is het als ondernemer lastig om je pensioen geregeld te krijgen. Regel jij niks, dan is het enige dat jij krijgt op je pensioenleeftijd van 70+ een stukje AOW. En dat is geen vetpot, namelijk zo'n €1.500 per maand samen met je partner (inclusief vakantiegeld).

Daarbij nog wat trieste cijfers. 1 op de 4 haalt zijn pensioen niet eens. Degene die het wel halen, hebben of al de eerste ouderdomsziektes (dementie, hartfalen, moe) te pakken of zijn (deels) arbeidsongeschikt. Maar toch wordt de pensioenleeftijd steeds opgehoogd, prognose is dat in de toekomst deze naar de 70+ gaat. 

Kijk eens in je omgeving naar de 70 jarigen, zie jij jezelf dan nog steeds werken?

Kortom, jij wilt een goed pensioen, dat heel wat jaren eerder begint dan de pensioenleeftijd vanuit de overheid, maar daar tegenover nog wel een super leven hebben tot dat pensioen. Want ook nu moet jij genieten en dat begrijpen wij.

Name: New Black Millionaires
Description:
New Black Millionaires was founded in Gauteng, South Africa in 2017. We are an investment education movement designed specifically to educate, train and equip black people of all social status about the Global Financial Markets, specifically binary options trading, cryptocurrency and property investing at no cost. 

The movement is a product of poverty in Africa, with well over 70% of the worlds poorest countries found here and 250 million people starving, we decided to make a change as best as we know how. Through persistence, focus and support from our students we will spread knowledge and eventually resources to ultimately combat poverty in a more sustainable manner. 

The purpose is to remove the idea of exclusivity or qualification requirements to participate in the global markets. Secondly we aim to remove the idea of large capital requirements or fees to get involved. We target individuals of all ages, education levels, career levels, geographical locations and income bands. 

New Black Millionaires strives towards eradicating poverty, reducing the dramatic wealth gap and enabling black people to have the opportunity to be financially free.  We aim to assist and build 10 000 black millionaires by the year 2022. We aim to ultimately create more millionaires and financially independent individuals in the next few years than any program or initiative in the continent.

Our Objectives
•	Developing skilled professionals in the industry. 
•	Creating more than 10 000 black millionaires in the next 5 years. 
•	Growing black market share gradually and consistently. 
•	Building a reputable brand through excellent marketing and branding strategies. 
•	Being able to reach each and every corner in the country.
•	Partnering with relevant parties in the industry
•	Investing back in our communities

o	Management company

o	Pension Reserve Fund
Pension Reserve Fund of the Republic of Srpska was established 31st of May 2010. The aim of it’s establishment is to support long-term financial viability of the mandatory pension insurance. Main activity and goal of Pension Reserve Fund is to invest in securities and other assets with respect to the principles of safety, the dispersion of risk, liquidity and profitability in order to increase the assets of  Pension Reserve Fund. Total capital of Pension Reserve Fund at the time of is’t establishment was 274,812,575.00 BAM. The Governing Body of Pension Reserve Fund is the Assembly. Function of the Assembly for Pension Reserve Fund performs Governing Board of Fund for Pension and Disability Insurance of the Republic of Srpska.
Pension Reserve Fund as a legal entity appears in its own name and for its own account only in relation to the Management Company.

Name: 深圳启元金融控股集团有限公司
Description:
深圳启元金融控股集团有限公司是一家综合性的金融集团公司，集团成立于2014年，注册资本一亿元人民币，净资产超20亿元，集团以“启智慧人生、创财富之元”为核心价值观，以“稳健经营、开拓创新”的经营理念，坚持“实业+金融”的战略思路，致力于创建“一体化金融服务商”。集团经过近十年的不断摸索、提高，在稳健成长的过程中积累了丰富的行业经验，经营模式日趋完善及成熟，在同行中建立了较高的知名度。在注重业务拓展的同时不断要求自身素质的提升，核心团队都是来自海内外的高学历、高素质的金融界精英，具备多年的金融风险控制、融资租赁、基金管理、投资银行、高新科技、供应链服务以及服装产业等经验，跨界运作经验丰富，实践运营实力雄厚。
启元金控已与多家银行建立了良好的合作关系，成为银行与中小企业之间融资关系的纽带和桥梁。信誉优良化、业务稳健化、创新常态化、代偿率更低化等综合管理运营指标良好。集团本着“稳健经营，开拓创新”的经营理念，制定严格的业务流程和完善的风险控制机制，并不折不扣地予以执行，时刻将风险管理放在第一位。作为专业化、市场化运作的机构，为适应金融机构和客户的要求提供更合适的融资环境。    
启元金控集团在短短的七年内，形成立足于深圳特区，辐射省内外的经营布局，集团目前拥有五大管理中心：综合管理中心、财务管理中心、风险管理中心、财富管理中心、创新发展中心；五大子公司：深圳恒辉能源科技有限公司、深圳启铭供应链管理有限公司、深圳前海启元资本管理有限公司、深圳清核启元科技有限公司、深圳帕巴拉服饰有限公司；五大管理中心，素有智库核心之称，为集团董事会提供强大的数据支撑，五大子公司，誉为五大支柱，运营良好，实力雄厚，蜚声业界，是集团的强大后盾。涉及的业务品种主要有融资租赁、财务顾问、高新科技及亲子服装、贸易等业务范围。集团秉承“创造价值，互利共赢”的服务理念，为不同需求的客户，以专业的服务量身订制金融产品。集团将加强与各大金融机构合作，为客户构建一个综合性的金融平台。

Name: Yukai Capital Group
Description:
Yukai Capital Group core focus for the past 20 years has been to be a market leader in offering innovative financing solutions that meet the expectations and liquidity requirements of its clients with publicly traded equities and fixed income securities.
This need and ability to secure financing against publicly traded equities, ETF's and fixed income securities is a far greater struggle than previously known and has grown significantly more difficult after various global events and their effects on the global financial markets over the past several years.

Yukai Capital Group has extensive experience in the Securities Financing space and offers well-established options available across multiple asset classes in order to provide seamless liquidity solutions to corporate and accredited investors.

By delivering a unique and bespoke approach to financing in a volatile and “credit shy” climate, which includes one in which even banks are unwilling to extend credit due to the risks they face from both volatile markets, stricter regulations or the avoidance of concentrated positions, Yukai Capital is uniquily positioned to offer credit and finanicng solutions to it's clients.

Understanding that accessing liquidity is crucial with the global economy at a near standstill, Yukai Capital Group offers financing that considers the preservation of liquidity by increasing the ceiling on loan to value ratios and controlling interest rates on its financing solutions to provide clients with competitive offerings not offered by many of our competitors.

Our Securities Financing Solutions offer:
Loan amounts from USD $1,000,000 up to over $1,000,000,000 (min USD $10,000,000 for Fixed Income)
Fixed annual interest rates as low as 2.5%
Loan to Values (LTV) of up to 75%
Loan maturities of 36 up to 120 months (min 24 months for Fixed Income)
100% non-recourse loan structure
Non-Title Transfer

For additional information or to apply for one of our financing solutions, please contact us.

Principal Função dos Juros, Custo do Dinheiro, Selic vs CDI, Taxa Livre de Risco (BRA e EUA), Spread de Risco, Agências de Rating, Credit Default SWAP (CDS), Risco de Liquidez, Risco de Contraparte, Libor, SOFR, Paridade Coberta da Taxa de Juros, Shape Curva de Juros, Inversão da Curva de Juros, Dólar Futuro, Euro Futuro, Taxa de Juros Pré Fixada vs Pós Fixada, DI Futuro, Comprado vs Vendido, Cupom Cambial Sujo de USD, Cupom Cambial Sujo de EURO, Relação de Não Arbitragem, Cupom Cambial Limpo de USD (FRC) e Cupom Cambial Limpo de EURO, Forward Rate Agreement (FRA), Casado de Dólar, Spot, Interpolação, Non Deliverable Forward (NDF), SWAP, Carrego, Ajustes B3.

Outras informações:

Composto por aulas online gravadas, o treinamento é dividido em 31 tópicos e possui 13 horas de duração.

O aluno "leva pra casa" todas as planilhas utilizadas no treinamento.

Provavelmente, dúvidas quanto ao conteúdo podem surgir, nesse caso o aluno pode nos acessar através do WhatsApp ou email. Não ficará sem respostas. Esclarecer as dúvidas é fundamental no processo de aprendizado.

Name: ARTedyS R&D - AI Servicing Platform
Description:
ARTedyS R&D is the AI servicing platform behind bank-asset programs. We turn monthly servicing data into investor-grade controls, DSCR and waterfall calculations, and clear reporting—so banks keep primary servicing while investors get transparent cash flows.

What we do

Ingest anonymized loan tapes via secure SFTP (CSV/XLS/JSON), typically D+2 after month-end.
Reconcile servicing  cash  reference data; run eligibility tests and portfolio stratifications.
Compute DSCR, delinquency, prepayment/default/recovery metrics and note accruals.
Build the waterfall per the transaction documents; produce paying-agent files and calculation memos.
Maintain full audit trail: versioned models, back-tests, overrides with approvals, immutable logs.
Provide monthly report packs (PDF/XLSX) and machine-readable exports for data rooms.

Operating model

Bank = primary servicer.
Paying/Calculation Agents remain independent; ARTedyS prepares files/instructions and never moves cash.
Interim → Full: can start with third-party calc/paying agent and smoothly migrate to the platform.
Security & compliance
GDPR DPA; pseudonymized loan data; EU-hosted environments.
Controls aligned to ISO 27001/SOC 2; SSO/MFA; encryption in transit/at rest; role-based access & logs.
Evidence packs to support Basel III/CRR SRT assessments for originator banks.

Not a broker/dealer. We do no solicitation and no client cash handling. B2B / professional counterparties only.

Description:
Diamond Lifestyle Limited (DLL) is a Cayman Island registered limited company, advised by Regulus Capital, with the vision to be a diversified food and beverage services platform in the MENA region operating Casual Dining Restaurants, Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) and Fast Casual Eateries with an emphasis on popular, trendy and international concepts.

Coupled with the growth potential in the region, our team is well placed to provide both, a great experience for our customers whilst ensuring high returns for our investors. 

Our Mission & Vision

Mission: “Diamond Lifestyle Limited is committed to uncompromisingly exceeding our customers’ expectations throughout our rapidly growing network of lifestyle brands spanning the GCC.” 

Vision: “To create a diversified food and beverage services platform in the GCC that manages casual dining restaurants, quick service restaurants and fast casual eateries with an emphasis on fashionable, trendy and novel international concepts.

Our Brands

DLL’s current portfolio includes Johnny Rockets, the American burger franchise that aims at providing a classic all American experience and two soon to be announced franchise brands. We currently serve over 800,000 customers in the UAE each year and our restaurants cover a GLA of over 40,000 sq ft. 

Johnny Rockets is globally undergoing a re-branding exercise and here in the UAE, we are renovating our restaurants at the Dubai Mall and Mirdif City Centre to reflect the new look and feel. 2016 will see us add several new Johnny Rockets restaurants in the UAE – Khalidiya and Reem Island in Abu Dhabi and Hazza Bin Zayed Stadium & Mixed Use Development in Al Ain. We are also adding several food trucks across Dubai – Palm Jumeirah, Jebel Ali Free Zone, Jumeirah Beach Residence among others. 

Specialties
Acquisition and management of fast casual eateries, casual dining chains and Quick Service Restaurants (QSR), franchising & sub franchising of restaurants, food court outlets, drive through and food trucks, and restaurant management agreements

Name: Floris Funds, LP; Floris Capital Management, LLC
Description:
MISSION STATEMENT 
Floris Fund I, LP (the “Fund”) seeks to be the capital placement fund that bridges the gap between investors looking to enter the cannabis market and those actively involved in the marketplace with capital needs. By combining the management and advisory team talents and experiences, we believe that our fund solution presents a prime opportunity to invest in the cannabis market with firms that are properly regulated and generate an optimal return on investment.

SUMMARY
STARTING POINT
The Manager’s Board and Advisory Team are comprised of professionals with a strong track record combining talents from money management, cannabis, finance, securities, accounting, legal, marketing, management and related businesses. This team’s strength lies in its unique ability to identify the right deals in the right regions and to create proprietary deal flow that will keep the fund on target for the intended investment strategy. The principals of Floris Capital Management, LLC, have decades of experience in finance and cannabis, creating a truly collaborative team to evaluate opportunities, structure deals and execute the strategy with the goal of creating above-average investment returns.  

FUND STRUCTURE 
Floris Fund I, LP (the “Fund”) is a California limited partnership established by Floris Fund I GP, LP (the “General Partner”) and Floris Capital Management, LLC (the “Manager”), to make private equity investments in companies across a spectrum of businesses involved in the cannabis industry. The Fund is seeking capital commitments limited to $40 million.  The Manager anticipates the investments will be made in a variety of businesses in the cannabis industry including retailing, manufacturing, branding, cultivation, real estate and other industry-related ancillary businesses.
Floris Funds is a California-based private equity fund focusing on partnering with owner-operators who want to create best-in-class professionally managed companies doing business in the regulated cannabis industry.

EXECUTIVE HIGHLIGHTS 
Fund Objective: to invest in US legal cannabis-related businesses that will maximize the Fund’s return on investment. The Fund provides funding, financing and/or capital to companies in the cannabis industry primarily in the form of equity investments.  The firm may, selectively, provide debt financing as needed.

Targeted Fund Size:  $40 Million USD Cap 

Formed: August 2017

Investment Style: Fund will make equity investments across the industry, regardless of industry sector or geography. However, there are many screens used to filter the company selection process including: 

-	Sectors			- Operating History 		- Local Political Climate 
-	Geography 	- Estimated ROI 			- Operators Experience 
-	Permitting 		- Portfolio Composition 	- Market Demand 

Estimated First Close: October 2017 
Current LOI’s: Multiple in place–confidential internal only documents. 
. 
www.florisfunds.com/contact

COIGNE provides a framework to deliver social impact and financial returns while scaling up entrepreneurship in underserved, complex markets that hold the key to saving the world's free-roaming wildlife from extinction. 

COIGNE keeps profits in the hands of communities to foster generational wealth transfer and human behavioral adaptions toward wildlife crime. COIGNE overturns the donor model (and traditional exit) by providing loan financing to commercial entities in return for profit sharing for a set time period. We unlock scalable asset capital with long-term returns by liaising with community institutions, enhancing accountability, and providing expertise in the local operating environment. Supported by COIGNE, communities will deliver an entrepreneurial ecosystem for direct employment and workforce development at scale. COIGNE enters the target market one country at a time for project saturation in defined regions that are interconnected and substantial for both communities and government.

Our unique value proposition is a tech-enabled COIGNE Risk Management System  whereby security, intelligence, operations, and communications interact continuously across the portfolio. COIGNE enables investees to monitor and measure progress against potential threats. Our founding team has decades of experience designing big business/military operational models with a post-conflict resolution framework.

Name: Ekonomiska Samfundet i Finland rf
Description: Ekonomiska Samfundet i Finland bildades i Helsingfors år 1894. Föreningens ändamål har sedan dess varit att befrämja intresset för den ekonomiska vetenskapen och att arbeta för utökad tillämpning av denna vetenskap i vårt samhälle. Ekonomiska Samfundet är ett forum för ekonomisk debatt, där akademiker, journalister, företagare, fackföreningsfolk, bankmän och andra intresserade möts för att åhöra föredrag och engagera sig i aktuella ekonomiska frågor. Alla som är intresserade av samhällsekonomiska och ekonomiska frågor kan bli medlemmar i detta lärda samfund. Verksamheten är koncentrerad kring månadsmötena och den egna tidskriften. Medlemmarna möts 7 gånger om året för att åhöra aktuella ekonomiska föredrag och för att debattera. En viktig utgångspunkt i samfundets verksamhet är att försöka fånga upp och förmedla den kunskap som finns bland personer i näringslivet. När den internationella ekonomiska integrationen fortskrider blir ett upprätthållande av en god ekonomisk kunskapsnivå allt viktigare för vårt lands välstånd.

Name: IPO Village
Description:
IPO Village is dedicated to crowdfunding initial public offerings (IPOs). Everyone is welcome to invest! 

Traditionally IPOs are underwritten by investment banks. The bank itself commits to buying the shares from the company and in turn resells them (flips), for a profit, to institutional/sophisticated investors before it even closes the transaction with the company. Then the investors turn around and resell to retail investors, for a profit, in the open market. The retail investors are the ones eagerly placing the orders through their retail brokers to grab some of these "IPO" shares the second its available for them to purchase. Obviously, at that point, the shares have passed 3 hands and their price has already gone through 2 decidedly north price adjustments .

Our mission is to give retail investors the opportunity to get in on the ground floor of the IPO investment lifecycle.

IPO Village's debut IPO will be on behalf of a First Line Capital portfolio company.

First Line's portfolio companies are all publicly traded. Therefore, our public offerings provide shareholders with liquidity and a clear exit strategy.

Founded in 1995, First Line Capital is a boutique investment banking firm headquartered in New York City.
First Line's focus is implementation of early-stage public strategies for a diverse range of hi-tech companies internationally.

IPOs are typically oversold. Reserve your place in line.

Apart from conducting management discussions the vertical indulges in the brainstorming to develop financial games.

The third vertical namely IBS Times is the publishing arm of the club FinStreet. The vertical comes out with a fortnightly magazine on the current happenings in the economy. The magazine also publishes research reports. The magazine has reached a readership of over 12,000 people.

Name: The MarketScan
Description:
MarketScan is a daily market update for anyone who wants to stay aware of what’s happening in markets — without spending hours reading news or scrolling endlessly.

You receive one structured report every weekday morning, covering both Indian and global developments. It’s designed so even a non-finance reader can understand it, while still being useful for professionals who follow markets regularly.

What MarketScan covers:
	•	Indian & global market movements
	•	Major business and corporate updates
	•	Key economic and macro developments
	•	Institutional activity and data points
	•	Important events to watch ahead

No trading tips. No predictions. No unnecessary noise.
Just factual updates with context, so you understand why things moved — not just that they moved.

MarketScan is for professionals, students, founders, and curious readers who believe market awareness is a long-term advantage.

Read it end-to-end or skim what matters to you. Either way, you stay informed — calmly and consistently.

Name: Mediterraneo Hedge-Fund-plc
Description:
Mediterreaneo Hedge Fund plc is an innovative speculative fund (hedge fund), whose mission is to produce returns that are constant over time, with the possibility of very fruitful returns.
The operations will be carried out through the use of specific software applications that make use of Artificial Intelligence and DLT (Distributed Ledger Technology).

Mediterreaneo Hedge Fund aims to produce returns that are constant over time, with a low correlation with the reference markets, through individual investments with high financial risk, but with the possibility of very fruitful returns: dividing the risks into a number of transactions, a single "well" operation can balance different operations without return.

Mediterraneo Hedge Fund intends to build a financial world in which the securities are managed on their own. In fact, with the collaboration of the advisors of the various counterparties of the transaction, the blockchain will be an innovative technological infrastructure through which to communicate the smart contracts that automate the entire life cycle of a financial instrument, including the payment phase of the coupons. to each individual investor, on each fixed date. This means that the issuer (in the case of a bond, for example) can directly and automatically pay interest and repay the capital to investors in line with the provisions of the code included in the smart contract, which was evidently written on the basis of the contents of the bond regulation, previously drafted by the lawyers.

Name: Cuba Business Advisory

CUBA

Saul Cimbler (based in Miami, Florida and Havana, Cuba) a Spanish speaking native of Cuba, is the founder of Cuba Business Advisory, (www.LegallyDoingBusinessinCuba.Com) a cross border consulting firm with international experience in new market development, joint venture, supply, consulting and implementations specifically related to the intensifying market opportunities in various industry sectors in the Republic of Cuba, as well as parts of the Caribbean.

He regularly provides product, project or industry specific-consulting support to worldwide entities, (as well as their legal and financial experts) seeking to expand their market development, implementation or strategic long-term planning regarding doing Business in Cuba.

He is well versed in the intricacies of the regulatory, legal and related gateways of doing business in or related to Cuba, arising under Cuban as well as U.S. and international law. His experience in the regulatory and market penetration of Cuba includes but is not limited to hospitality (hotel & time share), tourism & travel, aviation, agriculture, medical & bio-pharma, telecommunications, product branding, sports & entertainment, real estate & development, renewable energy, trade finance, infrastructure development and various manufacturing sectors.

He is a frequent participant in industry specific seminars in Cuba and the U.S. and maintains professional interactions with Cuban government agencies, economists, lawyers and regulatory agencies in varying Cuban industry sectors, providing up to date knowledge of developing market, regulatory and related issues regarding Cuban business opportunities and market entry requirements.

Saul is also a contributor to Cuba Trade Magazine, and the first mainstream magazine devoted to covering the emerging world of trade and investment between international corporations and Cuba, with a special focus on U.S. companies.

He can be reached at 786 286 1100 or at Saul@LegallyDoingBusinessinCuba.Com

Name: Forum Kapitalmarktinstrumente - Kapitalmarktfinanzierung e.V.
Description:
Das Forum Kapitalmarktinstrumente – Kapitalmarktfinanzierung e.V. ist ein eingetragener gemeinnütziger Verein mit Sitz in München. Er richtet sich an Personen, die in Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz in den verschiedensten Funktionen mit Kapitalmarktinstrumenten und Kapitalmarktfinanzierungen befasst sind.

Die Zielsetzungen des Vereins ergeben sich aus der Satzung. Durch die Förderung von Wissenschaft, Forschung und Lehre auf dem Gebiet der Kapitalmarktinstrumente und der Kapitalmarktfinanzierung bezweckt der Verein, Risiken, die sich im Zusammenhang mit Kapitalmarktinstrumenten für Geld- und Kapitalmärkte und das Finanzsystem im Ganzen ergeben können, frühzeitig zu erkennen und auf diese Art und Weise zur Vermeidung dieser Risiken beizutragen. Ebenfalls soll der Dialog zwischen Berufsvertretern, die sich mit Kapitalmarktinstrumenten und Kapitalmarktfinanzierung befassen, angeregt werden, um so die Kenntnisse von Kapitalmarktinstrumenten und Kapitalmarktfinanzierung zu erweitern. Im Rahmen von Veranstaltungen (abwechselnd in Deutschland, in Österreich und in der Schweiz) werden aktuelle Fragestellungen aus dem Bereich Kapitalmarktinstrumente und Kapitalmarktfinanzierung aus u.a. aufsichts-, steuer- und bilanzrechtlicher sowie finanzwirtschaftlicher Sicht wissenschaftlich und praxisnah behandelt. In den Veranstaltungen treten profilierte und erfahrene Referenten aus der Wissenschaft und der Praxis auf.

Vor diesem Hintergrund zählen zur Zielgruppe des Vereins insbesondere Vertreter der Wissenschaft und Lehre, Richterschaft, der Aufsichts- und Steuerverwaltung, Vertreter der Finanzindustrie, der rechts- und steuerberatenden Berufe und Wirtschaftsprüfer, Vertreter der Wirtschaftspresse und der Politik. Seinem Namen entsprechend soll der Verein ein Forum für alle in Praxis, Forschung und Lehre mit Kapitalmarktinstrumenten und Kapitalmarktfinanzierung befassten Personen bieten.

Name: BLOCK SEOUL, September 16-19, 2018, Seoul, South Korea
Description:
Block Seoul, one of the largest blockchain conferences of its kind, will be held September 17–19, 2018 in Seoul, South Korea. It gathers experts, creators and investors from around the world in a dynamic location and provides innovative technological tools for bringing them together in ground-breaking conversation.

Held at the Sebitseom Island Complex in Seoul’s Han River, at the nexus of Gangnam, Itaewon, and Yongsan, the central location of this 4-day conference will provide attendees easy access to the heart of the city while remaining removed enough to ensure an exclusive and curated experience. 

Block Seoul is an opportunity for curious and intrepid individuals to engage in innovative conversations about the future of humans and technology. The conference explores a distinct blend of two important concepts: the ever-changing landscape of technology, and how humans use this landscape to further connections with themselves and each other.

Block Seoul is a connection hub for a diverse range of ICOs, investors, financial institutions, and VCs. Integrated technology, designed specifically by Luna Labs specifically for this event, makes it a networker’s dream. The conference features the deployment of new tools for optimizing matchmaking and bringing people together in more meaningful ways, focusing on real world relationships and synergistic collaborations.

From projects and funders to clients and services, Block Seoul provides a unique opportunity for investors and developers to discover each other and align their goals and visions for bringing growth and change to the world. Korean investors are well-known as some of the most powerful in the world, and will draw attendees from all over the globe to this monumental meeting of minds. 

With the combination of leading edge technology, high caliber speakers, a broad program, and a dynamic location, Block Seoul promise to create connections and partnerships that will have a long-lasting impact on the industry.

Name: VR Halifax Business Brokers | Mergers & Acquisitions
Description:
Established in 1979, VR Business Sales is a global leader in the sale of privately owned companies with offices located in Canada, USA, South America and Europe, with over 200 professionals dedicated to sell-side advisory services. VR Business Sales in Nova Scotia was established in 2014.

We understand that when selling a business, value is predominantly based on financial statements, but it's the combination of a variety of other factors that creates ultimate value: the timing of the close, terms of the business owner's exit, treatment of employees, and continuation of a legacy. Our goal in selling a business is to provide our clients with choice, allowing them to take into consideration all of those various factors. At VR Business Sales, we have found that the most effective way to sell a business is to create a market and leverage competition. This forces buyers to think differently and allow sellers to stay in control. 

We firmly believe that it is our responsibility to provide our clients with comprehensive approach to each and every business transaction. VR Business Sales in Nova Scotia is is committed to providing extraordinary service with honesty, integrity and professionalism. It is our job to bridge the gap between buyers and sellers while protecting client interest and providing the level of service every small and mid-size business owner should expect to receive.

BOSSA působí na polském kapitálovém trhu v oblasti investování na kapitálových trzích od roku 1995. V roce 2012 otevřela pobočku v Praze a zahájila svoji činnost na území České republiky. Prioritou BOSSA je neustálé rozšiřování a zkvalitňování nabídky služeb a uspokojování potřeb investorů. Sledování světových trendů a průběžná komunikace s klienty nás inspiruje k zavádění nových řešení v oblasti investování.

Name: QI investiční společnost

QIIS je součástí skupiny Conseq, která je aktivním účastníkem českého finančního trhu již od roku 1994.  
Kvalita a úroveň služeb naší společnosti je podpořena odbornou erudicí týmu a též zázemím silné skupiny Conseq s její více než dvacetiletou zkušeností s péčí o svěřené peníze a celkovým objemem aktiv ve správě ve výši 52,3 mld. CZK dle Asociace pro kapitálový trh ČR (AKAT ČR). Produktová nabídka QIIS je součástí širokého portfolia služeb Wealth Management skupiny Conseq pro náročné klienty.

Specializujeme se jak na privátní fondy zaměřené na péči o majetek s jasně vymezenou investiční politikou několika individuálních investorů, tak veřejně nabízené fondy podporované renomovanými finančními skupinami. Zabezpečíme jak úvodní nastavení a vznik fondu s ohledem na záměry jeho sponzora, tak komplexní portfolio činností během jeho života.

Description:
Los regalos corporativos dejaron de ser detalles. Hoy son una herramienta de poder para conectar, posicionar y conquistar… son una inversión estratégica. En Zamaro transformamos cada pieza en experiencias que conectan: piezas premium, funcionales y personalizables, creadas bajo los más altos estándares de diseño y calidad. Son experiencias que hablan por tu marca, refuerzan la cultura organizacional y generan un impacto que trasciende el momento, pensadas para empresas que buscan diferenciarse y generar un impacto real.
Por qué Zamaro es tu socio estratégico (no solo un proveedor):
Diseño con propósito → Creamos piezas aspiracionales, funcionales y atemporales, diseñadas para generar emociones y proyectar tu marca en momentos auténticos entre familia y amigos.
Productos insignia que sorprenden → FireBowls, FirePrismas, Chill & Grill, ShotsBoards, difusores, tablitas y colecciones exclusivas que permiten dar regalos que realmente marcan la diferencia.
Personalización 360° → Logos, empaques premium y experiencias digitales integradas vía QR.
Contenido audiovisual de alto impacto → Animaciones, videos y storytelling que elevan el alcance de cada regalo, integrando a través de un QR un mensaje personalizado para tu equipo o tus clientes.
Fabricación local→ Diseñamos y producimos todo en Costa Rica, cuidando cada detalle desde el concepto hasta la entrega, lo que nos permite adaptarnos a diferentes presupuestos y necesidades corporativas.
La diferencia Zamaro
En un mundo saturado de opciones, los detalles son los que hablan por vos. En Zamaro nos salimos del canasto… y decidimos diseñamos experiencias. Convertimos cada regalo en una oportunidad para conectar, reconocer y fidelizar. No vendemos regalos: creamos conexiones emocionales y posicionamos marcas.
Gracias a esta visión, empresas como Coca-Cola, Roche, Banco Popular, Cargill, Kyndryl, Alling, entre muchas otras, no solo confían en nosotros: saben que Zamaro es sinónimo de exclusividad, diseño y resultados.

VSA Trader to firma stworzona z myślą o budowaniu wyselekcjonowanej, elitarnej grupy traderów, znanej jako „Grupa Żółwia”. Naszą misją jest łączenie praktyki rynkowej z zaawansowaną analizą wolumenu (Volume Spread Analysis) oraz świadomym zarządzaniem emocjami.

System VSA Trader opiera się na trzech filarach:
– Volume Spread Analysis (VSA) – precyzyjna metodologia oparta na analizie zależności między wolumenem, spreadem i ceną,
– kontrola ryzyka – każda transakcja opiera się na jasno zdefiniowanym scenariuszu wejścia i wyjścia,
– trening mentalny – rozwijanie odporności psychicznej, nawyków decyzyjnych i dyscypliny, bez których żadna technika nie działa.

Od lat prowadzimy warsztaty, sesje live tradingu, mentoring oraz wewnętrzne zjazdy projektowe – w tym m.in. flagowy Projekt Żółwia, który wyróżnia nas na tle rynku. 
Rafał Glinicki – założyciel firmy VSA Trader i polskiej edycji Projektu Żółwia – od lat wyznacza standardy w przestrzeni tradingowej, łącząc doświadczenie praktyka z autorskim podejściem do rynku i psychologii inwestora.

Todo o processo de geração e distribuição das moedas é gerenciado por um FMI, o Fundo de Moedas Inteligentes, ou como chamado pelo professor Schwartz, “FMI do bem”.

A intenção inicial das operações do ‘FMI do bem’ é trabalhar o conceito de sustentabilidade através da criação de jogos eletrônicos que permitem aos usuários obter os créditos imaginários  por meio de ações de preservação do meio ambiente.

Description:
El Club de bolsa, desde que comenzó su andadura allá por el año 1989, con la iniciativa de un grupo de alumnos de la Facultad de Ciencias Económicas y Empresariales de Sarriko lo crearon con la intención de pasar el testigo año tras año de manera didáctica, de una serie de actos que suelen ser fieles en cuanto al modus operandi de la asociación.

Con la irrupción de la informática, se daban cursillos internos tanto de informática, como de inglés, pasando por temas bursátiles y la creación de una revista propia que se difundía entre la universidad y entidades con gran nombre en aquella época, como eran Renta 4 banco por citar alguna.

Con el paso de los años, se han introducido distintos cursillos de iniciación a la bolsa, a cargo de distintos ponentes y entidades colaboradoras, así como cursillos de seguridad social.

Hoy en día, al igual que cambian los tiempos y cada año cambia la junta directiva y la manera en la que los nuevos y antiguos socios se organiza, cada año se va innovando más, y se buscan maneras de hacerse ver a otras personas que somos un club activo y que pueden acercarse a nosotros para preguntar dudas e incertidumbres bursátiles.

Por otra parte, realizamos un concurso de simulación bursátil de 3 meses de duración para los nuevos socios, para que tengan una primera toma de contacto a la hora de trabajar con las plataformas de gestión.

Name: Solume
Description:
Capital markets participants don't really act on perfect knowlede, and though in this day and age data sets are increasingly growing and new are being created, the way markets gain knowledge is falling behind progress. 

Too many solutions for captital market research today offer data aggregation and creation of new alternative data sets, too few take the challenge of actually mediating data and information to users purposes of research and decision making. 

Our solution gathers and semantically analyzes a wide variety of unstructured data sources such as company filings, government publications, and news. It then builds a dynamic knowledge graph of defined concepts such as companies, products, markets and events. The relations of such concepts are evaluated against company performance data by an array of proprietary algorithms. The output is trend and event discovery, risk mapping and quantification, market analysis, and thesis validation. Output reasoning produced by AI is explainable and transparent to users.

This way we enable equity and credit reseach analysts, portfolio managers and corporate stragetists to base their knowledge on more data, and make better deisions faster.

Name: Securities Vault
Description:
Securities Vault is a dynamic capital management firm that provides ASX-listed companies with an alternative method in which to access capital and liquidity.
The company was founded by Nathan Lodge and John Gaffney after they recognised a gap in the market for small-to-medium cap companies looking to raise capital. They found that companies of this size often experienced poor service levels, high fees and sub-optimal results. The concept for Securities Vault was borne from the vision to provide these under-serviced companies with a means of raising capital that is transparent, flexible and cost-effective. 
Unlike traditional forms of raising capital, Securities Vault offering places control back in the hands of the issuing company. Structured similar to a US style At-The-Market (ATM) facility, Vault’s ‘Stand-By’ facility allows the client to self-direct the capital raising process, giving them decision-making power on issues such as pricing, quantity and timing.
They key benefit of the facility is that funds are raised by selling newly issued shares at prevailing market prices. This contrasts significantly to traditional forms of raising capital, where pricing is generally set as a discount to the VWAP over a certain period. As a result, the net proceeds that an issuing company would receive using the Stand-By facility are generally higher than it would under the alternative.
The Securities Vault model also avoids the classic conflict of interest issues that arise when an intermediary (broker) is acting on behalf of both the company that it is raising capital for and the underlying client base it utilises to raise the capital (or at least a proportion of the capital). Unlike many of these intermediaries, Securities Vault acts solely for the company raising capital, and not the investors.
We welcome the opportunity to fully outline the advantages of our offering a look forward to assisting you with next capital raise.

Description:
Orion Trading Systems (OTS) was launched in 2015 by a team of scientific minded technologists who are passionate about the financial markets to provide open, multi-asset trading solutions for investors, brokers and fund managers.  OTS puts the customer at the center of the trading experience.  We focus on creating the best trading experience for customers by focusing on the front-end and leveraging partnerships with leading brokers and API-based industry aggregators. 

Large institutional traders depend on Order Management Systems (OMS) and Execution Management Systems (EMS) to handle their orders and send them to the broker of their choice.  Retail traders are typically locked in to one or more closed proprietary systems to get their trading done.  Well no more. 

With OTS’ Orion Multi-Trader, you can trade equities, futures and other assets across multiple brokers from one application. See your aggregate risk, all your positions, and open orders in one place.  Best of all – we help you future-proof your trading. When new asset classes are available like ICOs, fractional real estate, digital ads or digital precious metals, Orion plans to be there too. Our open architecture and lack of broker lockups means we can deliver solutions for these assets in weeks rather than months or years.

Welcome to the future – Orion Multi-Trader.

Name: Skystream Markets
Description:
Skystream Markets
Liquidity Solutions for the Environmental Markets

Skystream Markets is an institutional transaction platform for the Environmental Markets. The Company has a unique approach to building markets through the use of technology and traditional brokerage services. The Skystream Markets team has an extensive track record in developing successful transaction platforms combined with deep experience across numerous capital and energy markets.

The platform has been designed with input from major institutional trading desks in the market, including market makers, utilities, hedge funds and alternative power producers. Skystream Markets is a pure-agency model that adds value through technology at each stage of the trade cycle.

Markets We Serve
Skystream Markets is currently focused on providing transaction services in the Renewable Energy Certificate ("REC") markets, which are created by the state Renewable Portfolio Standards. Currently 29 States & DC have a Renewable Portfolio Standard, while several other states are currently pursuing legislation to enact one.

Objectives
Skystream Markets offers a neutral, transparent and efficient way for market participants to monetize environmental commodities, by providing multiple means to access liquidity through both traditional voice brokerage and an electronic trading platform. Skystream Markets is building auctions and electronic markets for the primary and secondary markets in RECs. These markets are institutional strength, and have been specifically designed to address client concerns regarding lack of price points, liquidity concentration, and measurable execution quality.

FXswapX is an FX swaps matching platform designed specifically for banks to exchange risk with each other, with minimal market impact or information leakage.

The key issues that our new platform addresses include:

- Creation of trusted reference rates computed from bank data, yet without any bank being required to disclose their proprietary data
- A trading process that recognizes and fully supports the trading needs of voice traders on  STIRT / FX desks while also enabling API connections from those banks who have created internal electronic order books for FX swaps
- A matching process that prioritizes large transactions, which is ideally suited for the FX swaps market while also making it very difficult to ‘game’ the process, or extract information

Name: Blue Ocean Harvest
Description:
Blue Ocean Harvest is an emerging markets‑focused provider of credit-based capital raising solutions and advisory services. 

Headquartered in New York, the independent firm develops custom global capital markets strategies for its clients, which consist of multinationals, middle market companies, infrastructure concessionaires, and government entities.  

Collectively Blue Ocean Harvest has successfully completed capital markets and socio-economic development mandates representing more than US 4.8 billion in direct investment.

Our belief is that a cohesive capital markets strategy to achieve robust infrastructure, energy independence, and a diversified economy enables emerging market countries to break the status quo and achieve sustainable long-term growth.  We know that emerging markets are not a homogenous basket, but a collection of unique countries, each with their own opportunities, operating nuances, and risks.

Our capabilities and pipeline are centered on hard assets and hard currency:

- energy (small hydros, etc.)
- physical infrastructure (airports, toll roads, etc.)
- social infrastructure (education, healthcare)
- structured finance (diaspora remittance flows, aircraft leasing, etc.)

Our five core differentiators are built upon over a decade as an economic developer operating on the ground in Latin America and the Caribbean and as a trusted advisor to emerging market government policy makers and private sector market-leaders:

1. The skillsets to structure and de-risk opportunities and create financeable transactions

2. The right local and global ecosystem of participants to take action and get deals done

3. A win-win framework to add value to public entities through PPPs, etc.

4. Information-driven solutions powered by uniquely-sourced local market data

5. Ability to navigate and obtain capital from developmental organizations (OPIC, etc.)

For more information, please visit www.blueoceanharvest.com or contact inquiry@blueoceanharvest.com.

Name: Club del Inversor Ganadero
Description:
Soy Gregorio Aberásturi, CEO de Gregorio Aberásturi SRL, socio fundador del Mercado de Liniers S.A.. Nuestra empresa es consignataria de hacienda y tiene su sede en Carhué, partido de Adolfo Alsina, provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina.

Iniciamos nuestras actividades en el año 1947 en un pueblo llamado Esteban Agustín Gascón, cuya zona es considerada una las mejores del país para la producción de carne debido a la calidad de sus pastos.

En el año 2000 decidimos potenciar toda nuestra experiencia y conocimiento, invitando a nuestros clientes históricos a participar de un proyecto de inversión ganadera.

Los resultados fueron sumamente positivos y alentadores, razón por lo cual hemos decidido democratizar el negocio ganadero en nuestro país, poniendo a disposición del pequeño y mediano ahorrista una nueva e innovadora alternativa de inversión, sustentada en uno de los activos más emblemáticos, rentables y seguros de nuestro país, como es la producción bovina.

Para ello, formamos un sólido equipo de trabajo que involucra a distintos profesionales de primer nivel en cada uno de los ámbitos que se requieren para el desarrollo de un negocio confiable, transparente, y que asegura una rentabilidad a largo plazo.

Además de la finalidad económica, este proyecto cuenta con una impronta netamente social, ya que pretende ayudar a través de la inversión, al arraigo de la familia ganadera, con la finalidad de generar trabajo e incrementar la cantidad y calidad de la producción de ganado.

Amigos, tengo el agrado presentarles al CLUB DEL INVERSOR GANADERO. Los invito a ser parte de una nueva experiencia económica y social.

Name: Nahayatnegar
Description:
گروه خدمات بازار سرمایه نهایتنگر، نهاد مالی ثبت شده نزد سازمان بورس و اوراق بهادار است که در گروه خود، شرکت کارگزاری (با مجوز ارایه تمام خدمات)، شرکت سبدگردانی (با مدیریت صندوق های سرمایهگذاری متعدد)، شرکت سرمایه گذاری و شرکت نرم افزاری اختصاصی را داراست. بنیان گروه مالی نهایت نگر در سال 1378 با تاسیس شرکت کارگزاری نهایت نگر بنا نهاده شد. این گروه در مسیری پر چالش، با بهره گیری از  پتانسیلهای موجود توانسته با بیش از 20 سال سابقه درخشان در بازار سرمایه، بخش عمدهای از زنجیره ارزش بازار سرمایه را تحقق بخشد.
از جمله اهداف اصلی گروه خدمات بازار سرمایه را می توان به شرح زیر بر شمرد:
	حضور هرچه گسترده تر و عمیق تر در بازار سرمایه از طریق تبدیل شدن به کارگزاری الکترونیک؛
	توسعه سامانه های نرم افزاری با رویکرد چالاکی و انعطاف پذیری بیشتر و توسعه ابزارهای نوین معاملاتی در راستای هدف "کارگزاری الکترونیک"؛
	 توسعه بخش مدیریت دارایی با بهره گیری از آخرین دانش، ابزارها و امکانات مهندسی مالی؛ افزایش دارایی های تحت مدیریت و همچنین ارایه خدمات نوین به مشتریان در قالب انواع متنوع صندوق های سرمایه گذاری و سبد های اختصاصی؛
	تکمیل زنجیره خدمات در قالب گروه خدمات مالی نهایت نگر.
اگرچه به دنیای سرمایه تعلق داریم، اما قبل از آن به سرمایه گذاران میاندیشیم و افتخار داریم ضمن تعامل مستمر با آنها، همواره از ایشان الهام گرفته، آنها را در خلق آرزوهای مالیشان همراهی کنیم و امیدواریم با این تعامل سازنده و با بکارگیری بروزترین تکنولوژیهای این صنعت، گروه مالی نهایتنگر را به یکی از بهترین شرکتهای مدیریت ثروت، در میهن عزیزمان تبدیل کنیم. موفقیت مشتریان ما، موفقیت گروه مالی نهایتنگر و همواره یکی از بهترین دستاوردها برای همکاران، مدیران و سهامداران شرکت خواهد بود.
نهاد های مالی مجموعه نهایت نگر: 
شرکت گروه خدمات بازار سرمایه نهایت نگر - تاسیس سال 1400
شرکت کارگزاری نهایت نگر - تاسیس سال 1378
شرکت سبدگردان امید نهایت نگر - تاسیس سال 1396
شرکت سرمایه گذاری نهایت نگر - تاسیس سال  1400

صندوق های سرمایه گذاری تحت مدیریت : 
صندوق سرمایه گذاری مشترک پویا (تاسیس 1386)
صندوق سرمایه گذاری مشترک البرز (تاسیس 1391)
صندوق سرمایه گذاری اختصاصی بازارگردانی نهایت نگر (تاسیس 1398)

Nie jesteśmy guru tradingu. Jesteśmy traderami osiągającymi systematyczne stopy zwrotu na rynku walutowym.

Techniki inwestycyjne stosowane przez Fibonacci Team opierają się na koncepcji Harmonic Tradingu. Metodologia ta koncentruje się na wykorzystaniu geometrii rynkowych, układów korekcyjnych oraz wyselekcjonowanych narzędzi opartych na liczbach ciągu Fibonacciego. Bardzo ważnym uzupełnieniem tego spojrzenia jest w naszej ocenie elementu czasu oraz dynamiki ceny. Budowanie przewagi statystycznej opieramy na synergii wskazanych metod z istotnymi obszarami wsparć i oporów, zgrupowaniami (Fibo Cluster) oraz zastosowaniem wielowymiarowej strategii Multi Time Frame System, której celem jest właściwa interpretacja kontekstu rynkowego z punktu widzenia kilku interwałów czasowych.

Nasz Team tworzą traderzy osiągający ponadprzeciętne i systematyczne stopy zwrotu na rynku FOREX.

Name: ACG Calgary Chapter
Description:
The Association for Corporate Growth (ACG) is the global community for middle market M&A dealmakers and business leaders focused on driving growth. ACG members have access to data, content and networking opportunities, capital and knowledge they need to drive and sustain corporate growth. Founded in 1954, ACG is a global organization with 59 chapters and over 14,500 members. Doing business is at the heart of the ACG membership experience.

Calgary Chapter and National ACG Benefits of membership include:
•	Local meetings: Nationally recognized speakers discuss topic relevant to large and middle market companies. 
•	Proprietary information: Intellectual capital. Through the national and local web sites, newsletters, directories and meetings, members acquire a premier resource library on M&A and corporate growth. 
•	International conference InterGrowth: This annual, multi-day event extends opportunities for networking and garnering best growth practices from North America's corporate elite. 
•	Risk insurance program: Cosponsored by Marsh & McLennan Companies, this exclusive program removes many of the key risks constricting successful deal making. 
•	Discounts on leading corporate growth conferences in the U.S.: Many of the best conferences involving middle market M&A and corporate growth offer ACG discounts. 
•	Discounts on leading technical literature: Shannon Pratt, Jossey-Bass, Fast Track Publishing and a dozen more publishers offer ACG discounts.

The ACG membership, approximately 7,000, represents the entire corporate growth and M&A career spectrum. About one-half represent corporations and equity groups, and one-half represent intermediary and service firms, including financiers, venture capitalists, accountants, lawyers, appraisers and consultants.
