Name: FXHUB.cz
Description:
Jsme FXHUB, parta normálních lidí, která má ráda život ve vlastních rukou. Už více jak 10 let se zabýváme obchodováním na globálních trzích. Bylo to dlouhé a náročné období, během kterého jsme sami "vyhodili" spoustu peněz při hledání správné cesty z okna. Ale dnes jsme tady, abychom ukázali, že trading je sice těžký, ale dá se zvládnout.

Zjistili jsme, že paradoxně je síla úspěchu v jednoduchosti. A to se odráží i na naší filozofii. Nechceme ukazovat hmatatelné bohatství a drahá auta, ale tvrdou práci, která je nezbytná pro dosažení (jakéhokoli) úspěchu. Předáváme své znalosti a učíme trading prakticky, věcně, bez zbytečného balastu, který koluje internetem.

Bojujeme proti nekalým praktikám a pomáháme ostatním vyvarovat se stejným chybám, jakých jsme se v minulosti dopustili sami, a stát se úspěšnými obchodníky. Naše snaha je předat vám osvědčené strategie a techniky, které vám umožní vyhnout se pastem a dosáhnout vlastního finančního úspěchu.

Vítejte v naší partě, kde se budeme společně učit, rozvíjet své dovednosti a podporovat se navzájem na cestě k obchodnímu úspěchu. Jsme tu pro vás, abychom vám pomohli dosáhnout vašich obchodních cílů.

Name: Project Samsø
Description:
KALYP Technologies Ltd, a provider of enterprise software powering smart financial networks, and Strategy-Partners LLC, focused on climate change initiatives, develop a solution to accelerate the much-needed progress to compliant net-zero glide paths. This is Project Samsø, taking inspiration from the eponymous carbon neutral Danish island aiming to become completely carbon-free by 2030.

With its embedded digital register, smart workflows, and services marketplace, the Samsø infrastructure will, first, improve today’s carbon emission and offset verification and certification process. Secondly, the resulting reliable carbon footprints fuel Samsø’s novel and automated conversion of existing shares into  carbon-neutral securities. This conversion is financed by investors, making their investment compliant with the Paris Accord while accelerating the underlying company’s path to net-zero or better.

Samsø offers a substantial business opportunity for qualified parties, being carbon emission or offset i) registries, ii) verifiers, iii) certifiers, iv) auditors, or v) investors.

Interested in a conversation around your part in a significant growth opportunity? Complete our survey (https://www.samso.io/survey) to get started.

Name: NAC Foundation, LLC
Description:
NAC Foundation, headquartered in the U.S. and a member of the American Bank Association, created AML BitCoin and its predecessor digital currency, the Aten Coin, both of which were built with anti-money laundering, anti-terrorism and theft-resistant properties built into the coin. As a result, they are compliant with numerous laws, including Anti-Money Laundering (AML), PATRIOT Act, Bank Secrecy Act and Anti-Fraud and Financial Crimes (AFF). NAC's mission is to strengthen the social sector by advancing knowledge about the use of regulated digital currencies and blockchain technology globally.

AML BitCoin is the world’s only digital currency with a patented biometric digital identity system tied to the blockchain, enabling strict adherence to bank security provisions including AML (anti-money laundering) and KYC (know your customer) protections. AML BitCoin is also compliant with worldwide regulations, including: the U.S Patriot Act, Bank Secrecy Act, U.S Office of Foreign Assets, Control Compliant, and more. AML BitCoin enables cryptocurrency to be recognized as a legitimate payment method by governments and regulators.

Disclaimer: ABTC is still in the token stages. Upon completion and activation of the AML BitCoin, AML Token holders will have the opportunity to exchange them for AML BitCoins on a 1:1 ratio.

To learn more, visit www.amlbitcoin.com.

In the year 2005, ownership of ACSL along with all of its assets, clients and membership of CSE was sold to the current management team headed by the company’s Chairman, MD Amin Ullah. MD Amin Ullah is one of the leading businessmen in the fisheries sector of Bangladesh. He is the Managing Director of Ark Sea Foods Ltd. and is currently the president of Bangladesh Frozen Foods Exporters Association. Under his leadership, ACSL became one of the leading brokerage firms in Chittagong.

Name: QuantX Automation Ltd
Description:
QuantX is an innovative software and technology house, specializing in custom software solutions for the financial markets and computational finance.  With a background in quantitative trading and development, QuantX can translate your business needs into solutions. 

If you are a startup, mature company or proprietary trader looking at an automated trading system for an extra edge from your all ready profitable manual strategy then QuantX can help you realize the full potential of your strategy or trading system. 

•	Market data feed integration and Exchange connectivity – QuantX can provide integration to real time market feeds, low latency order routing systems and exchange gateways using FIX and API connectivity.
•	Algorithmic Trading – QuantX can implement standard trading algorithms or develop custom algorithms for your current system in order to enhance your trade, achieving better execution prices and reduce trading costs.
•	Automated trading/Systematic Trading – QuantX has the expertise to convert your existing manual trading strategy into a methodic automated system, allowing you to take advantage of more market opportunities quickly.
•	Trading systems – development of multi asset low latency, high throughput trading platforms for futures, options, spread betting. CFD, FX and binary.
•	Development – QuantX can carry out additions and modifications to your current system, examples including API, trading screens and integration of payment systems.
•	GPU computing - QuantX can provide consultation and implementation of GPU technology into your organization, introducing speed improvements of up to 100x
•	Consultancy – By evaluating your current system architecture, QuantX can advise on both improvements, taking hardware and software into consideration, leading to increased trading performance by optimizing current processes.

Name: GXG Markets A/S
Description:
We focus on and care about smaller companies.
GXG Markets is a European growth market for small and medium-sized businesses. GXG has three separate markets for companies in different stages of growth.  

The market cap of a new company for initial public offering typically ranges between €5-50 million, operates soundly and has clear ambitions of growth and development, so that the company may in the long term obtain a market value substantially above the original initial public offering value.

Historically, the companies admitted to trading at GXG Markets have been a mix of mature, well-respected business enterprises with a long history and a number of young investment companies which have become known to the general public in connection with their admission to trading.

A company admitted to trading on GXG Markets will experience substantially increased attention on the part of both investors and market observers/the media. In many cases the publication of the company’s qualities results in a greater demand than expected by the company for its shares already from the start at GXG Markets.

Jubilee Biblical Foundations

Jubilee Impact Fund values biblical understanding that God owns the earth, the land, and everything in it, God’s people must be good and faithful servants in stewarding what God has entrusted them with and that God’s people are to share God’s resources among themselves with mercy and justice. Jubilee Impact Fund’s values are grounded in Biblical principles, with a special focus on Matthew 25 (Stewardship), Leviticus 25 (Justice), and Deuteronomy 15 (Mercy).

Name: أخبار الخليج
Description:
إن إدارة شؤونك المالية وتحقيق النجاح المالي هي واحدة من أهم مسؤولياتك في الحياة، وهي مسؤولية لا أحد يستطيع الاعتناء بها سواك، فأنت وحدك المسؤول عن تحقيق الحرية المالية خلال مسار حياتك.

أُنشِأ موقع مال وأعمال لمساعدة الشباب التواق لملامسة نجاحه المالي. إن مال وأعمال هو ما تحتاجه من أجل إيقاظ شعلة ذكاءك المالي وتنمية مهاراتك في الادخار والاستثمار، وشحذ مهارة الكسب لديك. يضع بين يديك يوميا محتوى فريد يتناول موضوع المال كسبا و إنفاقا وادخارا واستثمارا.

هل أنت من عشاق الحرية؟ هل تحلم بالنجاح المالي؟ نشجعك أن تهتف (نعم) بكل قوة وشجاعة وإصرار وبأعلى صوتك، فأنت من حقك تماما أن تحصل على نصيبك الكامل من الحرية والمال والسعادة والحياة الكريمة، والأمر المحفز هنا هو أنك تستطيع ذلك بالفعل.

“إذا رغب الناس في كسب المال فلا بد أن يطوروا ذلك الجزء من وعيهم المتعلق بالمال” (مارجريت ستورتز).

“يعد المال أحد أشكال القوة، لكن الوعي والتعليم المالي هو القوة الأكبر، فالمال يأتي ويذهب، ولكنك إن عملت على إيقاظ ذكاءك المالي وشحذ مهارة الكسب لديك، فستمتلك السلطان النافذ علىه، وسيكون بوسعك تحقيق حريتك المالية” (روبرت كيوساكي).

About
T-storm Weather is a Chicago-based subscription service for buyers and sellers of crops in the futures and cash markets. Our service began in 2006 and is now one of the most well-respected weather and analyst firms in the grain industry.

We independently develop weather forecasts and agricultural analyses to help buyers and sellers of corn, soybeans, wheat, rapeseed (canola), sunflower, and palm oil make financial decisions. We also provide forecasts for livestock areas of the central U.S. during winter to monitor for potential disruptions to supply and transportation logistics.  In 2010, we unveiled our weekly YieldCast product, which provides customers with U.S. corn and soybean yield forecasts based on past weather and expectations of future weather. 

Our information and weather opinions have been featured in the Wall Street Journal, BusinessWeek, Barron's, Bloomberg, Dow Jones Newswires, WGN-TV, International Herald Tribune, The Globe and Mail, Business News Network, Canada Television, San Francisco Chronicle, Commodity News For Tomorrow, and AgricultureOnline.

At its best Investor Relations can maximize a company’s valuation by building strong relationships between a company and the capital markets – based on integrity and transparency. This is achieved through consistent, proactive and honest articulation of a company’s key investment attributes to the investment community, and feedback from the investment community.

Kingfisher Investor Relations brings the knowledge, experience and connections to help you build and maintain strong and valuable relationships between your company and capital providers.

Name: Dollar Income Time Forex
Description:
Foreign exchange, or Forex for short, is quite simply a market where you’re able to exchange one currency for another. When you ‘sell’ a currency, there is a buyer for that currency somewhere else. Now, the exchange rate between those two currencies is what’s important when trading forex. The exchange rate is constantly fluctuating, and it’s these fluctuations that allow market speculators to earn from trading.

With a daily trade volume of $6.5 trillion dollars, the forex market itself is huge! It eclipses the likes of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) which, by comparison, has a trading volume of only $22.4 billion per day.

The Forex Market’s sheer size attracts a wide range of different participants, including Central Banks, Investment Managers, Hedge Funds, Corporations, Brokers and Retail Traders – with 90% of those market participants being currency speculators!

Name: Bangladesh Academy for Securities Markets (BASM)
Description:
"Bangladesh Academy for Securities Markets (BASM)" is an academic wing of the Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission. By the year July 2019, the honorable Prime Minister of Bangladesh, Her Excellency Sheikh Hasina, inaugurated and materialized the establishment of BASM. Its formal activity was started on May 06, 2019, with the purview of expanding financial literacy throughout the country.  Dr Toufic Ahmad Choudhury, former DG of BIBM, is currently leading BASM in the capacity of its Director-General.
To establish a national capital market education hub, the government of Bangladesh has provided a plot of 33.03 Katha for the BASM permanent campus. Along with its permanent establishment, BASM has an ongoing campus at Dilkhusa, Motijheel, inaugurated by the honorable Chairman of Bangladesh Securities and Exchange Commission, Professor Shibli Rubayat Ul Islam, on May 31, 2021. Professor Shibli Rubayat Ul Islam is also the Chairman of the Board of Governors, BASM. He oversees and supervises our academic and administrative activities.  
BASM is committed to strengthening the capital market fundamentals through imparting financial literacy throughout the country.
Functions of BASM
Major programs conducted by BASM are:
1. Training for Authorized Representative.
2. Investors’ Education and Orientation Program.
3. Capacity Development for Institutional Executives.
4. Financial Capacity Development for Non-Finance Executives.
5. Establishment of Knowledge Club for developing and implementing innovative ideas in the capital market.
6. Knowledge Club of BASM will also work as a liaison between BASM and University authorities for organizing seminars and workshops on university campuses.
7. Organizing Outreach Program for different divisional investors’ throughout the country.
8. Organizing Public Lecture, Memorial Lecture, Workshops and Seminars, on contemporary issues relevant to the economy and capital market.
The program list is not exhaustive....

Our vision is to be recognized as performance leader in international cooperation with respect to the expansion and growth of foreign businesses including those from Poland and Eastern Europe.

Description

Expert Global Consulting provides high value consulting services to companies wishing to engage in/or expand their involvement in international trade. We provide assistance in creating product offers destined for foreign markets, as well as organize and coordinate negotiations of capital investment offers between foreign entities and U.S based private equity groups. The company is headquartered in Mount Prospect, Illinois and maintains local representation in India, Norway and Poland.

Name: Red Opal Capital S.a.r.l
Description:
Red Opal Capital is a Luxembourg-based alternative investment manager specializing in distressed, special situations, and value-add real estate opportunities across Southeast Asia, with a primary focus on Vietnam.
We target high-conviction opportunities emerging from post-pandemic market dislocations, including non-performing loan (NPL) portfolios, underperforming hospitality and commercial assets, and projects requiring restructuring, repositioning, or recapitalization.
Leveraging deep on-the-ground insights, strong local partnerships, and disciplined underwriting, Red Opal Capital transforms underutilized real estate into institutional-grade investments. Our strategy integrates active asset management, operational turnaround, and thoughtful capital deployment to enhance long-term value.
Our mission is to deliver superior, risk-adjusted returns to institutional and professional investors while contributing to healthier, more resilient real estate markets in the region. With a seasoned leadership team and a hands-on approach, we bridge international investment standards with the high-growth potential of emerging Southeast Asian markets.
